    {id = "2124929812", name = "The Backrooms | No Glove", category = "ChangedOrDisabled"},
    {id = "2148902927", name = "Sharp Shooter | Hitman Glove", category = "ChangedOrDisabled"},
    {id = "2895206704788569", name = "Yuletime Might | Santa Glove", category = "ChangedOrDisabled"},
    {id = "2895206704788569", name = "Snow man left behind | Jerry Glove", category = "ChangedOrDisabled"},

    -- UNRELEASED BADGES
    {id = "2124760881", name = "Slapping master | No Glove", category = "Unreleased"},
}

-- Store owned badges
local ownedBadges = {}

-- Fetch owned badges from ReplicatedStorage
local function fetchOwnedBadges()
    ownedBadges = {}
    
    local playerData = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if not playerData then
        warn("PlayerData not found in ReplicatedStorage")
        return false
    end
    
    local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(username)
    if not playerFolder then
        warn("Player folder not found for: " .. username)
        return false
    end
    
    local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
    if not unlockedBadges then
        warn("UnlockedBadges not found for: " .. username)
        return false
    end
    
    if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
        local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
        
        if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
            local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
            
            for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                ownedBadges[cleanId] = true
            end
        end
        return true
    end
    return false
end

-- Build Glove-Rewarding badges list ONLY
local function getGloveRewardingList()
    local gloveBadges = {}
    
    for _, badge in ipairs(allBadges) do
        if badge.category == "GloveRewarding" then
            table.insert(gloveBadges, badge)
        end
    end
    
    local totalCount = #gloveBadges
    local ownedCount = 0
    for _, badge in ipairs(gloveBadges) do
        if ownedBadges[badge.id] then
            ownedCount = ownedCount + 1
        end
    end
    
    local lines = {}
    local function push(s) table.insert(lines, s) end
    
    push("━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    push("          🎯 GLOVE-REWARDING BADGES 🎯")
    push("━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    
    for _, badge in ipairs(gloveBadges) do
        local status = ownedBadges[badge.id] and "✅" or "❌"
        push(status .. " " .. badge.name)
    end
    
    push("")
    push("━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    push("              📊 STATISTICS 📊")
    push("━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    push("✅ Owned: " .. ownedCount .. "/" .. totalCount)
    push("❌ Missing: " .. (totalCount - ownedCount) .. "/" .. totalCount)
    push(string.format("📈 Progress: %.1f%%", (ownedCount / totalCount) * 100))
    
    return table.concat(lines, "\n")
end

-- Build Other badges list (all except GloveRewarding) with categories
local function getOtherBadgesList()
    local categories = {
        Regular = {},
        ScavengerHunt = {},
        Event = {},
        ChangedOrDisabled = {},
        Unreleased = {},
    }
    
    for _, badge in ipairs(allBadges) do
        if badge.category ~= "GloveRewarding" then
            local cat = categories[badge.category]
            if cat then
                table.insert(cat, badge)
            end
        end
    end
    
    local totalCount = 0
    local ownedCount = 0
    
    -- Count all other badges
    for _, badge in ipairs(allBadges) do
        if badge.category ~= "GloveRewarding" then
            totalCount = totalCount + 1
            if ownedBadges[badge.id] then
                ownedCount = ownedCount + 1
            end
        end
    end
    
    local lines = {}
    local function push(s) table.insert(lines, s) end
    
    local function section(title, list)
        if #list == 0 then return end
        
        push("━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
        push("" .. title .. "")
        push("━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
        for _, badge in ipairs(list) do
            local status = ownedBadges[badge.id] and "✅" or "❌"
            push(status .. " " .. badge.name)
        end
        push("")
    end
    
    section("REGULAR BADGES", categories.Regular)
    section("SCAVENGER HUNT BADGES", categories.ScavengerHunt)
    section("EVENT BADGES", categories.Event)
    section("CHANGED/DISABLED BADGES", categories.ChangedOrDisabled)
    section("UNRELEASED BADGES", categories.Unreleased)
    
    push("━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    push("              📊 STATISTICS 📊")
    push("━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    push("✅ Owned: " .. ownedCount .. "/" .. totalCount)
    push("❌ Missing: " .. (totalCount - ownedCount) .. "/" .. totalCount)
    push(string.format("📈 Progress: %.1f%%", (ownedCount / totalCount) * 100))
    
    return table.concat(lines, "\n")
end

-- Create UI elements for badges
local gloveParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("🎯 Glove-Rewarding Badges", "Loading...")
local otherParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("📜 Other Badges", "Loading...")

-- Refresh button for badges
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "🔄 Refresh Badges",
    Callback = function()
        task.spawn(function()
            task.wait(0.1)
            fetchOwnedBadges()
            gloveParagraph:Set(getGloveRewardingList())
            otherParagraph:Set(getOtherBadgesList())
        end)
    end
})

-- Initial load with 1 second delay
task.spawn(function()
    task.wait(1)
    fetchOwnedBadges()
    gloveParagraph:Set(getGloveRewardingList())
    otherParagraph:Set(getOtherBadgesList())
    
    -- Auto-refresh every 1 second
    while true do
        task.wait(0.01)
        fetchOwnedBadges()
        gloveParagraph:Set(getGloveRewardingList())
        otherParagraph:Set(getOtherBadgesList())
    end
end)

end

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Get [REDACTED] Glove",
    Callback = function()
        task.spawn(function()
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Teleport",
                Content = "Teleporting to Doors 1-10...",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
            
            -- Teleport to each door from 1 to 10
            for doorNumber = 1, 10 do
                -- WAIT FOR CHARACTER TO BE ALIVE
                local character = player.Character
                
                -- Keep waiting until character exists and is alive
                while not character or not character.Parent do
                    print("Waiting for respawn...")
                    character = player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
                    task.wait(0.1)
                end
                
                -- Wait a bit more for character to fully load
                task.wait(0.1)
                
                -- Get HumanoidRootPart
                local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                
                -- Keep waiting until HumanoidRootPart exists
                while not hrp do
                    print("Waiting for HumanoidRootPart...")
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                end
                
                -- Find the door
                local doorsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("PocketDimension")
                if not doorsFolder then
                    warn("PocketDimension not found!")
                    break
                end
                
                local doors = doorsFolder:FindFirstChild("Doors")
                if not doors then
                    warn("Doors not found in PocketDimension!")
                    break
                end
                
                local door = doors:FindFirstChild(tostring(doorNumber))
                if not door then
                    warn("Door " .. doorNumber .. " not found!")
                    break
                end
                
                -- Teleport to the door
                if door:IsA("BasePart") then
                    pcall(function()
                        hrp.CFrame = door.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
                        print("Teleported to Door " .. doorNumber)
                    end)
                end
                
                -- Small delay before next door
                task.wait(4.5)
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Complete!",
                Content = "Teleported to all doors 1-10!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end)
    end    
})

Tab:AddSection({
    Name = "Savior"
})

local autoWarpActive = false
local autoWarpLoop = nil
local currentTarget = nil
local closestMagnitude = 999999

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Get Warp Glove",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        autoWarpActive = Value
        
        if Value then
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            
            -- Check if player has Swapper glove
            if player.leaderstats.Glove.Value ~= "Swapper" then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Swapper Glove First!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 3
                })
                autoWarpActive = false
                return
            end
            
            -- Check if player already has Warp Glove
            local hasWarpBadge = false
            pcall(function()
                hasWarpBadge = game:GetService("BadgeService"):UserHasBadgeAsync(player.UserId, 0)
            end)
            
            if hasWarpBadge then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Already Owned",
                    Content = "You already have Warp Glove!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                autoWarpActive = false
                return
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Warp",
                Content = "Auto Get Warp Glove Started!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
            
            -- Reset variables
            closestMagnitude = 999999
            currentTarget = nil
            
            -- Stop existing loop if any
            if autoWarpLoop then
                task.cancel(autoWarpLoop)
                autoWarpLoop = nil
            end
            
            -- Start the loop
            autoWarpLoop = task.spawn(function()
                while autoWarpActive do
                    local success, err = pcall(function()
                        local character = player.Character
                        
                        -- Check if character exists
                        if not character or not character.Parent then
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        if not hrp then
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        -- Check if player has Swapper glove
                        if player.leaderstats.Glove.Value ~= "Swapper" then
                            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                                Name = "Error",
                                Content = "Equip Swapper Glove!",
                                Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                                Time = 2
                            })
                            autoWarpActive = false
                            return
                        end
                        
                        -- Check if player has "entered"
                        local hasEntered = character:FindFirstChild("entered")
                        if not hasEntered then
                            print("⚠️ Player doesn't have 'entered'!")
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        -- Find closest player with "entered" and alive
                        local closestPlayer = nil
                        local closestMag = 999999
                        
                        for _, v in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                            if v ~= player and v.Character and v.Character.Parent then
                                local targetHrp = v.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                                local targetHumanoid = v.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                                local targetEntered = v.Character:FindFirstChild("entered")
                                local targetRagdolled = v.Character:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled")
                                
                                -- Check if target is alive, has "entered", and not ragdolled
                                if targetHrp and targetHumanoid and targetHumanoid.Health > 0 and targetEntered then
                                    -- Check if ragdolled exists and is false
                                    local isRagdolled = false
                                    if targetRagdolled then
                                        isRagdolled = targetRagdolled.Value
                                    end
                                    
                                    if not isRagdolled then
                                        local magnitude = (hrp.Position - targetHrp.Position).Magnitude
                                        
                                        if magnitude < closestMag then
                                            closestMag = magnitude
                                            closestPlayer = v
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                        
                        -- If no target found, reset and wait
                        if not closestPlayer then
                            closestMagnitude = 999999
                            task.wait(0.15)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        -- Update closest magnitude
                        closestMagnitude = closestMag
                        currentTarget = closestPlayer
                        
                        -- Check if target is valid
                        if currentTarget and currentTarget.Character then
                            local targetHrp = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            local targetHead = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
                            local targetHumanoid = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                            local targetEntered = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("entered")
                            local targetRagdolled = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled")
                            
                            -- Check if target is alive, has "entered", and not ragdolled
                            if targetHrp and targetHead and targetHumanoid and targetHumanoid.Health > 0 and targetEntered then
                                local isRagdolled = false
                                if targetRagdolled then
                                    isRagdolled = targetRagdolled.Value
                                end
                                
                                if not isRagdolled then
                                    -- Teleport to target's head
                                    hrp.CFrame = targetHead.CFrame
                                    task.wait(0.17)
                                    
                                    -- Fire Swapper hit
                                    local hitSwapper = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("HitSwapper")
                                    if hitSwapper then
                                        hitSwapper:FireServer(targetHead)
                                        print("✅ HitSwapper fired on: " .. currentTarget.Name)
                                    end
                                    
                                    -- Teleport to SafeBox
                                    local safeBox = workspace:FindFirstChild("SafeBox")
                                    if safeBox then
                                        hrp.CFrame = safeBox.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 5, 0)
                                        print("✅ Teleported to SafeBox")
                                    end
                                    
                                    print("✅ Swapped with: " .. currentTarget.Name)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                        
                        -- Check if target fell into void (Y < -10)
                        if currentTarget and currentTarget.Character then
                            local targetHrp = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            if targetHrp and targetHrp.Position.Y < -10 then
                                print("💀 Target fell into void!")
                                
                                -- Teleport to target's HRP + 10 Y
                                hrp.CFrame = targetHrp.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 10, 0)
                                task.wait(0.15)
                                
                                -- Fire SLOC remote
                                local sloc = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("SLOC")
                                if sloc then
                                    sloc:FireServer()
                                    print("✅ SLOC fired!")
                                end
                                
                                -- Reset variables
                                closestMagnitude = 999999
                                currentTarget = nil
                                
                                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                                    Name = "Warp Glove",
                                    Content = "Warp Glove obtained!",
                                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                                    Time = 3
                                })
                                
                                -- Stop the loop
                                autoWarpActive = false
                                return
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    
                    if not success then
                        print("⚠️ Error in Auto Warp: " .. tostring(err))
                        task.wait(0.5)
                    end
                    
                    task.wait(0.15)
                end
                
                -- Cleanup
                print("Auto Warp stopped.")
                closestMagnitude = 999999
                currentTarget = nil
            end)
            
        else
            -- Disabled
            
            if autoWarpLoop then
                task.cancel(autoWarpLoop)
                autoWarpLoop = nil
            end
            closestMagnitude = 999999
            currentTarget = nil
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddSection({
    Name = "Short Fuse"
})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Get Bomb Glove",
	Callback = function()   
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Warp" and not game:GetService("BadgeService"):UserHasBadgeAsync(game.Players.LocalPlayer.UserId, 0) then
OldTouch = workspace.DEATHBARRIER.CanTouch
local players = game.Players:GetChildren()
local RandomPlayer = players[math.random(1, #players)]
repeat RandomPlayer = players[math.random(1, #players)] until RandomPlayer ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer and RandomPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("entered") and RandomPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled").Value == false
Target = RandomPlayer
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = Target.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame
task.wait(0.2)
game.ReplicatedStorage.WarpHt:FireServer(Target.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"))
task.wait(0.15)
if workspace.DEATHBARRIER.CanTouch == true then
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = game:GetService("Workspace").DEATHBARRIER.CFrame
workspace.DEATHBARRIER.CanTouch = true
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = game:GetService("Workspace").DEATHBARRIER.CFrame
end
wait(0.1)
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").WLOC:FireServer()
wait(0.2)
workspace.DEATHBARRIER.CanTouch = OldTouch
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Warp",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
  	end    
})

    Name = "Bob"

AutoGetBobGlove = Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Instant Spawn 75k Clones (Need God Hand)",
    Callback = function()
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Slaps.Value >= 65000 then
fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["God's Hand"].ClickDetector)
task.wait(.3)
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.Lobby.Teleport1.CFrame
wait(1)
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").TimestopJump:FireServer()
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Timestopchoir:FireServer()
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Timestop:FireServer()
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health = 0
task.wait(8)
fireclickdetector(game:GetService("Workspace").Lobby.Replica.ClickDetector)
wait(1)
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.Lobby.Teleport1.CFrame
task.wait(1)
for i = 1, 75000 do
        game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Duplicate:FireServer(unpack({[1] = true}))
end
wait(2)
--PC Support
loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Jelly-plays/Rejoin-script/main/obf_L744By559M18BbuseSG6en8r1zL31daK9060LV7WyvmS4bQp92aONWfwRE36FdcZ.lua.txt"))();
--Mobile Support
--[[ This script isn't mine but idk how to create one so i use this instead ]]-- 
local AllIDs = {}
local foundAnything = ""
local actualHour = os.date("!*t").hour
local Deleted = false
local S_T = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local S_H = game:GetService("HttpService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local File = pcall(function()
    AllIDs = S_H:JSONDecode(readfile("server-hop-temp.json"))
end)
if not File then
    table.insert(AllIDs, actualHour)
    pcall(function()
        writefile("server-hop-temp.json", S_H:JSONEncode(AllIDs))
    end)
end

local function TPReturner(placeId)
    local Site
    if foundAnything == "" then
        Site = S_H:JSONDecode(game:HttpGet('https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/' .. placeId .. '/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100'))
    else
        Site = S_H:JSONDecode(game:HttpGet('https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/' .. placeId .. '/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100&cursor=' .. foundAnything))
    end

    local ID = ""
    if Site.nextPageCursor and Site.nextPageCursor ~= "null" and Site.nextPageCursor ~= nil then
        foundAnything = Site.nextPageCursor
    end

    local num = 0
    local foundServer = false 

    for i, v in pairs(Site.data) do
        local Possible = true
        ID = tostring(v.id)
        if tonumber(v.maxPlayers) > tonumber(v.playing) then
            for _, Existing in pairs(AllIDs) do
                if num ~= 0 then
                    if ID == tostring(Existing) then
                        Possible = false
                    end
                else
                    if tonumber(actualHour) ~= tonumber(Existing) then
                        local delFile = pcall(function()
                            delfile("server-hop-temp.json")
                            AllIDs = {}
                            table.insert(AllIDs, actualHour)
                        end)
                    end
                end
                num = num + 1
            end
            if Possible == true then
                table.insert(AllIDs, ID)
                foundServer = true
                wait()
                pcall(function()
                    writefile("server-hop-temp.json", S_H:JSONEncode(AllIDs))
                    wait()
                    S_T:TeleportToPlaceInstance(placeId, ID, Players.LocalPlayer)
                end)
                wait(4)
            end
        end
    end

    -- if not found server
    if not foundServer then
        game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(game.PlaceId)
    end
end

local module = {}
function module:Teleport(placeId)
    while wait() do
        pcall(function()
            TPReturner(placeId)
            if foundAnything ~= "" then
                TPReturner(placeId)
            end
        end)
    end
end


module:Teleport(game.PlaceId)
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "65000+ Slaps Required",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
task.wait(0.05)
AutoGetBobGlove:Set(false)
end
end
})

    Name = "Instant Spawn 75k Clones (God Hand Uses Your Friend/Alt)",
    Callback = function()
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Replica" then
wait(0.1)
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.Lobby.Teleport1.CFrame
task.wait(1)
for i = 1, 75000 do
        game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Duplicate:FireServer(unpack({[1] = true}))
end
wait(9)

--[[ This script isn't mine but idk how to create one so i use this instead ]]-- 
local AllIDs = {}
local foundAnything = ""
local actualHour = os.date("!*t").hour
local Deleted = false
local S_T = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local S_H = game:GetService("HttpService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local File = pcall(function()
    AllIDs = S_H:JSONDecode(readfile("server-hop-temp.json"))
end)
if not File then
    table.insert(AllIDs, actualHour)
    pcall(function()
        writefile("server-hop-temp.json", S_H:JSONEncode(AllIDs))
    end)
end

local function TPReturner(placeId)
    local Site
    if foundAnything == "" then
        Site = S_H:JSONDecode(game:HttpGet('https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/' .. placeId .. '/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100'))
    else
        Site = S_H:JSONDecode(game:HttpGet('https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/' .. placeId .. '/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100&cursor=' .. foundAnything))
    end

    local ID = ""
    if Site.nextPageCursor and Site.nextPageCursor ~= "null" and Site.nextPageCursor ~= nil then
        foundAnything = Site.nextPageCursor
    end

    local num = 0
    local foundServer = false 

    for i, v in pairs(Site.data) do
        local Possible = true
        ID = tostring(v.id)
        if tonumber(v.maxPlayers) > tonumber(v.playing) then
            for _, Existing in pairs(AllIDs) do
                if num ~= 0 then
                    if ID == tostring(Existing) then
                        Possible = false
                    end
                else
                    if tonumber(actualHour) ~= tonumber(Existing) then
                        local delFile = pcall(function()
                            delfile("server-hop-temp.json")
                            AllIDs = {}
                            table.insert(AllIDs, actualHour)
                        end)
                    end
                end
                num = num + 1
            end
            if Possible == true then
                table.insert(AllIDs, ID)
                foundServer = true
                wait()
                pcall(function()
                    writefile("server-hop-temp.json", S_H:JSONEncode(AllIDs))
                    wait()
                    S_T:TeleportToPlaceInstance(placeId, ID, Players.LocalPlayer)
                end)
                wait(4)
            end
        end
    end

    -- if not found server
    if not foundServer then
        game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(game.PlaceId)
    end
end

local module = {}
function module:Teleport(placeId)
    while wait() do
        pcall(function()
            TPReturner(placeId)
            if foundAnything ~= "" then
                TPReturner(placeId)
            end
        end)
    end
end

module:Teleport(game.PlaceId)
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Replica Glove",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end

-- === Auto Teleport To SR Place + Get Chain Button ===
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To SR Place + Get Chain",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 9431156611
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        -- Flag to prevent multiple teleports
        local isTeleporting = false
        
        -- Function to execute the Chain script
        local function executeChainScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                game.Loaded:Wait()
            end

            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Credits to Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Made by @nexer1234 ( youtube & discord )",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 5
            })

            if getgenv().AutoGetChainExecuted == true then return end

            if getgenv or getgenv() then
                getgenv().AutoGetChainExecuted = true
            end

            if game.PlaceId == 9431156611 then
                local code = getCodeFromImages()
                
                print("Chain Code:", code)
                
                if not code or code:len() ~= 4 or code:find("[^0-9]") then
                    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                        Title = "Error",
                        Text = "Invalid code: " .. tostring(code),
                        Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                        Duration = 5
                    })
                    return
                end

                if not workspace:FindFirstChild("Map") then
                    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                        Title = "Error",
                        Text = "Map not found!",
                        Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                        Duration = 5
                    })
                    return
                end

                -- FIXED PATH: workspace.Map.OriginOffice.CodeDoor.Door.Keypad.Buttons
                local buttons = workspace.Map.OriginOffice.CodeDoor.Door.Keypad.Buttons

                if not buttons then
                    game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                        Title = "Error",
                        Text = "Keypad buttons not found!",
                        Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                        Duration = 5
                    })
                    return
                end

                -- Reset button
                local resetButton = buttons:FindFirstChild("Reset")
                if resetButton then
                    local resetDetector = resetButton:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                    if resetDetector then
                        fireclickdetector(resetDetector)
                        task.wait(0.25)
                    end
                end

                -- Enter code digits
                for i = 1, 4 do
                    local digit = code:sub(i, i)
                    local button = buttons:FindFirstChild(digit)
                    if button then
                        local digitDetector = button:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                        if digitDetector then
                            fireclickdetector(digitDetector)
                            task.wait(0.25)
                        end
                    end
                end

                -- Enter button
                local enterButton = buttons:FindFirstChild("Enter")
                if enterButton then
                    local enterDetector = enterButton:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                    if enterDetector then
                        fireclickdetector(enterDetector)
                        
                        game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                            Title = "Success!",
                            Text = "Chain sequence completed! Teleporting to Slap Battles...",
                            Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                            Duration = 5
                        })
                        
                        task.wait(2)
                        
                        -- Teleport to Slap Battles (ONLY ONCE)
                        if not isTeleporting then
                            isTeleporting = true
                            game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(6403373529)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        -- Function to set up teleport monitoring
        local function setupTeleportMonitor()
            local connection
            connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    local chainScript = [[
                        local function getCodeFromImages()
                            local digits = {}
                            local imageToDigit = {
                                ["9648769161"] = "4", ["9648765536"] = "2", ["9648762863"] = "3",
                                ["9648759883"] = "9", ["9648755440"] = "8", ["9648752438"] = "2",
                                ["9648749145"] = "8", ["9648745618"] = "3", ["9648742013"] = "7",
                                ["9648738553"] = "8", ["9648734698"] = "2", ["9648730082"] = "6",
                                ["9648723237"] = "3", ["9648718450"] = "6", ["9648715920"] = "6",
                                ["9648712563"] = "2"
                            }

                            if not workspace:FindFirstChild("Map") or not workspace.Map:FindFirstChild("CodeBrick") then
                                return "CodeBrick not found"
                            end

                            local imageObjects = {}
                            for _, obj in pairs(workspace.Map.CodeBrick.SurfaceGui:GetChildren()) do
                                if obj:IsA("ImageLabel") or obj.Name == "IMGTemplate" then
                                    local imageId = obj.Image:match("id=(%d+)")
                                    if imageId and imageToDigit[imageId] then
                                        table.insert(imageObjects, {
                                            object = obj,
                                            digit = imageToDigit[imageId]
                                        })
                                    end
                                end
                            end

                            if #imageObjects >= 4 then
                                for i = 1, 4 do
                                    digits[i] = imageObjects[i].digit
                                end
                                return table.concat(digits)
                            else
                                return "Not enough images found"
                            end
                        end

                        if not game:IsLoaded() then
                            game.Loaded:Wait()
                        end
                        task.wait(3)
                        
                        if game.PlaceId == 9431156611 then
                            local code = getCodeFromImages()
                            
                            if not code or code:len() ~= 4 or code:find("[^0-9]") then
                                return
                            end

                            if not workspace:FindFirstChild("Map") then return end
                            
                            -- FIXED PATH: workspace.Map.OriginOffice.CodeDoor.Door.Keypad.Buttons
                            local buttons = workspace.Map.OriginOffice.CodeDoor.Door.Keypad.Buttons
                            if not buttons then return end

                            local resetButton = buttons:FindFirstChild("Reset")
                            if resetButton then
                                local resetDetector = resetButton:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                                if resetDetector then
                                    fireclickdetector(resetDetector)
                                    task.wait(0.25)
                                end
                            end

                            for i = 1, 4 do
                                local digit = code:sub(i, i)
                                local button = buttons:FindFirstChild(digit)
                                if button then
                                    local digitDetector = button:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                                    if digitDetector then
                                        fireclickdetector(digitDetector)
                                        task.wait(0.25)
                                    end
                                end
                            end

                            local enterButton = buttons:FindFirstChild("Enter")
                            if enterButton then
                                local enterDetector = enterButton:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                                if enterDetector then
                                    fireclickdetector(enterDetector)
                                    task.wait(20)
                                    if not getgenv()._teleporting then
                                        getgenv()._teleporting = true
                                        game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(6403373529)
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    ]]
                    
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(chainScript)
                    else
                        queue_on_teleport(chainScript)
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            return connection
        end

        -- Main execution logic
        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            print("Already in target place - executing Chain script")
            executeChainScript()
        else
            print("Teleporting to target game...")
            local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
            
            if not isTeleporting then
                isTeleporting = true
                local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
                local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                    TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId)
                end)
                
                if not success then
                    print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
                    isTeleporting = false
                    if connection then
                        connection:Disconnect()
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddSection({
    Name = "Plate Master"
})

_G.AutoTpPlate = false

AutoTycoon = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Plate",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        _G.AutoTpPlate = Value
        
        if Value then
            if hasEntered() and getTotalPlayers() >= 7 then
                isAutoPlating = true
                plateStarted = true
                plateStopped = false
                plateFinished = false
                plateStartTime = tick()
                plateElapsedTime = 0
                savedStoppedTime = nil
                
                if autoPlateLoop then
                    task.cancel(autoPlateLoop)
                end
                
                autoPlateLoop = task.spawn(function()
                    while _G.AutoTpPlate and isAutoPlating and not plateFinished do
                        -- Check conditions
                        if not hasEntered() or getTotalPlayers() < 7 then
                            -- Conditions failed - stop the toggle
                            if getTotalPlayers() < 7 then
                                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                                    Name = "Auto Plate",
                                    Content = "Not enough players! Need 7+ players.",
                                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                                    Time = 3
                                })
                            elseif not hasEntered() then
                                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                                    Name = "Auto Plate",
                                    Content = "You need to enter the arena!",
                                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                                    Time = 3
                                })
                            end
                            _G.AutoTpPlate = false
                            AutoTycoon:Set(false)
                            isAutoPlating = false
                            plateStopped = true
                            plateStarted = false
                            break
                        end
                        
                        -- Teleport to plate
                        pcall(function()
                            local char = player.Character
                            if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                local plate = workspace:FindFirstChild("Arena") and workspace.Arena:FindFirstChild("Plate")
                                if plate and plate:IsA("BasePart") then
                                    char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = plate.CFrame
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                        task.wait()
                    end
                end)
                
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Auto Plate",
                    Content = "Started! Will run for 10 minutes",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
            else
                local errorMsg = ""
                if not hasEntered() then
                    errorMsg = "You Need Enter Arena"
                elseif getTotalPlayers() < 7 then
                    errorMsg = "7+ People In Server Required (Current: " .. getTotalPlayers() .. ")"
                end
                
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                task.wait(0.05)
                AutoTycoon:Set(false)
                _G.AutoTpPlate = false
            end
        else
            if autoPlateLoop then
                task.cancel(autoPlateLoop)
                autoPlateLoop = nil
            end
            isAutoPlating = false
            plateStopped = true
            plateStarted = false
            savedStoppedTime = plateElapsedTime
            
        end
    end    
})

Tab:AddSection({
    Name = "EXPOSED"
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To ? Place + Auto TP To Glove",
    Callback = function()
local targetPlaceId = 11828384869
local targetPosition = Vector3.new(-503, 19, -179)
local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId

-- Check if this is the first execution or a re-execution
local isReExecution = false

-- Function to teleport to position
local function teleportToPosition()
    local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
    if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(targetPosition)
        print("Teleported to target position!")
    end
end

-- Function to set up teleport monitoring
local function setupTeleportMonitor()
    local connection
    connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
        if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
            -- Save the script to re-execute after teleport
            local teleportScript = [[
                wait(2) -- Wait for character to load
                local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(Vector3.new(-503, 19, -179))
                    print("Auto-executed teleport after arrival!")
                end
            ]]
            
            -- Use syn.queue_on_teleport or queue_on_teleport depending on executor
            if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                syn.queue_on_teleport(teleportScript)
            else
                queue_on_teleport(teleportScript)
            end
        end
    end)
    
    return connection
end

-- Main execution logic
if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
    -- We're in the target place
    if isReExecution then
        print("Re-execution detected - performing final teleport")
        teleportToPosition()
        print("Auto-execution complete. Script will not run again automatically.")
    else
        -- First execution in target place
        print("First execution in target place - teleporting")
        teleportToPosition()
        
        -- Set up for potential future teleports
        setupTeleportMonitor()
    end
else
    -- We're not in the target place, teleport to the game
    print("Teleporting to target game...")
    local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
    
    local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
    local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
        TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId)
    end)
    
    if not success then
        print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
        if connection then
            connection:Disconnect()
        end
    end
end
    end
})

  	end

Tab:AddSection({
    Name = "Da Maze Runner"
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To ? Place + Auto Get Counter",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 11828384869
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        -- Function to execute the Counter script
        local function executeCounterScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
            if getgenv().AutoGetCounterExecuted then return end

            getgenv().AutoGetCounterExecuted = true

            if game.PlaceId == 11828384869 then
                for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("ClickDetector") then
                        fireclickdetector(v)
                    end
                end

                local hrp = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
                hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(1000, 1000, 1000)
                task.wait(0.6)
                hrp.Anchored = true

                local Time = 120
                while Time > 0 do
                    local msg = Instance.new("Message", workspace)
                    msg.Text = "Time left to receive: " .. Time
                    task.wait(1)
                    Time -= 1
                    msg:Destroy()
                end

                task.wait(1.5)

                for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("ClickDetector") then
                        fireclickdetector(v)
                    end
                end
            else
                local places = {
                    11520107397, 9015014224, 6403373529, 124596094333302
                }

                for _, id in ipairs(places) do
                    if game.PlaceId == id then
                        while task.wait() do
                            game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(11828384869)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        -- Function to set up teleport monitoring
        local function setupTeleportMonitor()
            local connection
            connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    -- Save the Counter script to re-execute after teleport
                    local counterScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
                        task.wait(3)
                        
                        -- Execute Counter script after arriving
                        if game.PlaceId == 11828384869 then
                            for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v:IsA("ClickDetector") then
                                    fireclickdetector(v)
                                end
                            end

                            local hrp = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
                            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(1000, 1000, 1000)
                            task.wait(0.6)
                            hrp.Anchored = true

                            local Time = 120
                            while Time > 0 do
                                local msg = Instance.new("Message", workspace)
                                msg.Text = "Time left to receive: " .. Time
                                task.wait(1)
                                Time -= 1
                                msg:Destroy()
                            end

                            task.wait(1.5)

                            for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v:IsA("ClickDetector") then
                                    fireclickdetector(v)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    ]]
                    
                    -- Use syn.queue_on_teleport or queue_on_teleport depending on executor
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(counterScript)
                    else
                        queue_on_teleport(counterScript)
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            return connection
        end

        -- Main execution logic
        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            -- We're already in the target place, execute Counter script directly
            print("Already in target place - executing Counter script")
            executeCounterScript()
        else
            -- We're not in the target place, teleport to the game
            print("Teleporting to target game...")
            local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId)
            end)
            
            if not success then
                print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
                if connection then
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddSection({

})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Apply Plague Effect To All Players (5+ Players Required)",
	Callback = function()   
		if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Plague" then
			-- Check if server has 5+ players
			local allPlayers = game.Players:GetPlayers()
			if #allPlayers < 5 then
				OrionLib:MakeNotification({
					Name = "Error",
					Content = "Need 5+ Players in server! Current: " .. #allPlayers,
					Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
					Time = 3
				})
				return
			end
			
			-- SERVICES
			local Players = game:GetService("Players")
			local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
			
			-- CONSTANTS & CONFIG
			local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
			
			-- ALL BODY PARTS (R6 + R15)
			local BODY_PARTS = {
				"Head",
				"UpperTorso",
				"LowerTorso",
				"LeftUpperArm",
				"LeftLowerArm",
				"LeftHand",
				"RightUpperArm",
				"RightLowerArm",
				"RightHand",
				"LeftUpperLeg",
				"LeftLowerLeg",
				"LeftFoot",
				"RightUpperLeg",
				"RightLowerLeg",
				"RightFoot",
				-- R6 fallback
				"Torso",
				"Left Arm",
				"Right Arm",
				"Left Leg",
				"Right Leg"
			}
			
			-- Get the remote
			local PlagueHitRemote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlagueHit")
			
			if not PlagueHitRemote then
				OrionLib:MakeNotification({
					Name = "Error",
					Content = "PlagueHit remote not found!",
					Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
					Time = 3
				})
				return
			end
			
			-- Fire PlagueHit on all players except local
			local playerCount = 0
			for _, player in ipairs(allPlayers) do
				-- Skip local player
				if player ~= LocalPlayer then
					local character = player.Character
					if character then
						-- Fire on all body parts
						for _, partName in ipairs(BODY_PARTS) do
							local part = character:FindFirstChild(partName)
							if part then
								PlagueHitRemote:FireServer(part)
							end
						end
						playerCount = playerCount + 1
					end
				end
			end
			
			OrionLib:MakeNotification({
				Name = "Success",
				Content = "Plague effect applied to " .. playerCount .. " players!",
				Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
				Time = 3
			})
			
		else
			OrionLib:MakeNotification({
				Name = "Error",
				Content = "Equip Plague Glove",
				Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
				Time = 3
			})
		end
	end
})

Tab:AddSection({

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Collect Treasure",
    Callback = function()
        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        
        -- Check if player has entered and has the quest active
        local hasEntered = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("entered")
        local hasQuest = player.Quests and player.Quests.QuestsActive and player.Quests.QuestsActive["_questChainHitmansHandkerchief"] and player.Quests.QuestsActive["_questChainHitmansHandkerchief"].Value == true
        
        if hasEntered and hasQuest then
            -- Teleport to position
            player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(289, 13, 261)
            task.wait(0.1)
            
            -- Fire DigEvent
            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").DigEvent:FireServer({
                ["index"] = 2,
                ["cf"] = CFrame.new(42.7222366, -6.17449856, 91.5175781, -0.414533257, 1.72594355e-05, -0.91003418, -5.57037238e-05, 1, 4.4339522e-05, 0.91003418, 6.90724992e-05, -0.414533257)
            })
            
            -- Wait for TreasureChest to appear
            local attempts = 0
            local chestFound = false
            while attempts < 50 do
                if workspace:FindFirstChild("TreasureChestFolder") and workspace.TreasureChestFolder:FindFirstChild("TreasureChest") then
                    chestFound = true
                    break
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
                attempts = attempts + 1
            end
            
            if chestFound then
                -- Open the chest
                workspace.TreasureChestFolder.TreasureChest.OpenRemote:FireServer()
                task.wait(0.2)
                
                -- Reset player
                game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Reset:FireServer()
                task.wait(3.75)
                
                -- Teleport to BountyHunterRoom
                local bountyBooth = workspace:FindFirstChild("BountyHunterRoom")
                if bountyBooth then
                    local booth = bountyBooth:FindFirstChild("BountyHunterBooth")
                    if booth then
                        local configPart = booth:FindFirstChild("_configPart")
                        if configPart then
                            player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = configPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(-5, 0, 0)
                        end
                    end
                end
                
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Success!",
                    Content = "Treasure collected!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
            else
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "TreasureChest not found!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 3
                })
            end
        else
            local errorMsg = ""
            if not hasEntered then
                errorMsg = "Enter Arena First"
            elseif not hasQuest then
                errorMsg = "Accept Hitman's Handkerchief Quest First"
            end
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = errorMsg,
                Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Get Knockoff Glove",
    Callback = function()

    local buttonsToPress = {4, 5, 5, 3, 2, 9, 3}
    local foundRoom = false

    for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
        local character = player.Character
        if character and character:FindFirstChild("entered") then
            local roomName = player.Name .. "'s Room"
            local room = workspace.RoomsFolder:FindFirstChild(roomName)

            if room and room:FindFirstChild("PocketKeypad") then
                local keypad = room.PocketKeypad
                local buttons = keypad:FindFirstChild("Buttons")

                if buttons then
                    foundRoom = true

                    -- Press each number in the sequence
                    for _, num in ipairs(buttonsToPress) do
                        local button = buttons:FindFirstChild(tostring(num))
                        if button then
                            local cd = button:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                            if cd then
                                fireclickdetector(cd)
                                wait(0.15)
                            end
                        end
                    end

                    -- Press Enter
                    local enterButton = buttons:FindFirstChild("Enter")
                    if enterButton then
                        local cd = enterButton:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                        if cd then
                            fireclickdetector(cd)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    if not foundRoom then
        OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "No one is in the arena!",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
    end
end
})

Tab:AddSection({
    Name = "Ice Essence"
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Ice Trials Place + Get Ice Essence",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 17290438723
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        -- Function to execute the item script
        local function executeItemScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                game.Loaded:Wait()
            end

            -- Credits, message is not squished up cuz it looks bad
            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Credits to Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Made by @nexer1234 ( youtube & discord )",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 36000,
                Button1 = "Thanks!"
            })

            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Please re-execute script after teleporting",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 36000,
                Button1 = "Oh..."
            })

            if game.PlaceId == 17290438723 then
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-555, 180, 55)
                wait(1)
                for i,v in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v.ClassName == "ProximityPrompt" then
                        if v.HoldDuration ~= 0 then
                            v.HoldDuration = 0
                        end
                        if v.RequiresLineOfSight ~= false then
                            v.RequiresLineOfSight = false
                        end
                        if v.MaxActivationDistance ~= 9e9 then
                            v.MaxActivationDistance = 9e9
                        end
                        v.Enabled = true
                        fireproximityprompt(v)
                    end
                end
                
            elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(17290438723) end
            else
                game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                    Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                    Text = "Wrong game buddy",
                    Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                    Duration = 36000,
                    Button1 = "Oh..."
                })
            end
        end

        -- Function to set up teleport monitoring
        local function setupTeleportMonitor()
            local connection
            connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    -- Save the script to re-execute after teleport
                    local itemScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then
                            game.Loaded:Wait()
                        end
                        task.wait(3)
                        
                        if game.PlaceId == 17290438723 then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-555, 180, 55)
                            wait(1)
                            for i,v in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v.ClassName == "ProximityPrompt" then
                                    if v.HoldDuration ~= 0 then
                                        v.HoldDuration = 0
                                    end
                                    if v.RequiresLineOfSight ~= false then
                                        v.RequiresLineOfSight = false
                                    end
                                    if v.MaxActivationDistance ~= 9e9 then
                                        v.MaxActivationDistance = 9e9
                                    end
                                    v.Enabled = true
                                    fireproximityprompt(v)
                                end
                            end
                        elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                            while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(17290438723) end
                        end
                    ]]
                    
                    -- Use syn.queue_on_teleport or queue_on_teleport depending on executor
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(itemScript)
                    else
                        queue_on_teleport(itemScript)
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            return connection
        end

        -- Main execution logic
        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            -- We're already in the target place, execute item script
            print("Already in target place - executing item script")
            executeItemScript()
        else
            -- We're not in the target place, teleport to the game
            print("Teleporting to target game...")
            local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId)
            end)
            
            if not success then
                print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
                if connection then
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

    Name = "Cranking 90's"

Tab:AddSection({
    Name = "SLAP BATTLES SWEEP"
})

_G.AutoTycoon = false

AutoClickTycoon = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Click Tycoon",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        _G.AutoTycoon = Value
        isAutoClicking = Value
        
        if Value then
            pointsStarted = true
            pointsStopped = false
            pointsFinished = false
            pointsWaiting = false
            
            if autoClickLoop then
                task.cancel(autoClickLoop)
                autoClickLoop = nil
            end
            
            autoClickLoop = task.spawn(function()
                while _G.AutoTycoon do
                    -- Check if points reached required amount
                    local currentPoints = getCurrentPoints()
                    if currentPoints >= requiredPoints then
                        pointsFinished = true
                        pointsStarted = false
                        _G.AutoTycoon = false
                        AutoClickTycoon:Set(false)
                        
                        OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                            Name = "Tycoon",
                            Content = "Goal reached! " .. currentPoints .. "/" .. requiredPoints .. " points!",
                            Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                            Time = 5
                        })
                        break
                    end
                    
                    pcall(function()
                        local tycoon = findTycoon()
                        if tycoon then
                            local clickPart = tycoon:FindFirstChild("Click")
                            if clickPart and clickPart:IsA("BasePart") then
                                local detector = clickPart:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                                if detector then
                                    fireclickdetector(detector)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait()
                end
            end)
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Click Tycoon",
                Content = "Started! Need " .. requiredPoints .. " points",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            if autoClickLoop then
                task.cancel(autoClickLoop)
                autoClickLoop = nil
            end
            pointsStopped = true
            pointsStarted = false

        end
    end
})
