-- Metaverse Button
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To CEO Place (NOT AUTO GETS GLOVE)",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 7234087065
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        local function executeMetaverseScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end

            if game.PlaceId == 136005148166028 then
                game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                    Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                    Text = "Please don't move and don't touch anything!",
                    Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                    Duration = 36000,
                    Button1 = "Ok i guess."
                })

                local Platform = (game.UserInputService.TouchEnabled and not game.UserInputService.MouseEnabled) and "Mobile" or "PC"
                fireclickdetector(workspace.Kitchen.Fridge.HitBox.ClickDetector)
                task.wait(1)
                fireclickdetector(workspace.Kitchen.Fridge.GrantAward.ClickDetector)
                task.wait(1)
                fireclickdetector(workspace.Microwave.HitBox.ClickDetector)
                task.wait(10)
                fireclickdetector(workspace.Microwave.HitBox.ClickDetector)
                task.wait(1)
                fireclickdetector(workspace.Microwave.Brewzucki.ClickDetector)
                task.wait()
                repeat task.wait() until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Brewzucki")
                task.wait()
                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Brewzucki") then
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:EquipTool(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack["Brewzucki"])
                    task.wait(1)
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character["Brewzucki"]:Activate()
                    task.wait(2)
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:UnequipTools()
                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Brewzucki") then
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack["Brewzucki"]:Destroy()
                    else
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character["Brewzucki"]:Destroy()
                    end
                else
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character["Brewzucki"]:Activate()
                    task.wait(2)
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:UnequipTools()
                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Brewzucki") then
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack["Brewzucki"]:Destroy()
                    else
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character["Brewzucki"]:Destroy()
                    end
                end
                task.wait(5)
                fireclickdetector(workspace.BasementTable.HitBox.ClickDetector)
                task.wait(15)
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.ComputerChair.Seat.CFrame
                task.wait(5)
                local start = tick()
                while tick() - start < 30 do
                    for i,v in pairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.RealComputerScreenGui.ComputerScreen.SuggestionsQTE:GetChildren()) do
                        if v and v.Name:find("Popup_") then
                            v.Position = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.RealComputerScreenGui.ComputerScreen.SuggestionsQTE.RecyclingBin.Position
                        end
                    end
                    task.wait()
                end
                task.wait(2)
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Remotes.ComputerState:FireServer("Victory")
                task.wait(.25)
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Remotes.ComputerState:Destroy()
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.RealComputerScreenGui.Enabled = false
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Sit = false
                task.wait(1.5)
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-14,37,49)
                task.wait(2)
                repeat task.wait()
                    if Platform == "Mobile" then
                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.Mobile.SpawnArea:FindFirstChild("TapLabel") then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.Mobile.SpawnArea.TapLabel.Size = UDim2.new(10000, 0, 10000, 0)
                            game:GetService("VirtualUser"):CaptureController()
                            game:GetService("VirtualUser"):ClickButton1(Vector2.new())
                        end
                    elseif Platform == "PC" then
                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.PC.QuickTimeLabel.Visible == true then
                            game:GetService("VirtualInputManager"):SendKeyEvent(true, game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.PC.QuickTimeLabel.Text, false, game:GetService("VirtualInputManager"))
                        end
                    end
                until game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.ScoreLabel.Text == "Score: 150"
            elseif game.PlaceId == 7234087065 then
                repeat task.wait() game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(250, 95, -62830) until workspace.Buildings:FindFirstChild("wizard twoer 2")
                task.wait(1.5)
                while task.wait() do
                    for i,v in pairs(workspace.Buildings["wizard twoer 2"]:GetChildren()) do
                        if v.Name == "Model" and v:FindFirstChild("Trigger") then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v:FindFirstChild("Trigger").CFrame
                        end
                    end
                end
            elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(7234087065) end
            end
        end

        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId or currentPlaceId == 136005148166028 then
            executeMetaverseScript()
        else
            local connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    local metaverseScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
                        task.wait(3)
                        if game.PlaceId == 136005148166028 then
                            local Platform = (game.UserInputService.TouchEnabled and not game.UserInputService.MouseEnabled) and "Mobile" or "PC"
                            fireclickdetector(workspace.Kitchen.Fridge.HitBox.ClickDetector)
                            task.wait(1)
                            fireclickdetector(workspace.Kitchen.Fridge.GrantAward.ClickDetector)
                            task.wait(1)
                            fireclickdetector(workspace.Microwave.HitBox.ClickDetector)
                            task.wait(10)
                            fireclickdetector(workspace.Microwave.HitBox.ClickDetector)
                            task.wait(1)
                            fireclickdetector(workspace.Microwave.Brewzucki.ClickDetector)
                            task.wait()
                            repeat task.wait() until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Brewzucki")
                            task.wait()
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Brewzucki") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:EquipTool(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack["Brewzucki"])
                                task.wait(1)
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character["Brewzucki"]:Activate()
                                task.wait(2)
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:UnequipTools()
                                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Brewzucki") then
                                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack["Brewzucki"]:Destroy()
                                else
                                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character["Brewzucki"]:Destroy()
                                end
                            else
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character["Brewzucki"]:Activate()
                                task.wait(2)
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:UnequipTools()
                                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Brewzucki") then
                                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack["Brewzucki"]:Destroy()
                                else
                                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character["Brewzucki"]:Destroy()
                                end
                            end
                            task.wait(5)
                            fireclickdetector(workspace.BasementTable.HitBox.ClickDetector)
                            task.wait(15)
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.ComputerChair.Seat.CFrame
                            task.wait(5)
                            local start = tick()
                            while tick() - start < 30 do
                                for i,v in pairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.RealComputerScreenGui.ComputerScreen.SuggestionsQTE:GetChildren()) do
                                    if v and v.Name:find("Popup_") then
                                        v.Position = game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.RealComputerScreenGui.ComputerScreen.SuggestionsQTE.RecyclingBin.Position
                                    end
                                end
                                task.wait()
                            end
                            task.wait(2)
                            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Remotes.ComputerState:FireServer("Victory")
                            task.wait(.25)
                            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Remotes.ComputerState:Destroy()
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.RealComputerScreenGui.Enabled = false
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Sit = false
                            task.wait(1.5)
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-14,37,49)
                            task.wait(2)
                            repeat task.wait()
                                if Platform == "Mobile" then
                                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.Mobile.SpawnArea:FindFirstChild("TapLabel") then
                                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.Mobile.SpawnArea.TapLabel.Size = UDim2.new(10000, 0, 10000, 0)
                                        game:GetService("VirtualUser"):CaptureController()
                                        game:GetService("VirtualUser"):ClickButton1(Vector2.new())
                                    end
                                elseif Platform == "PC" then
                                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.PC.QuickTimeLabel.Visible == true then
                                        game:GetService("VirtualInputManager"):SendKeyEvent(true, game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.PC.QuickTimeLabel.Text, false, game:GetService("VirtualInputManager"))
                                    end
                                end
                            until game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.DavidShrineQTE.DavidShrineQTE.ScoreLabel.Text == "Score: 150"
                        elseif game.PlaceId == 7234087065 then
                            repeat task.wait() game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(250, 95, -62830) until workspace.Buildings:FindFirstChild("wizard twoer 2")
                            task.wait(1.5)
                            while task.wait() do
                                for i,v in pairs(workspace.Buildings["wizard twoer 2"]:GetChildren()) do
                                    if v.Name == "Model" and v:FindFirstChild("Trigger") then
                                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v:FindFirstChild("Trigger").CFrame
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    ]]
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then syn.queue_on_teleport(metaverseScript) else queue_on_teleport(metaverseScript) end
                end
            end)
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success = pcall(function() TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId) end)
            if not success and connection then connection:Disconnect() end
        end
    end
})

-- Suction Button with Auto-Execute
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Obby Place + Get Suction",
    Callback = function()
        local firstPlaceId = 6403373529
        local secondPlaceId = 89837553336708
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        local function executeSuctionScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
            if getgenv().AutoGetSuctionExecuted then return end
            getgenv().AutoGetSuctionExecuted = true

            if game.PlaceId == secondPlaceId then
                -- Second place: Obby Place - Load the suction script
                loadstring(game:HttpGet('https://pastefy.app/faY5eqRD/raw'))()
                
            elseif game.PlaceId == firstPlaceId or game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlayId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                -- First place: Slap Battles - Click plungers and teleport
                if workspace:FindFirstChild("BountyHunterRoom") and workspace.BountyHunterRoom:FindFirstChild("PlungerMain") and workspace.BountyHunterRoom.PlungerMain:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector") then
                    fireclickdetector(workspace.BountyHunterRoom.PlungerMain.ClickDetector)
                end
                
                if workspace:FindFirstChild("plungers") and workspace.plungers:FindFirstChild("ToiletPlunger") and workspace.plungers.ToiletPlunger:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector") then
                    fireclickdetector(workspace.plungers.ToiletPlunger.ClickDetector)
                end
                
                task.wait(2)
                game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(secondPlaceId)
            end
        end

        -- Function to set up teleport monitoring
        local function setupTeleportMonitor()
            local connection
            connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    local suctionScript = [[
                        getgenv().AutoGetSuctionExecuted = false
                        
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
                        task.wait(3)
                        
                        local secondPlaceId = 89837553336708
                        
                        if game.PlaceId == secondPlaceId then
                            -- Auto-execute in second place
                            loadstring(game:HttpGet('https://pastefy.app/faY5eqRD/raw'))()
                        end
                    ]]
                    
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then 
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(suctionScript)
                    else
                        queue_on_teleport(suctionScript)
                    end
                end
            end)
            return connection
        end

        -- Main execution logic
        if currentPlaceId == firstPlaceId or currentPlaceId == secondPlaceId then
            executeSuctionScript()
        else
            local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(firstPlaceId)
            end)
            
            if not success then
                if connection then
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

    Name = "Out of Bounds"
})

-- Shared variable to store the code
local debugCode = nil

-- First Button: Get Code and store it
Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Get Code",
	Callback = function()
		local code = ""

		-- Path 1: Count "Duck" MeshParts
		local success1, duckCount = pcall(function()
			local ducks = workspace["Debug Room"].DuckTable.DuckTable:GetChildren()
			local count = 0
			for _, obj in ipairs(ducks) do
				if obj:IsA("MeshPart") and obj.Name == "Duck" then
					count += 1
				end
			end
			return count
		end)
		code = code .. (success1 and tostring(duckCount) or "?")

		-- Path 2: AdminNumber Text
		local success2, adminNum = pcall(function()
			local text = workspace["Debug Room"].AdminGloves.GlovesCode.SurfaceGui.AdminNumber.Text
			return tonumber(text) or 0
		end)
		code = code .. (success2 and tostring(adminNum) or "?")

		-- Path 3: MazeNumber Text
		local success3, mazeNum = pcall(function()
			local text = workspace["Debug Room"].Maze.MazePrize.SurfaceGui.MazeNumber.Text
			return tonumber(text) or 0
		end)
		code = code .. (success3 and tostring(mazeNum) or "?")

		-- Path 4: Always 7 (game changed to make last digit always 7)
		local responseNum = 7
		code = code .. tostring(responseNum)

		-- Store code globally
		debugCode = code

		-- Show notification with debug info
		OrionLib:MakeNotification({
			Name = "Code Checker",
			Content = "The Debug Glove Code is: " .. code,
			Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
			Time = 5
		})
		
		-- Print debug info to console
		print("Debug Code Found: " .. code)
		print("Path 1 (Ducks): " .. (success1 and tostring(duckCount) or "FAILED"))
		print("Path 2 (Admin): " .. (success2 and tostring(adminNum) or "FAILED"))
		print("Path 3 (Maze): " .. (success3 and tostring(mazeNum) or "FAILED"))
		print("Path 4 (Fixed): 7")
	end
})

-- Second Button: Use code to press keypad buttons
Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Claim Debug Glove",
	Callback = function()
		if not debugCode or string.find(debugCode, "?") then
			OrionLib:MakeNotification({
				Name = "Error",
				Content = "Code not found or incomplete. Please run the first button again.",
				Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
				Time = 4
			})
			return
		end

		local buttonsModel = workspace["Debug Room"].Keypad.Buttons

		-- Press each number's part
		for digit in debugCode:gmatch("%d") do
			local buttonPart = buttonsModel:FindFirstChild(digit)
			if buttonPart then
				local clickDetector = buttonPart:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
				if clickDetector then
					fireclickdetector(clickDetector)
					wait(0.2) -- small delay to avoid overlaps
				end
			end
		end

		-- Press Enter
		local enterPart = buttonsModel:FindFirstChild("Enter")
		if enterPart then
			local enterClick = enterPart:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
			if enterClick then
				fireclickdetector(enterClick)
			end
		end
		
		OrionLib:MakeNotification({
			Name = "Success",
			Content = "Code entered: " .. debugCode,
			Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
			Time = 4
		})
	end
})

    Name = "Ceramic Panic"

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "MEGAROCK",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
})

-- Variables for tracking
local timeStarted = nil
local timeStopped = nil
local isCounting = false
local isRockActive = false
local totalTimeNeeded = 10 * 60 * 60 -- 10 hours in seconds (36000 Seconds)
local rockStartTime = nil
local isTimerFinished = false
local updateConnection = nil
local currentTimeWaiting = "Waiting for Rock..."
local currentTimeStarted = "Not Started"
local currentTimeStopped = "N/A"
local currentTimeFinished = "Not Finished"
local savedStoppedTime = nil
local isAntiAfkEnabled = false
local autoMegarockEnabled = false
local autoMegarockLoop = nil
local isProcessing = false -- Prevents double firing

-- Badge tracking variables
local ownsReallyBadge = false
local ownsWHYBadge = false
local reallyBadgeAward = "No Glove"
local whyBadgeAward = "MEGAROCK Glove"

-- Badge IDs
local REALLY_BADGE_ID = "2124760923" -- "really?" badge
local WHY_BADGE_ID = "2124807768" -- "WHY" badge (MEGAROCK Glove)

-- SERVICES
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

-- Function to format time (Hours:Minutes:Seconds:Milliseconds)
local function formatTime(seconds, milliseconds)
    local hours = math.floor(seconds / 3600)
    local minutes = math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60)
    local secs = math.floor(seconds % 60)
    local ms = math.floor(milliseconds or 0)
    return string.format("%02d:%02d:%02d:%03d", hours, minutes, secs, ms)
end

-- Function to fetch badges from ReplicatedStorage.PlayerData
local function fetchBadgesFromPlayerData()
    -- Build the path
    local playerData = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if not playerData then
        warn("PlayerData not found in ReplicatedStorage")
        return false
    end
    
    local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(localPlayer.Name)
    if not playerFolder then
        warn("Player folder not found for: " .. localPlayer.Name)
        return false
    end
    
    local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
    if not unlockedBadges then
        warn("UnlockedBadges not found for: " .. localPlayer.Name)
        return false
    end
    
    -- Get the value (format: [2124743766,3713925566983,2124760923,...])
    if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
        local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
        
        if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
            -- Parse the array format [id1, id2, id3]
            -- Remove the brackets [ and ]
            local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
            
            -- Split by commas
            local badgeIds = {}
            for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                -- Remove any whitespace
                local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                table.insert(badgeIds, cleanId)
            end
            
            -- Check if the specific badges are owned
            ownsReallyBadge = false
            ownsWHYBadge = false
            
            for _, id in ipairs(badgeIds) do
                if id == REALLY_BADGE_ID then
                    ownsReallyBadge = true
                elseif id == WHY_BADGE_ID then
                    ownsWHYBadge = true
                end
            end
            
            return true
        end
    end
    
    return false
end

-- Function to update badge statuses
local function updateBadgeStatuses()
    fetchBadgesFromPlayerData()
end

-- Optimized function to check for rock
local function hasRock()
    local character = localPlayer and localPlayer.Character
    if character then
        return character:FindFirstChild("rock") ~= nil
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if diamond glove is EQUIPPED
local function isDiamondEquipped()
    local character = localPlayer and localPlayer.Character
    if character then
        local diamondTool = character:FindFirstChild("Diamond")
        if diamondTool then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if player is in arena
local function isInArena()
    local character = localPlayer and localPlayer.Character
    if character then
        local isInArenaValue = character:FindFirstChild("isInArena")
        if isInArenaValue then
            return isInArenaValue.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to get error message based on conditions (WITH BADGE CHECK)
local function getErrorMessage()
    local diamondEquipped = isDiamondEquipped()
    local inArena = isInArena()
    
    -- Check if player already has MEGAROCK Glove (WHY badge)
    if ownsWHYBadge then
        return "You already have MEGAROCK Glove! (WHY Badge Owned)"
    end
    
    -- Check if player already has rock
    if hasRock() then
        return "Rock is active! Timer is running..."
    end
    
    -- Check conditions for getting rock
    if diamondEquipped and inArena then
        return nil -- No error
    elseif not diamondEquipped and not inArena then
        return "Error - Equip Diamond Glove First / Enter Arena First"
    elseif diamondEquipped and not inArena then
        return "Error - Enter Arena First"
    elseif not diamondEquipped and inArena then
        return "Error - Equip Diamond Glove First"
    end
    
    return "Unknown Error"
end

-- Timer update function (FAST - updates every 0.01 seconds)
local function updateTimerDisplay(paragraph)
    local currentTime = tick()
    local hasRockNow = hasRock()
    local diamondEquipped = isDiamondEquipped()
    local inArena = isInArena()
    local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
    
    -- Time Waiting logic
    if not hasRockNow then
        currentTimeWaiting = "Waiting for Rock..."
    else
        currentTimeWaiting = "Rock Found!"
    end
    
    -- Time Started / Time Stopped / Time Finished logic
    if hasRockNow then
        if not isRockActive then
            isRockActive = true
            rockStartTime = currentTime
            isCounting = true
            isTimerFinished = false
            timeStarted = rockStartTime
            savedStoppedTime = nil
            currentTimeStopped = "N/A"
            currentTimeStarted = formatTime(0, 0)
        end
        
        if isCounting and not isTimerFinished then
            local elapsed = currentTime - rockStartTime
            local milliseconds = (elapsed - math.floor(elapsed)) * 1000
            currentTimeStarted = formatTime(elapsed, milliseconds)
            
            if elapsed >= totalTimeNeeded then
                isTimerFinished = true
                isCounting = false
                currentTimeFinished = formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0)
            end
        elseif isTimerFinished then
            currentTimeFinished = formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0)
            currentTimeStarted = formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0)
        end
    else
        if isRockActive then
            isRockActive = false
            isCounting = false
            savedStoppedTime = currentTimeStarted
            currentTimeStopped = savedStoppedTime
        end
        if savedStoppedTime then
            currentTimeStopped = savedStoppedTime
        end
        if not isRockActive and not hasRockNow then
            isCounting = false
        end
    end
    
    -- Format the paragraph content (WITH badge status)
    local paragraphContent = string.format([[
        MEGAROCK TIMER

Rock Status: %s
Time Started: %s
Time Stopped: %s
Time Finished: %s
Total Time Need: %s
Diamond Equipped: %s
Entered Arena: %s
Anti AFK: %s

        BADGE STATUS

really? Badge: %s
WHY Badge (MEGAROCK): %s

        ERROR STATUS

%s
]], 
    currentTimeWaiting,
    currentTimeStarted,
    currentTimeStopped,
    currentTimeFinished,
    formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0),
    diamondEquipped and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No",
    inArena and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No",
    isAntiAfkEnabled and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No",
    ownsReallyBadge and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No",
    ownsWHYBadge and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No",
    errorMsg or "✅ No Errors - Ready!"
)
    
    pcall(function()
        paragraph:Set(paragraphContent)
    end)
end

-- Create the paragraphs
local RestStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("MEGAROCK Status:", "Loading...")

-- FAST update loop for timer AND badges (every 0.01 seconds)
local isUpdating = true
task.spawn(function()
    while isUpdating do
        local startTime = tick()
        
        -- Update badges
        fetchBadgesFromPlayerData()
        
        -- Update timer display
        updateTimerDisplay(RestStatusParagraph)
        
        local elapsed = tick() - startTime
        local waitTime = math.max(0.001, 0.01 - elapsed)
        task.wait(waitTime)
    end
end)

-- Function to fire rock remote (with cooldown to prevent double firing)
local function fireRockRemote()
    if isProcessing then
        return false
    end
    
    isProcessing = true
    
    pcall(function()
        local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
        local rockmode = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Rockmode")
        if rockmode then
            rockmode:FireServer()
            task.wait(0.5)
        end
    end)
    
    task.wait(1)
    isProcessing = false
    return true
end

-- Auto Megarock Loop
local function startAutoMegarockLoop()
    autoMegarockLoop = task.spawn(function()
        while autoMegarockEnabled do
            pcall(function()
                local hasRockNow = hasRock()
                local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
                
                -- Only try to get rock if no errors
                if errorMsg == nil then
                    if not hasRockNow then
                        if localPlayer and localPlayer.Character and localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-17926, 60, 3531)
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            fireRockRemote()
                            task.wait(0.5)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
            task.wait(3)
        end
    end)
end

AutoMegarock = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Get MEGAROCK Glove",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if autoMegarockEnabled == Value then
            return
        end
        
        autoMegarockEnabled = Value
        
        if Value then
            if hasRock() then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "MEGAROCK",
                    Content = "You already have Rock! Disable the toggle when you want to remove it.",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
            else
                local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
                
                if errorMsg then
                    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                        Name = "MEGAROCK Error!",
                        Content = errorMsg,
                        Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                        Time = 5
                    })
                    AutoMegarock:Set(false)
                    autoMegarockEnabled = false
                    return
                end
                
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "MEGAROCK",
                    Content = "Auto Get MEGAROCK Enabled! Teleporting to position...",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                
                if localPlayer and localPlayer.Character and localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-17926, 60, 3531)
                    task.wait(0.5)
                    fireRockRemote()
                end
                
                if autoMegarockLoop then
                    task.cancel(autoMegarockLoop)
                    autoMegarockLoop = nil
                end
                
                if autoMegarockEnabled then
                    startAutoMegarockLoop()
                end
            end
        else
            if hasRock() then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "MEGAROCK",
                    Content = "Disabling MEGAROCK...",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 2
                })
                fireRockRemote()
            else
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "MEGAROCK",
                    Content = "MEGAROCK Disabled.",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 2
                })
            end
            
            if autoMegarockLoop then
                task.cancel(autoMegarockLoop)
                autoMegarockLoop = nil
            end
        end
    end
})

AntiAfk = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Anti Afk",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        isAntiAfkEnabled = Value
        
        if Value then
            local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
            game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
            end)
        end
    end    
})

-- Cleanup when script stops
game.Players.LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function()
    isUpdating = false
    if autoMegarockLoop then
        task.cancel(autoMegarockLoop)
    end
end)

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Plague",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Someone Using Plague?",
    Callback = function()
        local found = false

        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            if leaderstats then
                local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                if glove and glove.Value == "Plague" then
                    found = true
                    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                        Name = "Detected!",
                        Content = player.Name .. " has equipped the Plague glove.",
                        Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        end

        if not found then
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "No one has equipped the Plague glove",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Plague Player",
    Callback = function()
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local foundPlayer = nil

        for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= localPlayer then
                local stats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                if stats and stats:FindFirstChild("Glove") and stats.Glove.Value == "Plague" then
                    foundPlayer = player
                    break
                end
            end
        end

        if foundPlayer and foundPlayer.Character and foundPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local hrp = foundPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
            localPlayer.Character:PivotTo(hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)) -- Teleport above

            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Teleported To: " .. foundPlayer.Name,
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Plague Player Not Found",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Hallow Jack",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Equip Killstreak (5k+ Slaps Need)",
    Callback = function()
fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["Killstreak"].ClickDetector)
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Killstreak Slap Aura",
    Callback = function()
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Killstreak" then
-- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

-- Start the infinite loop to fire for all players
while true do
    -- Loop through each player in the game
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        -- Ensure the player has a character and it contains the "Right Arm"
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") then
            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
            local args = {
                [1] = player.Character["Right Arm"]
            }

            -- Fire the server with the "Right Arm" part as an argument
            ReplicatedStorage.KSHit:FireServer(unpack(args))
        end
    end

    -- Wait 1 second before running the loop again (adjust the wait time as needed)
    wait(0.5)
end
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Killstreak",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

if not game.Workspace:FindFirstChild("Gravestone") then
GraveSpawn = Tab:AddLabel("Detected Grave: [ No ]")
else
GraveSpawn = Tab:AddLabel("Detected Grave: [ Yes ]")
end

local AutoSetInfoServer
AutoSetInfo = Tab:AddToggle({
	Name = "Auto Set Gravestone Info",
	Default = false,
	Callback = function(Value)
_G.AutoSetInfo = Value
AutoSetInfoServer = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
if _G.AutoSetInfo == true then

if not game.Workspace:FindFirstChild("Gravestone") then
GraveSpawn:Set("Detected Grave: [ No ]")
else
GraveSpawn:Set("Detected Grave: [ Yes ]")
end

    elseif _G.AutoSetInfo == false then
	    if AutoSetInfoServer then
		    AutoSetInfoServer:Disconnect()
		        AutoSetInfoServer = nil
	end
end
end)
	end    
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Click On Grave",
    Callback = function()
fireclickdetector(workspace.Gravestone.ClickDetector)
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "[REDACTED]",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Get [REDACTED] Glove",
    Callback = function()
        task.spawn(function()
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Teleport",
                Content = "Teleporting to Doors 1-10...",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
            
            -- Teleport to each door from 1 to 10
            for doorNumber = 1, 10 do
                -- WAIT FOR CHARACTER TO BE ALIVE
                local character = player.Character
                
                -- Keep waiting until character exists and is alive
                while not character or not character.Parent do
                    print("Waiting for respawn...")
                    character = player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
                    task.wait(0.1)
                end
                
                -- Wait a bit more for character to fully load
                task.wait(0.1)
                
                -- Get HumanoidRootPart
                local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                
                -- Keep waiting until HumanoidRootPart exists
                while not hrp do
                    print("Waiting for HumanoidRootPart...")
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                end
                
                -- Find the door
                local doorsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("PocketDimension")
                if not doorsFolder then
                    warn("PocketDimension not found!")
                    break
                end
                
                local doors = doorsFolder:FindFirstChild("Doors")
                if not doors then
                    warn("Doors not found in PocketDimension!")
                    break
                end
                
                local door = doors:FindFirstChild(tostring(doorNumber))
                if not door then
                    warn("Door " .. doorNumber .. " not found!")
                    break
                end
                
                -- Teleport to the door
                if door:IsA("BasePart") then
                    pcall(function()
                        hrp.CFrame = door.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
                        print("Teleported to Door " .. doorNumber)
                    end)
                end
                
                -- Small delay before next door
                task.wait(4.5)
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Complete!",
                Content = "Teleported to all doors 1-10!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end)
    end    
})

end
