Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Bring Bus",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value) 
        Giftfarm = Value
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while Giftfarm do
                local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                if not player then 
                    task.wait(0.1) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local character = player.Character
                if not character or not character.Parent then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if not hrp then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                -- Find BusModel (MeshPart) in workspace
                for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v.Name == "BusModel" and v:IsA("MeshPart") then
                        pcall(function()
                            -- Store original properties
                            local originalCFrame = v.CFrame
                            local originalAnchored = v.Anchored
                            
                            -- Remove TouchInterest if it exists
                            for _, child in pairs(v:GetChildren()) do
                                if child:IsA("TouchInterest") then
                                    child:Destroy()
                                end
                            end
                            
                            -- Bring bus to player
                            v.Anchored = false
                            v.CFrame = hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 0, 5) -- Slightly in front of player
                            task.wait(0.05)
                            
                            -- Restore original position (optional - comment out if you want bus to stay)
                            -- v.CFrame = originalCFrame
                            -- v.Anchored = originalAnchored
                        end)
                    end
                end
                
                task.wait(0.05) -- Fast loop for better collection
            end
        end)
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Mitten",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Bring Gift",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        Giftfarm = Value
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while Giftfarm do
                local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                if not player then 
                    task.wait(0.1) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local character = player.Character
                if not character or not character.Parent then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if not hrp then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                -- Find all Gifts
                for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                    if v.Name == "Gift" then
                        pcall(function()
                            -- Teleport gift directly to player
                            if v:IsA("BasePart") then
                                -- Gift is a single part
                                v.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
                            elseif v:IsA("Model") then
                                -- Gift is a model
                                local giftPart = v:FindFirstChild("Handle") or v:FindFirstChild("GiftPart") or v:FindFirstChild("PrimaryPart")
                                
                                if giftPart then
                                    giftPart.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
                                else
                                    -- Move all parts to player
                                    for _, part in pairs(v:GetDescendants()) do
                                        if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                                            part.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
                
                task.wait(0.05) -- Fast loop to collect gifts quickly
            end
        end)
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Phase",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddToggle({
	Name = "Auto Bring Phase Orb",
	Default = false,
	Callback = function(Value)
		_G.PhaseOrJetfarm = Value
		
		task.spawn(function()
			while _G.PhaseOrJetfarm do
				local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
				if not player then 
					task.wait(0.1) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local character = player.Character
				if not character or not character.Parent then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local head = character:FindFirstChild("Head")
				if not head then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				-- Find all Phase Orbs
				for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
					if v.Name == "PhaseOrb" then
						pcall(function()
							-- Teleport Phase Orb directly to player's head
							if v:IsA("BasePart") then
								-- Orb is a single part
								v.CFrame = head.CFrame
							elseif v:IsA("Model") then
								-- Orb is a model
								local orbPart = v:FindFirstChild("Handle") or v:FindFirstChild("OrbPart") or v:FindFirstChild("PrimaryPart")
								
								if orbPart then
									orbPart.CFrame = head.CFrame
								else
									-- Move all parts to player's head
									for _, part in pairs(v:GetDescendants()) do
										if part:IsA("BasePart") then
											part.CFrame = head.CFrame
										end
									end
								end
							end
						end)
					end
				end
				
				task.wait(0.05) -- Fast loop for orb collection
			end
		end)
	end    
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Warp",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

local autoWarpActive = false
local autoWarpLoop = nil
local currentTarget = nil
local closestMagnitude = 999999

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Get Warp Glove",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        autoWarpActive = Value
        
        if Value then
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            
            -- Check if player has Swapper glove
            if player.leaderstats.Glove.Value ~= "Swapper" then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Swapper Glove First!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 3
                })
                autoWarpActive = false
                return
            end
            
            -- Check if player already has Warp Glove
            local hasWarpBadge = false
            pcall(function()
                hasWarpBadge = game:GetService("BadgeService"):UserHasBadgeAsync(player.UserId, 0)
            end)
            
            if hasWarpBadge then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Already Owned",
                    Content = "You already have Warp Glove!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                autoWarpActive = false
                return
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Warp",
                Content = "Auto Get Warp Glove Started!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
            
            -- Reset variables
            closestMagnitude = 999999
            currentTarget = nil
            
            -- Stop existing loop if any
            if autoWarpLoop then
                task.cancel(autoWarpLoop)
                autoWarpLoop = nil
            end
            
            -- Start the loop
            autoWarpLoop = task.spawn(function()
                while autoWarpActive do
                    local success, err = pcall(function()
                        local character = player.Character
                        
                        -- Check if character exists
                        if not character or not character.Parent then
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        if not hrp then
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        -- Check if player has Swapper glove
                        if player.leaderstats.Glove.Value ~= "Swapper" then
                            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                                Name = "Error",
                                Content = "Equip Swapper Glove!",
                                Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                                Time = 2
                            })
                            autoWarpActive = false
                            return
                        end
                        
                        -- Check if player has "entered"
                        local hasEntered = character:FindFirstChild("entered")
                        if not hasEntered then
                            print("⚠️ Player doesn't have 'entered'!")
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        -- Find closest player with "entered" and alive
                        local closestPlayer = nil
                        local closestMag = 999999
                        
                        for _, v in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                            if v ~= player and v.Character and v.Character.Parent then
                                local targetHrp = v.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                                local targetHumanoid = v.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                                local targetEntered = v.Character:FindFirstChild("entered")
                                local targetRagdolled = v.Character:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled")
                                
                                -- Check if target is alive, has "entered", and not ragdolled
                                if targetHrp and targetHumanoid and targetHumanoid.Health > 0 and targetEntered then
                                    -- Check if ragdolled exists and is false
                                    local isRagdolled = false
                                    if targetRagdolled then
                                        isRagdolled = targetRagdolled.Value
                                    end
                                    
                                    if not isRagdolled then
                                        local magnitude = (hrp.Position - targetHrp.Position).Magnitude
                                        
                                        if magnitude < closestMag then
                                            closestMag = magnitude
                                            closestPlayer = v
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                        
                        -- If no target found, reset and wait
                        if not closestPlayer then
                            closestMagnitude = 999999
                            task.wait(0.15)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        -- Update closest magnitude
                        closestMagnitude = closestMag
                        currentTarget = closestPlayer
                        
                        -- Check if target is valid
                        if currentTarget and currentTarget.Character then
                            local targetHrp = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            local targetHead = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
                            local targetHumanoid = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                            local targetEntered = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("entered")
                            local targetRagdolled = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled")
                            
                            -- Check if target is alive, has "entered", and not ragdolled
                            if targetHrp and targetHead and targetHumanoid and targetHumanoid.Health > 0 and targetEntered then
                                local isRagdolled = false
                                if targetRagdolled then
                                    isRagdolled = targetRagdolled.Value
                                end
                                
                                if not isRagdolled then
                                    -- Teleport to target's head
                                    hrp.CFrame = targetHead.CFrame
                                    task.wait(0.17)
                                    
                                    -- Fire Swapper hit
                                    local hitSwapper = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("HitSwapper")
                                    if hitSwapper then
                                        hitSwapper:FireServer(targetHead)
                                        print("✅ HitSwapper fired on: " .. currentTarget.Name)
                                    end
                                    
                                    -- Teleport to SafeBox
                                    local safeBox = workspace:FindFirstChild("SafeBox")
                                    if safeBox then
                                        hrp.CFrame = safeBox.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 5, 0)
                                        print("✅ Teleported to SafeBox")
                                    end
                                    
                                    print("✅ Swapped with: " .. currentTarget.Name)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                        
                        -- Check if target fell into void (Y < -10)
                        if currentTarget and currentTarget.Character then
                            local targetHrp = currentTarget.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            if targetHrp and targetHrp.Position.Y < -10 then
                                print("💀 Target fell into void!")
                                
                                -- Teleport to target's HRP + 10 Y
                                hrp.CFrame = targetHrp.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 10, 0)
                                task.wait(0.15)
                                
                                -- Fire SLOC remote
                                local sloc = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("SLOC")
                                if sloc then
                                    sloc:FireServer()
                                    print("✅ SLOC fired!")
                                end
                                
                                -- Reset variables
                                closestMagnitude = 999999
                                currentTarget = nil
                                
                                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                                    Name = "Warp Glove",
                                    Content = "Warp Glove obtained!",
                                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                                    Time = 3
                                })
                                
                                -- Stop the loop
                                autoWarpActive = false
                                return
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    
                    if not success then
                        print("⚠️ Error in Auto Warp: " .. tostring(err))
                        task.wait(0.5)
                    end
                    
                    task.wait(0.15)
                end
                
                -- Cleanup
                print("Auto Warp stopped.")
                closestMagnitude = 999999
                currentTarget = nil
            end)
            
        else
            -- Disabled
            
            if autoWarpLoop then
                task.cancel(autoWarpLoop)
                autoWarpLoop = nil
            end
            closestMagnitude = 999999
            currentTarget = nil
        end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Bomb",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Get Bomb Glove",
	Callback = function()   
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Warp" and not game:GetService("BadgeService"):UserHasBadgeAsync(game.Players.LocalPlayer.UserId, 0) then
OldTouch = workspace.DEATHBARRIER.CanTouch
local players = game.Players:GetChildren()
local RandomPlayer = players[math.random(1, #players)]
repeat RandomPlayer = players[math.random(1, #players)] until RandomPlayer ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer and RandomPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("entered") and RandomPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled").Value == false
Target = RandomPlayer
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = Target.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame
task.wait(0.2)
game.ReplicatedStorage.WarpHt:FireServer(Target.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart"))
task.wait(0.15)
if workspace.DEATHBARRIER.CanTouch == true then
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = game:GetService("Workspace").DEATHBARRIER.CFrame
workspace.DEATHBARRIER.CanTouch = true
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = game:GetService("Workspace").DEATHBARRIER.CFrame
end
wait(0.1)
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").WLOC:FireServer()
wait(0.2)
workspace.DEATHBARRIER.CanTouch = OldTouch
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Warp",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
  	end    
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Bubble",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

-- Global flag to control loop
_G.KillstreakSlapRunning = false

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Slap Players (Killstreak)",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        _G.KillstreakSlapRunning = state

        -- Teleport to random player (not self)
        local function teleportToRandomPlayer()
            local playerList = Players:GetPlayers()
            if #playerList > 1 then
                local randomPlayer
                repeat
                    randomPlayer = playerList[math.random(1, #playerList)]
                until randomPlayer ~= LocalPlayer

                local char = randomPlayer.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                end
            else
                warn("Not enough players to teleport.")
            end
        end

        -- Fire GeneralHit on all players
        local function fireKSHitForAllPlayers()
            for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player.Character then
                    local rightArm = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or player.Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
                    if rightArm then
                        ReplicatedStorage.KSHit:FireServer(rightArm)
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        -- Main loop
        local function runAutoSlapKillstreakLoop()
            if LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value ~= "Killstreak" then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Killstreak glove.",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                _G.KillstreakSlapRunning = false
                return
            end

            while _G.KillstreakSlapRunning do
                wait(0.5)
                teleportToRandomPlayer()
                fireKSHitForAllPlayers()
            end
        end

        if state then
            coroutine.wrap(runAutoSlapKillstreakLoop)()
        else
            _G.KillstreakSlapRunning = false
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Killstreak Slap Aura",
    Callback = function()
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Killstreak" then
-- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

-- Start the infinite loop to fire for all players
while true do
    -- Loop through each player in the game
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        -- Ensure the player has a character and it contains the "Right Arm"
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") then
            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
            local args = {
                [1] = player.Character["Right Arm"]
            }

            -- Fire the server with the "Right Arm" part as an argument
            ReplicatedStorage.KSHit:FireServer(unpack(args))
        end
    end

    -- Wait 1 second before running the loop again (adjust the wait time as needed)
    wait(0.5)
end
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Killstreak",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

-- Global flag to control loop
_G.DisarmSlapRunning = false

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Slap Players (Reaper)",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        _G.DisarmSlapRunning = state

        -- Teleport to random player (not self)
        local function teleportToRandomPlayer()
            local playerList = Players:GetPlayers()
            if #playerList > 1 then
                local randomPlayer
                repeat
                    randomPlayer = playerList[math.random(1, #playerList)]
                until randomPlayer ~= LocalPlayer

                local char = randomPlayer.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local localHRP = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if localHRP then
                        localHRP.CFrame = char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                    end
                end
            else
                warn("Not enough players to teleport.")
            end
        end

        -- Fire ReaperHit on all players
        local function fireReaperHitForAllPlayers()
            for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player.Character then
                    local rightArm = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or player.Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
                    if rightArm then
                        ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("ReaperHit"):FireServer(rightArm)
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        -- Main loop
        local function runAutoDisarmSlapLoop()
            local leaderstats = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            local glove = leaderstats and leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")

            if not (glove and glove.Value == "Reaper") then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Disarm glove.",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                _G.DisarmSlapRunning = false
                return
            end

            while _G.DisarmSlapRunning do
                task.wait(0.5) -- cooldown between hits
                teleportToRandomPlayer()
                fireReaperHitForAllPlayers()
            end
        end

        if state then
            coroutine.wrap(runAutoDisarmSlapLoop)()
        else
            _G.DisarmSlapRunning = false
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Auto Reaper Slap Aura",
	Callback = function()   
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Reaper" then
-- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

-- Start the infinite loop to fire for all players
while true do
    -- Loop through each player in the game
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        -- Ensure the player has a character and it contains the "Left Arm"
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Left Arm") then
            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
            local args = {
                [1] = player.Character["Left Arm"]
            }

            -- Fire the server with the "Left Arm" part as an argument
            ReplicatedStorage.ReaperHit:FireServer(unpack(args))
        end
    end

    -- Wait 1 second before running the loop again (adjust the wait time as needed)
    wait(0.5)
end
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Reaper",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Jet",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddToggle({
	Name = "Auto Bring Jet Orb",
	Default = false,
	Callback = function(Value)
		_G.PhaseOrJetfarm = Value
		
		task.spawn(function()
			while _G.PhaseOrJetfarm do
				local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
				if not player then 
					task.wait(0.1) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local character = player.Character
				if not character or not character.Parent then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local head = character:FindFirstChild("Head")
				if not head then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				-- Find all Jet Orbs
				for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
					if v.Name == "JetOrb" then
						pcall(function()
							-- Teleport Jet Orb directly to player's head
							if v:IsA("BasePart") then
								-- Orb is a single part
								v.CFrame = head.CFrame
							elseif v:IsA("Model") then
								-- Orb is a model
								local orbPart = v:FindFirstChild("Handle") or v:FindFirstChild("OrbPart") or v:FindFirstChild("PrimaryPart")
								
								if orbPart then
									orbPart.CFrame = head.CFrame
								else
									-- Move all parts to player's head
									for _, part in pairs(v:GetDescendants()) do
										if part:IsA("BasePart") then
											part.CFrame = head.CFrame
										end
									end
								end
							end
						end)
					end
				end
				
				task.wait(0.05) -- Fast loop for orb collection
			end
		end)
	end    
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Shard",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Someone Using OVERKILL?",
    Callback = function()
        local found = false

        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            if leaderstats then
                local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                if glove and glove.Value == "OVERKILL" then
                    found = true
                    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                        Name = "Detected!",
                        Content = player.Name .. " has equipped the OVERKILL glove.",
                        Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        end

        if not found then
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "No one has equipped the OVERKILL glove",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To OVERKILL Player",
    Callback = function()
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local foundPlayer = nil

        for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= localPlayer then
                local stats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                if stats and stats:FindFirstChild("Glove") and stats.Glove.Value == "OVERKILL" then
                    foundPlayer = player
                    break
                end
            end
        end

        if foundPlayer and foundPlayer.Character and foundPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local hrp = foundPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
            localPlayer.Character:PivotTo(hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)) -- Teleport above

            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Teleported To: " .. foundPlayer.Name,
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "OVERKILL Player Not Found",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- Global flag to control loop
_G.SnowOverkillRunning = false

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Slap OVERKILL Players (Snow)",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        _G.SnowOverkillRunning = state

        -- Teleport to random player with OVERKILL (not self)
        local function teleportToOverkillPlayer()
            local playerList = Players:GetPlayers()
            local overkillPlayers = {}
            
            -- Find all players with OVERKILL
            for _, player in pairs(playerList) do
                if player ~= LocalPlayer then
                    local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                    local glove = leaderstats and leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                    if glove and glove.Value == "OVERKILL" then
                        table.insert(overkillPlayers, player)
                    end
                end
            end
            
            if #overkillPlayers > 0 then
                local randomPlayer = overkillPlayers[math.random(1, #overkillPlayers)]
                local char = randomPlayer.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local localHRP = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if localHRP then
                        localHRP.CFrame = char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                    end
                end
            else
                warn("No players with OVERKILL found.")
            end
        end

        -- Fire Snow hits on OVERKILL players only
        local function fireSnowHitForOverkillPlayers()
            for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player ~= LocalPlayer then
                    local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                    local glove = leaderstats and leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                    if glove and glove.Value == "OVERKILL" and player.Character then
                        local rightArm = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or player.Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
                        if rightArm then
                            ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("SnowHit"):FireServer(rightArm)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        -- Main loop
        local function runAutoSnowOverkillLoop()
            local leaderstats = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            local glove = leaderstats and leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")

            if not (glove and glove.Value == "Snow") then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Snow glove.",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                _G.SnowOverkillRunning = false
                return
            end

            while _G.SnowOverkillRunning do
                task.wait(0.5) -- cooldown between hits
                teleportToOverkillPlayer()
                fireSnowHitForOverkillPlayers()
            end
        end

        if state then
            coroutine.wrap(runAutoSnowOverkillLoop)()
        else
            _G.SnowOverkillRunning = false
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Snow Slap Aura (OVERKILL Players Only)",
    Callback = function()   
        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Snow" then
            -- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
            local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
            local Players = game:GetService("Players")

            -- Start the infinite loop to fire for OVERKILL players only
            while true do
                -- Loop through each player in the game
                for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                    -- Check if player has OVERKILL glove
                    if player ~= LocalPlayer then
                        local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                        local glove = leaderstats and leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                        
                        -- Only target players with OVERKILL glove
                        if glove and glove.Value == "OVERKILL" and player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Left Arm") then
                            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
                            local args = {
                                [1] = player.Character["Left Arm"]
                            }

                            -- Fire the server with the "Left Arm" part as an argument
                            ReplicatedStorage.SnowHit:FireServer(unpack(args))
                        end
                    end
                end

                -- Wait 0.5 seconds before running the loop again
                wait(0.5)
            end
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error", Content = "Equip Snow", Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857", Time = 3})
        end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "potato",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Equip Reverse (5.5k+ Slaps Need)",
    Callback = function()
fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["Reverse"].ClickDetector)
    end
})

local Potatofarm = false

Tab:AddToggle({
	Name = "Auto Bring Bubble",
	Default = false,
	Callback = function(Value)
		Potatofarm = Value
		
		task.spawn(function()
			while Potatofarm do
				local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
				if not player then 
					task.wait(0.1) 
					continue 
				end
				
				-- Check for Reverse glove
				if player.leaderstats and player.leaderstats.Glove and player.leaderstats.Glove.Value ~= "Reverse" then
					OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error", Content = "Equip Reverse/Use Ability", Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857", Time = 3})
					Potatofarm = false
					break
				end
				
				local character = player.Character
				if not character or not character.Parent then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
				if not hrp then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local bubblesFound = 0
				
				-- Find all BubbleObjects
				for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
					if v.Name == "BubbleObject" then
						bubblesFound = bubblesFound + 1
						pcall(function()
							-- Teleport bubble directly to player's HRP
							if v:IsA("BasePart") then
								-- Bubble is a single part
								v.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
							elseif v:IsA("Model") then
								-- Bubble is a model
								local bubblePart = v:FindFirstChild("Handle") or v:FindFirstChild("BubblePart") or v:FindFirstChild("PrimaryPart")
								
								if bubblePart then
									bubblePart.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
								else
									-- Move all parts to player
									for _, part in pairs(v:GetDescendants()) do
										if part:IsA("BasePart") then
											part.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
										end
									end
								end
							end
						end)
					end
				end
				
				-- Adjust wait time based on whether bubbles were found
				if bubblesFound == 0 then
					task.wait(0.3) -- No bubbles, wait a bit
				else
					task.wait(0.05) -- Bubbles found, fast loop
				end
			end
		end)
	end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "CULT",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Auto potato Slap Aura",

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "bob",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- ===== VARIABLES =====
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local cloneCount = 0
local isSpawning = false
local spawnStarted = false
local spawnStopped = false
local spawnFinished = false
local legitCloneCount = 0
local legitSpawning = false
local legitSpawnStarted = false
local legitSpawnStopped = false
local legitSpawnFinished = false
local totalClonesNeeded = 7500
local ownBobBadge = false
local isAntiAfkEnabled = false
local isReplicaEquipped = false
local legitWaitingForRespawn = false

-- Bob Badge ID
local BOB_BADGE_ID = "2125950512" -- String for comparison

-- Function to check if player is in arena
local function isInArena()
    local character = player and player.Character
    if character then
        local isInArenaValue = character:FindFirstChild("isInArena")
        if isInArenaValue then
            return isInArenaValue.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if Replica glove is equipped
local function checkReplicaGlove()
    if player.leaderstats and player.leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove") then
        isReplicaEquipped = (player.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Replica")
        return isReplicaEquipped
    end
    isReplicaEquipped = false
    return false
end

-- Function to check if Bob badge is owned using PlayerData path
local function checkBobBadge()
    local playerData = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if not playerData then
        ownBobBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(player.Name)
    if not playerFolder then
        ownBobBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
    if not unlockedBadges then
        ownBobBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
        local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
        
        if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
            local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
            
            for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                if cleanId == BOB_BADGE_ID then
                    ownBobBadge = true
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    ownBobBadge = false
    return false
end

-- Function to format status text for Exploit Mode
local function getExploitStatusText()
    local waitingStatus = "Waiting to start..."
    local startedStatus = "Not Started"
    local stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
    local finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    
    if spawnFinished then
        waitingStatus = "Finished!"
        startedStatus = "7500/7500"
        stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
        finishedStatus = "7500/7500"
    elseif spawnStopped then
        waitingStatus = "Stopped"
        startedStatus = cloneCount .. "/" .. totalClonesNeeded
        stoppedStatus = cloneCount .. "/" .. totalClonesNeeded
        finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    elseif spawnStarted then
        waitingStatus = "Running..."
        startedStatus = cloneCount .. "/" .. totalClonesNeeded
        stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
        finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    elseif not isSpawning then
        waitingStatus = "Ready to start"
        startedStatus = "Not Started"
        stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
        finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    end
    
    local replicaStatus = isReplicaEquipped and "Yes" or "No"
    local antiAfkStatus = isAntiAfkEnabled and "Yes" or "No"
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "Yes" or "No"
    local percentage = 0.013
    local badgeStatus = ownBobBadge and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    
    local statusText = string.format([[
Clone Auto Spawn Waiting: %s
Clone Auto Spawn Started: %s
Clone Auto Spawn Stopped: %s
Clone Auto Spawn Finished: %s
Total Clones Need To Be Spawned: %d
Total Percentage For Bob To Spawn: %.3f%%
Replica Glove Equipped: %s
Anti AFK: %s
Entered Arena: %s
Owns bob Badge: %s
]],
    waitingStatus,
    startedStatus,
    stoppedStatus,
    finishedStatus,
    totalClonesNeeded,
    percentage,
    replicaStatus,
    antiAfkStatus,
    inArenaStatus,
    badgeStatus
)
    return statusText
end

-- Function to format status text for Legit Mode
local function getLegitStatusText()
    local waitingStatus = "Waiting to start..."
    local startedStatus = "Not Started"
    local stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
    local finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    
    if legitSpawnFinished then
        waitingStatus = "Finished!"
        startedStatus = "7500/7500"
        stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
        finishedStatus = "7500/7500"
    elseif legitSpawnStopped then
        waitingStatus = "Stopped"
        startedStatus = legitCloneCount .. "/" .. totalClonesNeeded
        stoppedStatus = legitCloneCount .. "/" .. totalClonesNeeded
        finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    elseif legitSpawnStarted then
        waitingStatus = "Running..."
        startedStatus = legitCloneCount .. "/" .. totalClonesNeeded
        stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
        finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    elseif not legitSpawning then
        waitingStatus = "Ready to start"
        startedStatus = "Not Started"
        stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
        finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    end
    
    local replicaStatus = isReplicaEquipped and "Yes" or "No"
    local antiAfkStatus = isAntiAfkEnabled and "Yes" or "No"
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "Yes" or "No"
    local percentage = 0.013
    local badgeStatus = ownBobBadge and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    
    local statusText = string.format([[
Clone Auto Spawn Waiting: %s
Clone Auto Spawn Started: %s
Clone Auto Spawn Stopped: %s
Clone Auto Spawn Finished: %s
Total Clones Need To Be Spawned: %d
Total Percentage For Bob To Spawn: %.3f%%
Replica Glove Equipped: %s
Anti AFK: %s
Entered Arena: %s
Owns bob Badge: %s
bob Badge Awards Glove: bob Glove
]],
    waitingStatus,
    startedStatus,
    stoppedStatus,
    finishedStatus,
    totalClonesNeeded,
    percentage,
    replicaStatus,
    antiAfkStatus,
    inArenaStatus,
    badgeStatus
)
    return statusText
end

-- Create paragraphs
local ExploitStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Exploit Mode Status:", "Loading...")
local LegitStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Legit Mode Status:", "Loading...")

-- Function to spawn clone (Exploit Mode - kills character)
local function spawnCloneExploit()
    if not isSpawning then return end
    
    pcall(function()
        if checkReplicaGlove() then
            local char = player.Character
            if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                
                local teleport1 = workspace:FindFirstChild("Lobby") and workspace.Lobby:FindFirstChild("Teleport1")
                if teleport1 then
                    char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = teleport1.CFrame
                    task.wait(0.2)
                end
                
                local duplicate = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Duplicate")
                if duplicate then
                    duplicate:FireServer(true)
                    task.wait(0.2)
                end
                
                if char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                    char.Humanoid.Health = 0
                end
                
                if not spawnFinished then
                    cloneCount = cloneCount + 1
                end
                
                if cloneCount >= totalClonesNeeded then
                    spawnFinished = true
                    isSpawning = false
                    spawnStarted = false
                end
            end
        end
    end)
end

-- ===== LEGIT MODE - FIXED =====
local legitSpawningInProgress = false

local function enterArenaAndSpawnClone()
    if legitSpawningInProgress then return end
    legitSpawningInProgress = true
    
    pcall(function()
        if not checkReplicaGlove() then
            legitSpawningInProgress = false
            return
        end
        
        local char = player.Character
        if not char or not char.Parent then
            legitSpawningInProgress = false
            return
        end
        
        local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        local humanoid = char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
        
        if not hrp or not humanoid then
            legitSpawningInProgress = false
            return
        end
        
        -- Check if already in arena
        local inArena = isInArena()
        
        if not inArena then
            -- Walk to teleport1 to enter arena
            local teleport1 = workspace:FindFirstChild("Lobby") and workspace.Lobby:FindFirstChild("Teleport1")
            
            if teleport1 then
                print("🚶 Walking to Teleport1 to enter arena...")
                
                -- Move to teleport
                humanoid:MoveTo(teleport1.Position)
                
                -- Wait until close enough or until entered arena
                local attempts = 0
                while attempts < 60 do
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    attempts = attempts + 1
                    
                    -- Check if entered arena
                    if isInArena() then
                        print("✅ Entered arena!")
                        break
                    end
                    
                    char = player.Character
                    if not char then break end
                    hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    humanoid = char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
                    if not hrp or not humanoid then break end
                    
                    local distance = (hrp.Position - teleport1.Position).Magnitude
                    if distance < 5 then
                        -- Close enough, teleport to exact position
                        hrp.CFrame = teleport1.CFrame
                        task.wait(0.3)
                        break
                    end
                    
                    humanoid:MoveTo(teleport1.Position)
                end
                
                -- Final check if entered arena
                if not isInArena() then
                    -- Try teleporting directly
                    hrp.CFrame = teleport1.CFrame
                    task.wait(0.5)
                end
            end
        end
        
        -- Wait a bit for arena to register
        task.wait(0.5)
        
        -- Now spawn clone (only if in arena)
        if isInArena() then
            print("✅ In arena! Spawning clone...")
            
            local duplicate = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Duplicate")
            if duplicate then
                duplicate:FireServer(true)
                task.wait(1)
            end
            
            -- Update clone count
            if not legitSpawnFinished then
                legitCloneCount = legitCloneCount + 1
                print("🔄 Clone #" .. legitCloneCount .. "/" .. totalClonesNeeded)
            end
            
            -- Check if finished
            if legitCloneCount >= totalClonesNeeded then
                legitSpawnFinished = true
                legitSpawning = false
                legitSpawnStarted = false
                legitSpawningInProgress = false
                print("✅ Bob Glove obtained!")
                return
            end
            
            -- Kill character to respawn in lobby
            task.wait(2) -- Wait 2 seconds after spawning clone
            humanoid.Health = 0
            print("💀 Killed character to respawn...")
            
            -- Wait for respawn
            legitWaitingForRespawn = true
            player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
            task.wait(1)
            legitWaitingForRespawn = false
            print("🔄 Respawned! Repeating process...")
        else
            print("❌ Failed to enter arena! Retrying...")
            task.wait(1)
        end
    end)
    
    legitSpawningInProgress = false
end

-- Function to wait for respawn (Exploit Mode)
local function waitForRespawn()
    if player.Character then
        local humanoid = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
        if humanoid and humanoid.Health <= 0 then
            player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
            task.wait(1)
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Reset functions
local function resetExploitMode()
    cloneCount = 0
    isSpawning = false
    spawnStarted = false
    spawnStopped = false
    spawnFinished = false
end

local function resetLegitMode()
    legitCloneCount = 0
    legitSpawning = false
    legitSpawnStarted = false
    legitSpawnStopped = false
    legitSpawnFinished = false
    legitSpawningInProgress = false
    legitWaitingForRespawn = false
end

-- ===== EXPLOIT MODE TOGGLE =====
local exploitModeEnabled = false
local exploitLoop = nil

local function startExploitMode()
    exploitLoop = task.spawn(function()
        while exploitModeEnabled and not spawnFinished do
            pcall(function()
                if not player.Character then
                    player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
                    task.wait(1)
                end
                
                local char = player.Character
                local humanoid = char and char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
                
                if humanoid and humanoid.Health <= 0 then
                    waitForRespawn()
                    return
                end
                
                if checkReplicaGlove() then
                    spawnCloneExploit()
                end
            end)
            task.wait(0.5)
        end
    end)
end

local exploitToggle = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Get Bob Glove (Exploit Mode)",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        exploitModeEnabled = Value
        
        if Value then
            if checkReplicaGlove() then
                resetExploitMode()
                isSpawning = true
                spawnStarted = true
                spawnStopped = false
                spawnFinished = false
                
                if exploitLoop then
                    task.cancel(exploitLoop)
                end
                startExploitMode()
                
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Exploit Mode",
                    Content = "Started! Will spawn " .. totalClonesNeeded .. " clones",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
            else
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Replica Glove",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                exploitToggle:Set(false)
                exploitModeEnabled = false
            end
        else
            if exploitLoop then
                task.cancel(exploitLoop)
                exploitLoop = nil
            end
            isSpawning = false
            spawnStopped = true
            spawnStarted = false
            
        end
    end
})

-- ===== LEGIT MODE TOGGLE =====
local legitModeEnabled = false
local legitLoop = nil

local function startLegitMode()
    legitLoop = task.spawn(function()
        while legitModeEnabled and not legitSpawnFinished do
            pcall(function()
                -- Wait for character to exist
                if not player.Character or not player.Character.Parent then
                    print("⏳ Waiting for character...")
                    player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
                    task.wait(2)
                end
                
                -- Check if Replica is equipped
                if not checkReplicaGlove() then
                    print("❌ Replica not equipped!")
                    task.wait(1)
                    return
                end
                
                -- Check if player is dead or waiting for respawn
                local char = player.Character
                if char then
                    local humanoid = char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
                    if humanoid and humanoid.Health <= 0 then
                        print("💀 Player is dead, waiting for respawn...")
                        legitWaitingForRespawn = true
                        player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
                        task.wait(2)
                        legitWaitingForRespawn = false
                        return
                    end
                end
                
                -- Enter arena and spawn clone
                if not legitSpawningInProgress then
                    enterArenaAndSpawnClone()
                end
            end)
            task.wait(0.5)
        end
    end)
end

local legitToggle = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Get Bob Glove (Legit Mode)",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        legitModeEnabled = Value
        
        if Value then
            if checkReplicaGlove() then
                resetLegitMode()
                legitSpawning = true
                legitSpawnStarted = true
                legitSpawnStopped = false
                legitSpawnFinished = false
                
                if legitLoop then
                    task.cancel(legitLoop)
                end
                startLegitMode()
                
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Legit Mode",
                    Content = "Started! Will spawn " .. totalClonesNeeded .. " clones",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
            else
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Replica Glove",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                legitToggle:Set(false)
                legitModeEnabled = false
            end
        else
            if legitLoop then
                task.cancel(legitLoop)
                legitLoop = nil
            end
            legitSpawning = false
            legitSpawnStopped = true
            legitSpawnStarted = false
            legitSpawningInProgress = false
            legitWaitingForRespawn = false
        end
    end
})

-- ===== ANTI AFK TOGGLE =====
AntiAfk = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Anti AFK",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        isAntiAfkEnabled = Value
        
        if Value then
            local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
            game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
            end)
        end
    end    
})

-- ===== CONSTANT UPDATE LOOP =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        local startTime = tick()
        
        checkReplicaGlove()
        checkBobBadge()
        
        ExploitStatusParagraph:Set(getExploitStatusText())
        LegitStatusParagraph:Set(getLegitStatusText())
        
        local elapsed = tick() - startTime
        local waitTime = math.max(0.01, 0.05 - elapsed)
        task.wait(waitTime)
    end
end)

AutoGetBobGlove = Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Instant Spawn 75k Clones (Need God Hand)",
    Callback = function()
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Slaps.Value >= 65000 then
fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["God's Hand"].ClickDetector)
task.wait(.3)
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.Lobby.Teleport1.CFrame
wait(1)
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").TimestopJump:FireServer()
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Timestopchoir:FireServer()
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Timestop:FireServer()
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health = 0
task.wait(5)
fireclickdetector(game:GetService("Workspace").Lobby.Replica.ClickDetector)
wait(1)
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.Lobby.Teleport1.CFrame
task.wait(1)
for i = 1, 75000 do
        game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Duplicate:FireServer(unpack({[1] = true}))
end
wait(7)
-- Rejoin Script (Server Hop)
local function rejoin()
    local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local placeId = game.PlaceId
    local jobId = game.JobId
    
    local success, servers = pcall(function()
        return game:HttpGet("https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/" .. placeId .. "/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100")
    end)
    
    if success then
        local data = game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONDecode(servers)
        for _, server in ipairs(data.data) do
            if server.id ~= jobId and server.playing < server.maxPlayers then
                TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(placeId, server.id, Players.LocalPlayer)
                return
            end
        end
    end
    
    TeleportService:Teleport(placeId)
end

rejoin()
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "65000+ Slaps Required",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
task.wait(0.05)
AutoGetBobGlove:Set(false)
end
end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Instant Spawn 75k Clones (God Hand Uses Your Friend/Alt)",
    Callback = function()
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Replica" then
wait(0.1)
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.Lobby.Teleport1.CFrame
task.wait(1)
for i = 1, 75000 do
        game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Duplicate:FireServer(unpack({[1] = true}))
end
wait(9)
local function rejoin()
    local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local placeId = game.PlaceId
    local jobId = game.JobId
    
    local success, servers = pcall(function()
        return game:HttpGet("https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/" .. placeId .. "/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100")
    end)
    
    if success then
        local data = game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONDecode(servers)
        for _, server in ipairs(data.data) do
            if server.id ~= jobId and server.playing < server.maxPlayers then
                TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(placeId, server.id, Players.LocalPlayer)
                return
            end
        end
    end
    
    TeleportService:Teleport(placeId)
end

rejoin()
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Replica Glove",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "buddies",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- Global flags
_G.GoldenSlapRunning = false
_G.AutoTeleportRunning = false

-- Services
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local VirtualInputManager = game:GetService("VirtualInputManager")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

-- Configurable distance behind player
local BEHIND_DISTANCE = 3
local HEIGHT_OFFSET = 1.5

local headAnchorConnection = nil
local teleportLoop = nil
local slapLoop = nil

-- FIXED: Function to check if player is in arena (uses "entered")
local function isInArena()
    local character = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.Character
    if character then
        local entered = character:FindFirstChild("entered")
        if entered then
            return entered.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to anchor the head
local function anchorHead()
    local character = LocalPlayer.Character
    if not character then return end
    
    local head = character:FindFirstChild("Head")
    if not head then return end
    
    local originalAnchored = head.Anchored
    local originalNetworkOwnership = head:GetNetworkOwnership()
    
    head.Anchored = true
    head:SetNetworkOwnership(Enum.NetworkOwnership.Owner)
    
    return function()
        pcall(function()
            head.Anchored = originalAnchored or false
            head:SetNetworkOwnership(originalNetworkOwnership or Enum.NetworkOwnership.Server)
        end)
    end
end

-- Function to get error message based on conditions
local function getErrorMessage()
    local leaderstats = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
    if not leaderstats then
        return "⚠️ Error - Leaderstats not found!"
    end
    
    local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
    local hasGolden = glove and glove.Value == "Golden"
    local inArena = isInArena()
    
    if hasGolden and inArena then
        return nil
    elseif not hasGolden and not inArena then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip Golden Glove First / Enter Arena First"
    elseif hasGolden and not inArena then
        return "⚠️ Error - Enter Arena First"
    elseif not hasGolden and inArena then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip Golden Glove First"
    end
    
    return "⚠️ Unknown Error"
end

-- Safety function to check if services are loaded
local function isReady()
    return LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
end

-- Function to check if a player has "entered" in their character
local function hasEntered(player)
    if not player or not player.Character then return false end
    local entered = player.Character:FindFirstChild("entered")
    return entered ~= nil
end

-- PRESS E KEY (ONLY E, NO TOOL ACTIVATION)
local function pressE()
    pcall(function()
        VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(true, Enum.KeyCode.E, false, game)
        task.wait(0.05)
        VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode.E, false, game)
        print("✅ Pressed E!")
    end)
end

-- ACTIVATE TOOL (ONLY TOOL ACTIVATION, NO E)
local function activateTool()
    if not isReady() then return false end
    
    local character = LocalPlayer.Character
    if not character then return false end
    
    local goldenTool = character:FindFirstChild("Golden")
    
    if not goldenTool then
        local backpack = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("Backpack")
        if backpack then
            goldenTool = backpack:FindFirstChild("Golden")
            if goldenTool then
                goldenTool.Parent = character
                task.wait(0.1)
                print("🔧 Equipped Golden from backpack")
            end
        end
    end
    
    if not goldenTool then 
        print("⚠️ Golden tool not found!")
        return false 
    end
    
    pcall(function()
        goldenTool:Activate()
        print("✅ Tool activated via Activate()")
    end)
    
    return true
end

-- ACTIVATE TOOL + PRESS E (COMBINED)
local function activateToolAndPressE()
    activateTool()
    task.wait(0.1)
    pressE()
end

-- Teleport BEHIND random player with "entered" (FACING SAME DIRECTION)
local function teleportNearRandomPlayer()
    if not isReady() then return false end
    
    local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
    if errorMsg then
        print(errorMsg)
        return false
    end
    
    local playerList = Players:GetPlayers()
    if #playerList < 2 then return false end
    
    local eligiblePlayers = {}
    for _, plr in ipairs(playerList) do
        if plr ~= LocalPlayer and hasEntered(plr) then
            table.insert(eligiblePlayers, plr)
        end
    end
    
    if #eligiblePlayers == 0 then
        print("⚠️ No players with 'entered' found!")
        return false
    end
    
    local randomPlayer = eligiblePlayers[math.random(1, #eligiblePlayers)]
    
    if not randomPlayer or not randomPlayer.Character then
        return false
    end
    
    local char = randomPlayer.Character
    if not char or not char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        return false
    end
    
    local localChar = LocalPlayer.Character
    if not localChar or not localChar:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        return false
    end
    
    local localHRP = localChar.HumanoidRootPart
    local targetHRP = char.HumanoidRootPart
    
    -- Get the target's look direction (where they are facing)
    local targetLookVector = targetHRP.CFrame.LookVector
    
    -- Calculate position BEHIND the player
    -- (opposite direction of where they're looking)
    local behindPosition = targetHRP.Position - (targetLookVector * BEHIND_DISTANCE) + Vector3.new(0, HEIGHT_OFFSET, 0)
    
    -- Create CFrame for behind position
    -- IMPORTANT: We want to face the SAME direction as the target
    -- So we use the target's rotation (targetHRP.CFrame - position + look vector)
    local behindCFrame = CFrame.new(behindPosition, behindPosition + targetLookVector)
    
    -- Teleport to behind the player, facing the same direction
    localHRP.CFrame = behindCFrame
    
    if headAnchorConnection then
        headAnchorConnection()
        headAnchorConnection = nil
    end
    headAnchorConnection = anchorHead()
    
    print("✅ Teleported behind: " .. randomPlayer.Name .. " (Facing same direction)")
    return true
end

-- ============================================
-- TOGGLE 1: AUTO SLAP (ONLY ACTIVATES TOOL, NO E)
-- ============================================
local autoSlapToggle = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Slap",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        _G.GoldenSlapRunning = state
        
        if state then
            local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
            if errorMsg then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Auto Slap Error",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 4
                })
                autoSlapToggle:Set(false)
                _G.GoldenSlapRunning = false
                return
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Slap",
                Content = "Auto Slap Started! (Activates Tool Only)",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 2
            })
            
            slapLoop = task.spawn(function()
                while _G.GoldenSlapRunning do
                    pcall(function()
                        if not isReady() then
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
                        if errorMsg then
                            task.wait(1)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        activateTool()
                    end)
                    task.wait(0.3)
                end
            end)
        else
            if slapLoop then
                task.cancel(slapLoop)
                slapLoop = nil
            end
        end
    end
})

-- ============================================
-- TOGGLE 2: AUTO TELEPORT (ONLY TELEPORTS, NO SLAP)
-- ============================================
local autoTeleportToggle = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Teleport",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        _G.AutoTeleportRunning = state
        
        if state then
            local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
            if errorMsg then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Auto Teleport Error",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 4
                })
                autoTeleportToggle:Set(false)
                _G.AutoTeleportRunning = false
                return
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Teleport",
                Content = "Auto Teleport Started!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 2
            })
            
            teleportLoop = task.spawn(function()
                while _G.AutoTeleportRunning do
                    pcall(function()
                        if not isReady() then
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
                        if errorMsg then
                            task.wait(1)
                            return
                        end
                        
                        teleportNearRandomPlayer()
                    end)
                    task.wait(0.5)
                end
            end)
        else
            if teleportLoop then
                task.cancel(teleportLoop)
                teleportLoop = nil
            end
            
            if headAnchorConnection then
                headAnchorConnection()
                headAnchorConnection = nil
            end
            
        end
    end
})

-- ============================================
-- BUTTON 3: USE E KEYBIND (ONLY E, NO TOOL ACTIVATION)
-- ============================================
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Use E Keybind For Ability Press",
    Callback = function()
        local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
        if errorMsg then
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = errorMsg,
                Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                Time = 3
            })
            return
        end
        
        pressE()
        
        OrionLib:MakeNotification({
            Name = "E Keybind Used!",
            Content = "Pressed E to use ability!",
            Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
            Time = 2
        })
    end
})

	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",

	})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Use Ghost Glove + Teleport To Safespot",
	Callback = function()   
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Slaps.Value >= 666 then
fireclickdetector(game:GetService("Workspace").Lobby.Ghost.ClickDetector)
wait(0.1)
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Ghostinvisibilityactivated:FireServer()
wait(0.1)
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3457, 249, -27)
else
print("not enough slaps")
end
end
})

end

Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Jupiter",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Someone Using God's Hand?",
    Callback = function()
        local found = false

        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            if leaderstats then
                local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                if glove and glove.Value == "God's Hand" then
                    found = true
                    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                        Name = "Detected!",
                        Content = player.Name .. " has equipped the God's Hand glove.",
                        Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        end

        if not found then
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "No one has equipped the God's Hand glove",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To God's Hand Player",
    Callback = function()
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local foundPlayer = nil

        for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= localPlayer then
                local stats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                if stats and stats:FindFirstChild("Glove") and stats.Glove.Value == "God's Hand" then
                    foundPlayer = player
                    break
                end
            end
        end

        if foundPlayer and foundPlayer.Character and foundPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local hrp = foundPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
            localPlayer.Character:PivotTo(hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)) -- Teleport above

            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Teleported To: " .. foundPlayer.Name,
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "God's Hand Player Not Found",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

AntiRagdoll = Tab:AddToggle({
	Name = "Anti Ragdoll",
	Default = false,
	Callback = function(Value)
        _G.AntiRagdoll = Value
while _G.AntiRagdoll do
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled") then
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("Ragdolled").Value == true then
repeat task.wait()
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") then
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Torso.Anchored = true
end
until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("Ragdolled").Value == false
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") then
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Torso.Anchored = false
end
end
end
task.wait()
end
	end    
})

Tab = Window:MakeTab({

fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["Default"].ClickDetector)
