Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Destroy All Tycoons",
	Callback = function()
		for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
			if string.find(v.Name, "ÅTycoon") then
				local clickPart = v:FindFirstChild("Destruct")
				if clickPart and clickPart:IsA("BasePart") then
					local detector = clickPart:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
					if detector then
						fireclickdetector(detector)
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
})

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Bring Bus",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value) 
        Giftfarm = Value
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while Giftfarm do
                local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                if not player then 
                    task.wait(0.1) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local character = player.Character
                if not character or not character.Parent then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if not hrp then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                -- Find BusModel (MeshPart) in workspace
                for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v.Name == "BusModel" and v:IsA("MeshPart") then
                        pcall(function()
                            -- Store original properties
                            local originalCFrame = v.CFrame
                            local originalAnchored = v.Anchored
                            
                            -- Remove TouchInterest if it exists
                            for _, child in pairs(v:GetChildren()) do
                                if child:IsA("TouchInterest") then
                                    child:Destroy()
                                end
                            end
                            
                            -- Bring bus to player
                            v.Anchored = false
                            v.CFrame = hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 0, 5) -- Slightly in front of player
                            task.wait(0.05)
                            
                            -- Restore original position (optional - comment out if you want bus to stay)
                            -- v.CFrame = originalCFrame
                            -- v.Anchored = originalAnchored
                        end)
                    end
                end
                
                task.wait(0.05) -- Fast loop for better collection
            end
        end)
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Glitch",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Slap Phase/Jet Orb + Auto Touch Glitch Orb",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Error" then
        -- Enable or disable auto-farming based on the toggle state
        _G.Glitchfarm = Value
        
        -- Continuously check while the toggle is on
        while _G.Glitchfarm do
            -- Ensure the player has the "Error" glove equipped
            local glove = game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove
            if glove and glove.Value == "Error" then
                -- Check if either "JetOrb" or "PhaseOrb" exists in the workspace
                local jetOrb = game.Workspace:FindFirstChild("JetOrb")
                local phaseOrb = game.Workspace:FindFirstChild("PhaseOrb")

                -- If orbs are found, fire the Errorhit event
                if jetOrb then
                    game.ReplicatedStorage.Errorhit:FireServer(jetOrb)
                end
                if phaseOrb then
                    game.ReplicatedStorage.Errorhit:FireServer(phaseOrb)
                end
else
                -- Notify the player to equip the "Error" glove if they don't have it
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Error",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
            end
            
            -- Wait briefly before checking again to reduce load
            task.wait(1)  -- Adjust wait time as needed for performance
        end
    end
end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Snowball",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Bring Gift",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        Giftfarm = Value
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while Giftfarm do
                local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                if not player then 
                    task.wait(0.1) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local character = player.Character
                if not character or not character.Parent then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if not hrp then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                -- Find all Gifts
                for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                    if v.Name == "Gift" then
                        pcall(function()
                            -- Teleport gift directly to player
                            if v:IsA("BasePart") then
                                -- Gift is a single part
                                v.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
                            elseif v:IsA("Model") then
                                -- Gift is a model
                                local giftPart = v:FindFirstChild("Handle") or v:FindFirstChild("GiftPart") or v:FindFirstChild("PrimaryPart")
                                
                                if giftPart then
                                    giftPart.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
                                else
                                    -- Move all parts to player
                                    for _, part in pairs(v:GetDescendants()) do
                                        if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                                            part.CFrame = hrp.CFrame
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
                
                task.wait(0.05) -- Fast loop to collect gifts quickly
            end
        end)
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Elude",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To ? Place + Auto TP To Glove",
    Callback = function()
local targetPlaceId = 11828384869
local targetPosition = Vector3.new(-503, 19, -179)
local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId

-- Check if this is the first execution or a re-execution
local isReExecution = false

-- Function to teleport to position
local function teleportToPosition()
    local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
    if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(targetPosition)
        print("Teleported to target position!")
    end
end

-- Function to set up teleport monitoring
local function setupTeleportMonitor()
    local connection
    connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
        if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
            -- Save the script to re-execute after teleport
            local teleportScript = [[
                wait(2) -- Wait for character to load
                local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(Vector3.new(-503, 19, -179))
                    print("Auto-executed teleport after arrival!")
                end
            ]]
            
            -- Use syn.queue_on_teleport or queue_on_teleport depending on executor
            if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                syn.queue_on_teleport(teleportScript)
            else
                queue_on_teleport(teleportScript)
            end
        end
    end)
    
    return connection
end

-- Main execution logic
if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
    -- We're in the target place
    if isReExecution then
        print("Re-execution detected - performing final teleport")
        teleportToPosition()
        print("Auto-execution complete. Script will not run again automatically.")
    else
        -- First execution in target place
        print("First execution in target place - teleporting")
        teleportToPosition()
        
        -- Set up for potential future teleports
        setupTeleportMonitor()
    end
else
    -- We're not in the target place, teleport to the game
    print("Teleporting to target game...")
    local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
    
    local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
    local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
        TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId)
    end)
    
    if not success then
        print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
        if connection then
            connection:Disconnect()
        end
    end
end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "RNG",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- Global flag to control loop
_G.DiceSlapRunning = false

-- Services
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Slap Players",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        _G.DiceSlapRunning = state

        -- Function to check if player is in arena
        local function isInArena()
            local character = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.Character
            if character then
                local entered = character:FindFirstChild("entered")
                if entered then
                    return entered.Value == true
                end
            end
            return false
        end

        -- Function to check if a player has "entered" in their character
        local function hasEntered(player)
            if not player or not player.Character then return false end
            local entered = player.Character:FindFirstChild("entered")
            return entered ~= nil
        end

        -- Function to get error message based on conditions
        local function getErrorMessage()
            local leaderstats = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            if not leaderstats then
                return "⚠️ Error - Leaderstats not found!"
            end
            
            local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
            local hasDice = glove and glove.Value == "Dice"
            local inArena = isInArena()
            
            if hasDice and inArena then
                return nil -- No error
            elseif not hasDice and not inArena then
                return "⚠️ Error - Equip Dice Glove First / Enter Arena First"
            elseif hasDice and not inArena then
                return "⚠️ Error - Enter Arena First"
            elseif not hasDice and inArena then
                return "⚠️ Error - Equip Dice Glove First"
            end
            
            return "⚠️ Unknown Error"
        end

        -- Teleport to random player with "entered" (not self)
        local function teleportToRandomPlayer()
            -- Check if LocalPlayer and Character exist
            if not LocalPlayer then
                print("⚠️ LocalPlayer is nil!")
                return false
            end
            
            local localChar = LocalPlayer.Character
            if not localChar or not localChar:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                print("⚠️ Local character or HumanoidRootPart not found!")
                return false
            end
            
            local playerList = Players:GetPlayers()
            if not playerList or #playerList < 2 then
                print("⚠️ Not enough players to teleport.")
                return false
            end
            
            -- Filter players who have "entered" and are not local player
            local eligiblePlayers = {}
            for _, plr in ipairs(playerList) do
                if plr ~= LocalPlayer and hasEntered(plr) then
                    table.insert(eligiblePlayers, plr)
                end
            end
            
            if #eligiblePlayers == 0 then
                print("⚠️ No players with 'entered' found!")
                return false
            end
            
            local randomPlayer = eligiblePlayers[math.random(1, #eligiblePlayers)]
            
            if not randomPlayer or not randomPlayer.Character then
                return false
            end
            
            local char = randomPlayer.Character
            if not char or not char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                return false
            end
            
            local localHRP = localChar:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if not localHRP then
                return false
            end
            
            local targetHRP = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if not targetHRP then
                return false
            end
            
            -- Teleport to target
            localHRP.CFrame = targetHRP.CFrame
            print("✅ Teleported to: " .. randomPlayer.Name)
            return true
        end

        -- Fire DiceHit on all players
        local function fireDiceHitForAllPlayers()
            local diceHit = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("DiceHit")
            if not diceHit then
                print("⚠️ DiceHit remote not found!")
                return
            end
            
            for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player.Character then
                    local rightArm = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or player.Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
                    if rightArm then
                        pcall(function()
                            diceHit:FireServer(rightArm)
                        end)
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        -- Main loop
        local function runAutoDiceSlapLoop()
            local leaderstats = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            if not leaderstats then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Leaderstats not found!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 3
                })
                _G.DiceSlapRunning = false
                return
            end
            
            local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
            if not glove then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Glove stat not found!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 3
                })
                _G.DiceSlapRunning = false
                return
            end

            if glove.Value ~= "Dice" then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Dice glove.",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                _G.DiceSlapRunning = false
                return
            end

            while _G.DiceSlapRunning do
                pcall(function()
                    -- Check conditions
                    local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
                    if errorMsg then
                        if not _G.lastErrorShown or tick() - _G.lastErrorShown > 5 then
                            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                                Name = "Auto Slap Error",
                                Content = errorMsg,
                                Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                                Time = 3
                            })
                            _G.lastErrorShown = tick()
                        end
                        task.wait(1)
                        return
                    end
                    
                    -- Teleport to random player with "entered"
                    local teleported = teleportToRandomPlayer()
                    
                    if teleported then
                        task.wait(0.1)
                        fireDiceHitForAllPlayers()
                    end
                end)
                
                task.wait(0.3)
            end
        end

        if state then
            -- Check conditions before starting
            local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
            if errorMsg then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Auto Slap Error",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 4
                })
                _G.DiceSlapRunning = false
                return
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Slap (Dice)",
                Content = "Auto Slap Players Started!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
            _G.lastErrorShown = 0
            coroutine.wrap(runAutoDiceSlapLoop)()
        else

            _G.DiceSlapRunning = false
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Auto Dice Slap Aura",
	Callback = function()   
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Dice" then
-- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

-- Start the infinite loop to fire for all players
while true do
    -- Loop through each player in the game
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        -- Ensure the player has a character and it contains the "Head"
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Head") then
            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
            local args = {
                [1] = player.Character.Head
            }

            -- Fire the server with the "Head" part as an argument
            ReplicatedStorage.DiceHit:FireServer(unpack(args))
        end
    end

    -- Wait 1 second before running the loop again (adjust the wait time as needed)
    wait(0.5)
end
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Dice",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "fish",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- ===== VARIABLES =====
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")

-- Timer variables
local isAutoFishing = false
local fishStarted = false
local fishStopped = false
local fishFinished = false
local fishStartTime = nil
local fishElapsedTime = 0
local totalTimeNeeded = 60 * 60 -- 1 hour in seconds (3600 seconds)
local savedStoppedTime = nil

-- Display variables for Fish Status
local currentTimeWaiting = "Waiting for auto fish..."
local currentTimeStarted = "Not Started"
local currentTimeStopped = "Not Stopped"
local currentTimeFinished = "Not Finished"

-- Variables
local isAntiAfkEnabled = false
local ownDeepSlumberBadge = false
local autoFishLoop = nil
local autoFishEnabled = false
local remoteFired = false
local isFirstLoad = true -- Prevent initial trigger

-- Badge display variables
local badgeStatusText = "Loading..."

-- DEEP SLUMBER Badge ID (as string for comparison)
local DEEP_SLUMBER_BADGE_ID = "2130032297"

-- Function to check if player's model has "zzz" attribute (exists when sleeping)
local function hasZZZAttribute()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        local zzzValue = char:GetAttribute("zzz")
        return zzzValue ~= nil
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if player has entered arena (FIXED - uses "entered" value)
local function hasEntered()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        local entered = char:FindFirstChild("entered")
        if entered then
            return entered.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if player is in arena (for display)
local function isInArena()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        local entered = char:FindFirstChild("entered")
        if entered then
            return entered.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if ZZZZZZZ glove is equipped
local function hasZZZZZZZGlove()
    if player.leaderstats and player.leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove") then
        return player.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "ZZZZZZZ"
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if DEEP SLUMBER badge is owned using PlayerData path
local function checkDeepSlumberBadge()
    local playerData = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if not playerData then
        ownDeepSlumberBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(player.Name)
    if not playerFolder then
        ownDeepSlumberBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
    if not unlockedBadges then
        ownDeepSlumberBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
        local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
        
        if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
            local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
            
            for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                if cleanId == DEEP_SLUMBER_BADGE_ID then
                    ownDeepSlumberBadge = true
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    ownDeepSlumberBadge = false
    return false
end

-- Function to update badge status text
local function updateBadgeStatusText()
    local badgeStatus = ownDeepSlumberBadge and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    
    badgeStatusText = string.format([[
Owns DEEP SLUMBER Badge: %s
DEEP SLUMBER Badge Awards Glove: fish Glove
Entered Arena: %s
]],
    badgeStatus,
    inArenaStatus
)
    return badgeStatusText
end

-- Function to format time (Hours:Minutes:Seconds:Milliseconds)
local function formatTime(seconds, milliseconds)
    local hours = math.floor(seconds / 3600)
    local minutes = math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60)
    local secs = math.floor(seconds % 60)
    local ms = math.floor(milliseconds or 0)
    return string.format("%02d:%02d:%02d:%03d", hours, minutes, secs, ms)
end

-- Function to update fish status display
local function updateFishDisplay()
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    local zzzStatus = hasZZZAttribute() and "✅ Yes (Sleeping)" or "❌ No (Awake)"
    
    if fishFinished then
        currentTimeWaiting = "Finished!"
        currentTimeStarted = formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0)
        currentTimeStopped = "N/A"
        currentTimeFinished = formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0)
    elseif fishStopped then
        currentTimeWaiting = "Stopped"
        local elapsedMs = (fishElapsedTime - math.floor(fishElapsedTime)) * 1000
        currentTimeStarted = formatTime(fishElapsedTime, elapsedMs)
        currentTimeStopped = formatTime(fishElapsedTime, elapsedMs)
        currentTimeFinished = "Not Finished"
    elseif fishStarted then
        currentTimeWaiting = "Auto fish started..."
        local elapsedMs = (fishElapsedTime - math.floor(fishElapsedTime)) * 1000
        currentTimeStarted = formatTime(fishElapsedTime, elapsedMs)
        currentTimeStopped = "Not Stopped"
        currentTimeFinished = "Not Finished"
    elseif not isAutoFishing then
        currentTimeWaiting = "Waiting for auto fish..."
        currentTimeStarted = "Not Started"
        currentTimeStopped = "Not Stopped"
        currentTimeFinished = "Not Finished"
    end
    
    local antiAfkStatus = isAntiAfkEnabled and "Yes" or "No"
    
    local statusText = string.format([[
Auto fish Farm Time Waiting: %s
Auto fish Farm Time Started: %s
Auto fish Farm Time Stopped: %s
Auto fish Farm Time Finished: %s
Total Time Need: %s
ZZZ Attribute: %s
Entered Arena: %s
Anti AFK: %s
]],
    currentTimeWaiting,
    currentTimeStarted,
    currentTimeStopped,
    currentTimeFinished,
    formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0),
    zzzStatus,
    inArenaStatus,
    antiAfkStatus
    )
    
    return statusText
end

-- Create the TWO paragraphs
local FishStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Auto Fish Farm Status:", "Loading...")
local BadgeStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Badge Status:", "Loading badge info...")

-- ===== LOOP 1: FISH STATUS UPDATE (0.01 SECONDS) =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        local startTime = tick()
        
        if fishStarted and not fishFinished and not fishStopped then
            local currentTime = tick()
            fishElapsedTime = currentTime - fishStartTime
        end
        
        local statusText = updateFishDisplay()
        pcall(function()
            FishStatusParagraph:Set(statusText)
        end)
        
        local elapsed = tick() - startTime
        local waitTime = math.max(0.005, 0.01 - elapsed)
        task.wait(waitTime)
    end
end)

-- ===== LOOP 2: TIMER UPDATE (every frame for accuracy) =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        if fishStarted and not fishFinished and not fishStopped then
            local currentTime = tick()
            fishElapsedTime = currentTime - fishStartTime
            
            if fishElapsedTime >= totalTimeNeeded then
                fishFinished = true
                isAutoFishing = false
                fishStarted = false
                
                pcall(function()
                    AutoFish:Set(false)
                end)
            end
        end
        task.wait()
    end
end)

-- ===== LOOP 3: BADGE STATUS UPDATE (5 SECONDS) =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        checkDeepSlumberBadge()
        local badgeText = updateBadgeStatusText()
        pcall(function()
            BadgeStatusParagraph:Set(badgeText)
        end)
        task.wait(5)
    end
end)

-- Function to get error message based on conditions
local function getErrorMessage()
    local hasGlove = hasZZZZZZZGlove()
    local inArena = isInArena()
    
    if hasGlove and inArena then
        return nil -- No error
    elseif not hasGlove and not inArena then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip ZZZZZZZ Glove / Enter Arena First"
    elseif hasGlove and not inArena then
        return "⚠️ Error - Enter Arena First"
    elseif not hasGlove and inArena then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip ZZZZZZZ Glove"
    end
    
    return "⚠️ Unknown Error"
end

-- Function to fire ZZZZZZZSleep remote
local function fireSleepRemote()
    pcall(function()
        local sleepRemote = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("ZZZZZZZSleep")
        if sleepRemote then
            sleepRemote:FireServer()
            print("🔥 Sleep remote fired!")
        end
    end)
end

-- ===== AUTO GET FISH GLOVE TOGGLE =====
AutoFish = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Get fish Glove",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        -- Skip if this is the first load/initial trigger
        if isFirstLoad then
            isFirstLoad = false
            return
        end
        
        if Value then
            -- Check conditions before starting
            local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
            if errorMsg then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 4
                })
                AutoFish:Set(false)
                return
            end
            
            -- Reset remote fired flag
            remoteFired = false
            
            -- Reset and start timer
            isAutoFishing = true
            fishStarted = true
            fishStopped = false
            fishFinished = false
            fishStartTime = tick()
            fishElapsedTime = 0
            savedStoppedTime = nil
            autoFishEnabled = true
            
            -- DO TELEPORT ONCE
            local char = player.Character
            if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-17926, 60, 3531)
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- USE REMOTE ONCE (if awake / no zzz attribute)
            if not hasZZZAttribute() then
                fireSleepRemote()
                remoteFired = true
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Fish",
                Content = "Started! Teleported and used remote.",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            -- DISABLE TOGGLE
            autoFishEnabled = false
            
            -- Stop the loop if any
            if autoFishLoop then
                task.cancel(autoFishLoop)
                autoFishLoop = nil
            end
            
            -- Fire remote to WAKE UP (toggle off)
            fireSleepRemote()
            
            -- Reset timer states
            isAutoFishing = false
            fishStopped = true
            fishStarted = false
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Fish",
                Content = "Stopped! Time elapsed: " .. formatTime(fishElapsedTime, 0),
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end    
})

-- ===== ANTI AFK TOGGLE =====
AntiAfk = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Anti Afk",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        isAntiAfkEnabled = Value
        
        if Value then
            local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
            game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
            end)
        end
    end    
})

-- Initial updates
checkDeepSlumberBadge()
BadgeStatusParagraph:Set(updateBadgeStatusText())
FishStatusParagraph:Set(updateFishDisplay())

end

	PremiumOnly = false
	})

task.wait(0.5)
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(204, -16, 14)
task.wait(0.5)
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").funnyhilariousbeartrap:FireServer()
task.wait(3)
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = game.workspace.BearTrap.CFrame
else

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Obby",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Section = Tab:AddSection({
    Name = "Obby's Status Counter"
})

-- ===== VARIABLES =====
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")

-- Touch counting variables
local touchedPlayers = {} -- Table to track which players have touched
local totalPeopleTouched = 0
local totalPeopleNeeded = 10
local isTracking = false

-- Variables
local isAntiAfkEnabled = false
local ownUltrarockBadge = false
local isTrackingActive = false

-- Badge display variables
local badgeStatusText = "Loading..."

-- ULTRAROCK Badge ID (as string for comparison)
local ULTRAROCK_BADGE_ID = "2130463063"

-- Valid gloves for tracking
local validGloves = {
    "Diamond",
    "MEGAROCK",
    "CUSTOM"
}

-- Function to check if player has valid glove
local function hasValidGlove()
    if player.leaderstats and player.leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove") then
        local currentGlove = player.leaderstats.Glove.Value
        for _, glove in ipairs(validGloves) do
            if currentGlove == glove then
                return true
            end
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if player has entered arena (FIXED - uses "entered" value)
local function hasEntered()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        local entered = char:FindFirstChild("entered")
        if entered then
            return entered.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if player is in arena (for display)
local function isInArena()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        local entered = char:FindFirstChild("entered")
        if entered then
            return entered.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if player has rock
local function hasRock()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        return char:FindFirstChild("rock") ~= nil
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if ULTRAROCK badge is owned using PlayerData path
local function checkUltrarockBadge()
    local playerData = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if not playerData then
        ownUltrarockBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(player.Name)
    if not playerFolder then
        ownUltrarockBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
    if not unlockedBadges then
        ownUltrarockBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
        local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
        
        if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
            local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
            
            for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                if cleanId == ULTRAROCK_BADGE_ID then
                    ownUltrarockBadge = true
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    ownUltrarockBadge = false
    return false
end

-- Function to update badge status text
local function updateBadgeStatusText()
    local badgeStatus = ownUltrarockBadge and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    
    badgeStatusText = string.format([[
Owns ULTRAROCK Badge: %s
ULTRAROCK Badge Awards Glove: Obby Glove
Entered Arena: %s
]],
    badgeStatus,
    inArenaStatus
)
    return badgeStatusText
end

-- Function to update tracking display
local function updateTrackingDisplay()
    local antiAfkStatus = isAntiAfkEnabled and "Yes" or "No"
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    local rockStatus = hasRock() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    
    local statusText = string.format([[
Total People Touched You: %d/%d
Total People Need To Touch You: %d
Rock Form Active: %s
Entered Arena: %s
Anti AFK: %s
]],
    totalPeopleTouched,
    totalPeopleNeeded,
    totalPeopleNeeded,
    rockStatus,
    inArenaStatus,
    antiAfkStatus
    )
    
    return statusText
end

-- Function to get error message based on conditions
local function getErrorMessage()
    local hasGlove = hasValidGlove()
    local inArena = isInArena()
    local hasRockForm = hasRock()
    
    if hasGlove and inArena and hasRockForm then
        return nil -- No error
    elseif not hasGlove and not inArena and not hasRockForm then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip Diamond/MEGAROCK/CUSTOM / Enter Arena / Get Rock Form"
    elseif hasGlove and not inArena and not hasRockForm then
        return "⚠️ Error - Enter Arena / Get Rock Form"
    elseif hasGlove and inArena and not hasRockForm then
        return "⚠️ Error - Get Rock Form First (Use MEGAROCK ability)"
    elseif hasGlove and not inArena and hasRockForm then
        return "⚠️ Error - Enter Arena First"
    elseif not hasGlove and inArena and hasRockForm then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip Diamond/MEGAROCK/CUSTOM Glove"
    elseif not hasGlove and not inArena and hasRockForm then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip Diamond/MEGAROCK/CUSTOM / Enter Arena"
    elseif not hasGlove and inArena and not hasRockForm then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip Diamond/MEGAROCK/CUSTOM / Get Rock Form"
    end
    
    return "⚠️ Unknown Error"
end

-- Function to check for players touching the rock
local function startTouchTracking()
    isTrackingActive = true
    
    -- Track when players touch the rock
    local function onPartTouched(otherPart)
        if not isTracking then return end
        
        local character = otherPart.Parent
        if not character then return end
        
        local humanoid = character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
        if not humanoid then return end
        
        local otherPlayer = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
        if not otherPlayer then return end
        
        -- Don't count yourself
        if otherPlayer == player then return end
        
        local playerName = otherPlayer.Name
        
        -- Check if this player hasn't touched before
        if not touchedPlayers[playerName] then
            touchedPlayers[playerName] = true
            totalPeopleTouched = totalPeopleTouched + 1
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "ULTRAROCK",
                Content = playerName .. " touched your rock! (" .. totalPeopleTouched .. "/" .. totalPeopleNeeded .. ")",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 2
            })
            
            -- Update display
            UltrarockStatusParagraph:Set(updateTrackingDisplay())
            
            -- Check if reached goal
            if totalPeopleTouched >= totalPeopleNeeded then
                isTracking = false
                
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "ULTRAROCK",
                    Content = "Goal reached! " .. totalPeopleTouched .. "/" .. totalPeopleNeeded .. " players touched you!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 5
                })
                
                -- Disable the toggle
                pcall(function()
                    UltrarockToggle:Set(false)
                end)
            end
        end
    end
    
    -- Wait for rock to appear
    local function waitForRock()
        while isTracking do
            local char = player.Character
            if char then
                local rock = char:FindFirstChild("rock")
                if rock and rock:IsA("BasePart") then
                    -- Connect touch event
                    rock.Touched:Connect(onPartTouched)
                    break
                end
            end
            task.wait(0.5)
        end
    end
    
    task.spawn(waitForRock)
end

-- Create the TWO paragraphs
local UltrarockStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("ULTRAROCK Status:", "Loading...")
local BadgeStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Badge Status:", "Loading badge info...")

-- ===== LOOP: STATUS UPDATE (every 0.5 seconds) =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        local statusText = updateTrackingDisplay()
        pcall(function()
            UltrarockStatusParagraph:Set(statusText)
        end)
        task.wait(0.5)
    end
end)

-- ===== LOOP: BADGE STATUS UPDATE (5 SECONDS) =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        checkUltrarockBadge()
        local badgeText = updateBadgeStatusText()
        pcall(function()
            BadgeStatusParagraph:Set(badgeText)
        end)
        task.wait(5)
    end
end)

-- ===== ULTRAROCK TRACKING TOGGLE =====
local toggleEnabled = false

UltrarockToggle = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "ULTRAROCK Badge Tracker",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            -- Check conditions
            local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
            if errorMsg then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 4
                })
                UltrarockToggle:Set(false)
                return
            end
            
            -- Reset tracking
            touchedPlayers = {}
            totalPeopleTouched = 0
            isTracking = true
            
            -- Start touch tracking
            startTouchTracking()
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "ULTRAROCK",
                Content = "Tracking started! Need " .. totalPeopleNeeded .. " different players to touch your rock.",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 4
            })
        else
            -- Stop tracking
            isTracking = false
            isTrackingActive = false
            
        end
    end
})

-- ===== ANTI AFK TOGGLE =====
AntiAfk = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Anti Afk",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        isAntiAfkEnabled = Value
        
        if Value then
            local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
            game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
            end)
        end
    end    
})

-- Initial updates
checkUltrarockBadge()
BadgeStatusParagraph:Set(updateBadgeStatusText())
UltrarockStatusParagraph:Set(updateTrackingDisplay())

Tab:AddButton({

    Callback = function()
fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["Rocky"].ClickDetector)

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Use Rocky Ability",
    Callback = function()
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):WaitForChild("RockyShoot"):FireServer()
    end
})

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Voodoo",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- ===== VARIABLES =====
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")

-- Timer variables
local isAutoVoodoo = false
local voodooStarted = false
local voodooStopped = false
local voodooFinished = false
local voodooStartTime = nil
local voodooElapsedTime = 0
local totalTimeNeeded = 60 * 60 -- 1 hour in seconds (3600 seconds)
local savedStoppedTime = nil

-- Display variables for Voodoo Status
local currentTimeWaiting = "Waiting for auto voodoo..."
local currentTimeStarted = "Not Started"
local currentTimeStopped = "Not Stopped"
local currentTimeFinished = "Not Finished"

-- Variables
local isAntiAfkEnabled = false
local ownInsanityBadge = false
local autoVoodooLoop = nil

-- Badge display variables
local badgeStatusText = "Loading..."

-- Insanity Badge ID (as string for comparison)
local INSANITY_BADGE_ID = "2132544202"

-- Function to check if player has entered arena (FIXED - uses "entered" value)
local function hasEntered()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        local entered = char:FindFirstChild("entered")
        if entered then
            return entered.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if player is in arena (for display)
local function isInArena()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        local entered = char:FindFirstChild("entered")
        if entered then
            return entered.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if Ghost glove is equipped
local function hasGhostGlove()
    if player.leaderstats and player.leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove") then
        return player.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Ghost"
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to check if Insanity badge is owned using PlayerData path
local function checkInsanityBadge()
    local playerData = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if not playerData then
        ownInsanityBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(player.Name)
    if not playerFolder then
        ownInsanityBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
    if not unlockedBadges then
        ownInsanityBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
        local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
        
        if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
            local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
            
            for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                if cleanId == INSANITY_BADGE_ID then
                    ownInsanityBadge = true
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    ownInsanityBadge = false
    return false
end

-- Function to update badge status text
local function updateBadgeStatusText()
    local badgeStatus = ownInsanityBadge and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    
    badgeStatusText = string.format([[
Owns Insanity Badge: %s
Insanity Badge Awards Glove: Voodoo Glove
Entered Arena: %s
]],
    badgeStatus,
    inArenaStatus
)
    return badgeStatusText
end

-- Function to format time (Hours:Minutes:Seconds:Milliseconds)
local function formatTime(seconds, milliseconds)
    local hours = math.floor(seconds / 3600)
    local minutes = math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60)
    local secs = math.floor(seconds % 60)
    local ms = math.floor(milliseconds or 0)
    return string.format("%02d:%02d:%02d:%03d", hours, minutes, secs, ms)
end

-- Function to get error message based on conditions
local function getErrorMessage()
    local hasGlove = hasGhostGlove()
    local inArena = isInArena()
    
    if hasGlove and inArena then
        return nil -- No error
    elseif not hasGlove and not inArena then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip Ghost Glove / Enter Arena First"
    elseif hasGlove and not inArena then
        return "⚠️ Error - Enter Arena First"
    elseif not hasGlove and inArena then
        return "⚠️ Error - Equip Ghost Glove"
    end
    
    return "⚠️ Unknown Error"
end

-- Function to fire Ghost invisibility remote
local function fireGhostRemote()
    pcall(function()
        local ghostRemote = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Ghostinvisibilityactivated")
        if ghostRemote then
            ghostRemote:FireServer()
            print("👻 Ghost remote fired!")
        end
    end)
end

-- Function to update voodoo status display
local function updateVoodooDisplay()
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    local ghostStatus = hasGhostGlove() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    
    if voodooFinished then
        currentTimeWaiting = "Finished!"
        currentTimeStarted = formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0)
        currentTimeStopped = "N/A"
        currentTimeFinished = formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0)
    elseif voodooStopped then
        currentTimeWaiting = "Stopped"
        local elapsedMs = (voodooElapsedTime - math.floor(voodooElapsedTime)) * 1000
        currentTimeStarted = formatTime(voodooElapsedTime, elapsedMs)
        currentTimeStopped = formatTime(voodooElapsedTime, elapsedMs)
        currentTimeFinished = "Not Finished"
    elseif voodooStarted then
        currentTimeWaiting = "Auto voodoo started..."
        local elapsedMs = (voodooElapsedTime - math.floor(voodooElapsedTime)) * 1000
        currentTimeStarted = formatTime(voodooElapsedTime, elapsedMs)
        currentTimeStopped = "Not Stopped"
        currentTimeFinished = "Not Finished"
    elseif not isAutoVoodoo then
        currentTimeWaiting = "Waiting for auto voodoo..."
        currentTimeStarted = "Not Started"
        currentTimeStopped = "Not Stopped"
        currentTimeFinished = "Not Finished"
    end
    
    local antiAfkStatus = isAntiAfkEnabled and "Yes" or "No"
    
    local statusText = string.format([[
Auto Voodoo Farm Time Waiting: %s
Auto Voodoo Farm Time Started: %s
Auto Voodoo Farm Time Stopped: %s
Auto Voodoo Farm Time Finished: %s
Total Time Need: %s
Ghost Glove Equipped: %s
Entered Arena: %s
Anti AFK: %s
]],
    currentTimeWaiting,
    currentTimeStarted,
    currentTimeStopped,
    currentTimeFinished,
    formatTime(totalTimeNeeded, 0),
    ghostStatus,
    inArenaStatus,
    antiAfkStatus
    )
    
    return statusText
end

-- Create the TWO paragraphs
local VoodooStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Auto Voodoo Farm Status:", "Loading...")
local BadgeStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Badge Status:", "Loading badge info...")

-- ===== LOOP 1: VOODOO STATUS UPDATE (0.01 SECONDS) =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        local startTime = tick()
        
        if voodooStarted and not voodooFinished and not voodooStopped then
            local currentTime = tick()
            voodooElapsedTime = currentTime - voodooStartTime
        end
        
        local statusText = updateVoodooDisplay()
        pcall(function()
            VoodooStatusParagraph:Set(statusText)
        end)
        
        local elapsed = tick() - startTime
        local waitTime = math.max(0.005, 0.01 - elapsed)
        task.wait(waitTime)
    end
end)

-- ===== LOOP 2: TIMER UPDATE (every frame for accuracy) =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        if voodooStarted and not voodooFinished and not voodooStopped then
            local currentTime = tick()
            voodooElapsedTime = currentTime - voodooStartTime
            
            if voodooElapsedTime >= totalTimeNeeded then
                voodooFinished = true
                isAutoVoodoo = false
                voodooStarted = false
                
                pcall(function()
                    AutoVoodoo:Set(false)
                end)
            end
        end
        task.wait()
    end
end)

-- ===== LOOP 3: BADGE STATUS UPDATE (5 SECONDS) =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        checkInsanityBadge()
        local badgeText = updateBadgeStatusText()
        pcall(function()
            BadgeStatusParagraph:Set(badgeText)
        end)
        task.wait(5)
    end
end)

-- ===== AUTO GET VOODOO GLOVE TOGGLE =====
AutoVoodoo = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Get Voodoo Glove",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            -- Check conditions before starting
            local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
            if errorMsg then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 4
                })
                AutoVoodoo:Set(false)
                return
            end
            
            -- Reset and start timer
            isAutoVoodoo = true
            voodooStarted = true
            voodooStopped = false
            voodooFinished = false
            voodooStartTime = tick()
            voodooElapsedTime = 0
            savedStoppedTime = nil
            
            -- Start the voodoo loop
            if autoVoodooLoop then
                task.cancel(autoVoodooLoop)
                autoVoodooLoop = nil
            end
            
            autoVoodooLoop = task.spawn(function()
                while AutoVoodoo and isAutoVoodoo and not voodooFinished do
                    -- Check conditions every iteration
                    local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
                    if errorMsg then
                        OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                            Name = "Auto Voodoo",
                            Content = errorMsg,
                            Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                            Time = 3
                        })
                        AutoVoodoo:Set(false)
                        break
                    end
                    
                    -- Teleport to position
                    local char = player.Character
                    if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(10001, -42, 10000)
                        task.wait(1)
                    end
                    
                    -- Fire remote
                    fireGhostRemote()
                    
                    -- Update timer
                    if voodooStarted and not voodooFinished then
                        local currentTime = tick()
                        voodooElapsedTime = currentTime - voodooStartTime
                        
                        if voodooElapsedTime >= totalTimeNeeded then
                            voodooFinished = true
                            isAutoVoodoo = false
                            voodooStarted = false
                            AutoVoodoo:Set(false)
                            break
                        end
                    end
                    
                    task.wait(1.5) -- Wait between attempts
                end
            end)
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Voodoo",
                Content = "Started! Will run for 1 hour",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            -- DISABLE TOGGLE
            if autoVoodooLoop then
                task.cancel(autoVoodooLoop)
                autoVoodooLoop = nil
            end
            isAutoVoodoo = false
            voodooStopped = true
            voodooStarted = false
            savedStoppedTime = voodooElapsedTime
            
        end
    end    
})

-- ===== ANTI AFK TOGGLE =====
AntiAfk = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Anti Afk",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        isAntiAfkEnabled = Value
        
        if Value then
            local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
            game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
            end)
        end
    end    
})

-- Initial updates
checkInsanityBadge()
BadgeStatusParagraph:Set(updateBadgeStatusText())
VoodooStatusParagraph:Set(updateVoodooDisplay())

end

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Someone Using Confusion?",
    Callback = function()
        local found = false

        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            if leaderstats then
                local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                if glove and glove.Value == "Confusion" then
                    found = true
                    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                        Name = "Detected!",
                        Content = player.Name .. " has equipped the Confusion glove.",
                        Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        end

        if not found then
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "No one has equipped the Confusion glove",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Confusion Player",
    Callback = function()
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local foundPlayer = nil

        for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= localPlayer then
                local stats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                if stats and stats:FindFirstChild("Glove") and stats.Glove.Value == "Confusion" then
                    foundPlayer = player
                    break
                end
            end
        end

        if foundPlayer and foundPlayer.Character and foundPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local hrp = foundPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
            localPlayer.Character:PivotTo(hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)) -- Teleport above

            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Teleported To: " .. foundPlayer.Name,
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Confusion Player Not Found",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})
