do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Tinkerer",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Null Zone Place + NOT AUTO GETS GLOVE (1)",
    Callback = function()
        local Players = game:GetService("Players")
        local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
        local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
        local player = Players.LocalPlayer
        
        -- Badge IDs
        local BOB_BADGE_ID = "2125950512"
        local ROB_BADGE_ID = "2147429609"
        
        -- Function to check if a badge is owned using PlayerData path
        local function checkBadgeOwned(badgeId)
            local playerData = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
            if not playerData then
                return false
            end
            
            local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(player.Name)
            if not playerFolder then
                return false
            end
            
            local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
            if not unlockedBadges then
                return false
            end
            
            if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
                local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
                
                if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
                    local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
                    
                    for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                        local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                        if cleanId == badgeId then
                            return true
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            
            return false
        end
        
        -- Check if player has both badges
        local hasBobBadge = checkBadgeOwned(BOB_BADGE_ID)
        local hasRobBadge = checkBadgeOwned(ROB_BADGE_ID)
        
        if hasBobBadge and hasRobBadge then
            -- Both badges owned, execute the sequence
            local character = player.Character
            if not character or not character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Character not found!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 3
                })
                return
            end
            
            local hrp = character.HumanoidRootPart
            
            -- Execute sequence
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new()
            task.wait(0.5)
            
            -- Rob ClickDetector
            local robClick = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Lobby") and Workspace.Lobby:FindFirstChild("rob") and Workspace.Lobby.rob:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector")
            if robClick then
                fireclickdetector(robClick)
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Rob Remote
            local robRemote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("rob")
            if robRemote then
                robRemote:FireServer()
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Bob ClickDetector
            local bobClick = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Lobby") and Workspace.Lobby:FindFirstChild("bob") and Workspace.Lobby.bob:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector")
            if bobClick then
                fireclickdetector(bobClick)
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Bob Remote
            local bobRemote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("bob")
            if bobRemote then
                bobRemote:FireServer()
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Default ClickDetector
            local defaultClick = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Lobby") and Workspace.Lobby:FindFirstChild("Default") and Workspace.Lobby.Default:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector")
            if defaultClick then
                fireclickdetector(defaultClick)
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Teleport to position
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(-909, 328, 2)
            task.wait(0.5)
            
            -- Teleport back
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new()
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Null Zone sequence completed!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            -- Missing one or both badges
            local missing = {}
            if not hasBobBadge then
                table.insert(missing, "Bob")
            end
            if not hasRobBadge then
                table.insert(missing, "Rob (Emissary Of Light)")
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Missing badges: " .. table.concat(missing, " & "),
                Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                Time = 4
            })
        end
    end
})

-- Auto Teleport to Tinkerer Position + Get Tinkerer
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Null Zone + Get Tinkerer (2)",
    Callback = function()
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        if currentPlaceId == 6403373529 then
            -- Check if player has Pan glove equipped
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            if player.leaderstats and player.leaderstats.Glove and player.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Pan" then
                -- Player has Pan equipped, teleport to position
                if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(18662, 2993, -298)
                    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                        Name = "Teleported!",
                        Content = "Pan user teleported to Tinkerer position",
                        Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                        Time = 5
                    })
                end
            else
                -- Player doesn't have Pan equipped
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Pan glove first!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                    Time = 5
                })
            end
            
        elseif currentPlaceId == 14422118326 then
            -- Already in Null Zone, get Tinkerer glove
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(4833.31, -214, 800.529)
                wait(2)
                for _, child in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                    if child:FindFirstChild("Handle") and child.Handle:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector") then
                        fireclickdetector(child.Handle.ClickDetector)
                        OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                            Name = "Success!",
                            Content = "Got Tinkerer glove!",
                            Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                            Time = 5
                        })
                        break
                    end
                end
            end
            
        else
            -- Not in either required place, teleport to Null Zone
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Teleporting...",
                Content = "Going to Null Zone",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                Time = 3
            })
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(14422118326)
            end)
            
            if success then
                -- Queue script to get Tinkerer after teleport
                game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                    if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                        local tinkererScript = [[
                            wait(3)
                            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                            if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(4833.31, -214, 800.529)
                                wait(2)
                                for _, child in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                                    if child:FindFirstChild("Handle") and child.Handle:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector") then
                                        fireclickdetector(child.Handle.ClickDetector)
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        ]]
                        
                        if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                            syn.queue_on_teleport(tinkererScript)
                        else
                            queue_on_teleport(tinkererScript)
                        end
                    end
                end)
            else
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Teleport Failed",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                    Time = 5
                })
            end
        end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Necromancer",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

    local CandyCornCollector = "Teleport" -- Default fallback
local AutoCollectCandyCorns = false
local AutoServerhopCandyCorns = false

Tab:AddDropdown({
    Name = "Choose Option To Auto Collect Candy Corns",
    Default = "Teleport",
    Options = {"Teleport", "Bring"},
    Callback = function(Value)
        CandyCornCollector = Value
    end
})

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Collect Candy Corns",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        AutoCollectCandyCorns = Value
        
        if Value then
            -- Check if player already has the badge
            if hasNecromancerBadge() then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Already Have Badge",
                    Content = "You already have Necromancer glove badge! The farm will not work.",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7734059095",
                    Time = 5
                })
                AutoCollectCandyCorns = false
                return
            end
            
            if CandyCornCollector == "Teleport" then
                -- Auto Teleport to Candy Corns (BaseParts)
                task.spawn(function()
                    while AutoCollectCandyCorns do
                        -- Check for badge again in case they got it during farming
                        if hasNecromancerBadge() then
                            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                                Name = "Badge Obtained!",
                                Content = "You got the Necromancer glove badge! Farm stopped.",
                                Image = "rbxassetid://7734059095",
                                Time = 5
                            })
                            AutoCollectCandyCorns = false
                            break
                        end
                        
                        local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                        if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local foundCandyCorn = false
                            
                            -- Search for BaseParts in CandyCorns folder
                            for _, part in pairs(workspace.CandyCorns:GetChildren()) do
                                if not AutoCollectCandyCorns then break end
                                
                                if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                                    foundCandyCorn = true
                                    -- Teleport to the BasePart
                                    character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(part.Position + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0))
                                    task.wait(0.2) -- Small delay between teleports
                                    break -- Focus on one at a time
                                end
                            end
                            
                            if not foundCandyCorn then
                                task.wait(0.5) -- Wait if no candy corns found
                            end
                        end
                        task.wait()
                    end
                end)
            elseif CandyCornCollector == "Bring" then
                -- Auto Bring Candy Corns (BaseParts) to player - directly to touch
                task.spawn(function()
                    while AutoCollectCandyCorns do
                        -- Check for badge again in case they got it during farming
                        if hasNecromancerBadge() then
                            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                                Name = "Badge Obtained!",
                                Content = "You got the Necromancer glove badge! Farm stopped.",
                                Image = "rbxassetid://7734059095",
                                Time = 5
                            })
                            AutoCollectCandyCorns = false
                            break
                        end
                        
                        local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                        if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local humanoidRootPart = character.HumanoidRootPart
                            
                            -- Bring all BaseParts in CandyCorns folder directly to player
                            for _, part in pairs(workspace.CandyCorns:GetChildren()) do
                                if not AutoCollectCandyCorns then break end
                                
                                if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                                    -- Move the BasePart directly to player's position (touching)
                                    part.CFrame = humanoidRootPart.CFrame
                                end
                            end
                        end
                        task.wait(0.1)
                    end
                end)
            end
        end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Alchemist",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- Global flag to control loop
_G.PlagueSlapRunning = false

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Slap Players",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        _G.PlagueSlapRunning = state

        -- Teleport to random player (not self)
        local function teleportToRandomPlayer()
            local playerList = Players:GetPlayers()
            if #playerList > 1 then
                local randomPlayer
                repeat
                    randomPlayer = playerList[math.random(1, #playerList)]
                until randomPlayer ~= LocalPlayer

                local char = randomPlayer.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local localHRP = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if localHRP then
                        localHRP.CFrame = char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                    end
                end
            else
                warn("Not enough players to teleport.")
            end
        end

        -- Fire PlagueHit on all players
        local function firePlagueHitForAllPlayers()
            for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player.Character then
                    local rightArm = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") or player.Character:FindFirstChild("RightHand")
                    if rightArm then
                        ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("PlagueHit"):FireServer(rightArm)
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        -- Main loop
        local function runAutoPlagueSlapLoop()
            local leaderstats = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            local glove = leaderstats and leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")

            if not (glove and glove.Value == "Plague") then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Equip Plague glove.",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
                _G.PlagueSlapRunning = false
                return
            end

            while _G.PlagueSlapRunning do
                task.wait(0.5) -- cooldown between hits
                teleportToRandomPlayer()
                firePlagueHitForAllPlayers()
            end
        end

        if state then
            coroutine.wrap(runAutoPlagueSlapLoop)()
        else
            _G.PlagueSlapRunning = false
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Auto Slap Aura Players",
	Callback = function()   
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Plague" then
-- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

-- Start the infinite loop to fire for all players
while true do
    -- Loop through each player in the game
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        -- Ensure the player has a character and it contains the "Left Arm"
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Left Arm") then
            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
            local args = {
                [1] = player.Character["Left Arm"]
            }

            -- Fire the server with the "Left Arm" part as an argument
            ReplicatedStorage.PlagueHit:FireServer(unpack(args))
        end
    end

    -- Wait 1 second before running the loop again (adjust the wait time as needed)
    wait(0.5)
end
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Plague",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Apply Plague Effect To All Players (5+ Players Required)",
	Callback = function()   
		if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Plague" then
			-- Check if server has 5+ players
			local allPlayers = game.Players:GetPlayers()
			if #allPlayers < 5 then
				OrionLib:MakeNotification({
					Name = "Error",
					Content = "Need 5+ Players in server! Current: " .. #allPlayers,
					Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
					Time = 3
				})
				return
			end
			
			-- SERVICES
			local Players = game:GetService("Players")
			local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
			
			-- CONSTANTS & CONFIG
			local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
			
			-- ALL BODY PARTS (R6 + R15)
			local BODY_PARTS = {
				"Head",
				"UpperTorso",
				"LowerTorso",
				"LeftUpperArm",
				"LeftLowerArm",
				"LeftHand",
				"RightUpperArm",
				"RightLowerArm",
				"RightHand",
				"LeftUpperLeg",
				"LeftLowerLeg",
				"LeftFoot",
				"RightUpperLeg",
				"RightLowerLeg",
				"RightFoot",
				-- R6 fallback
				"Torso",
				"Left Arm",
				"Right Arm",
				"Left Leg",
				"Right Leg"
			}
			
			-- Get the remote
			local PlagueHitRemote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlagueHit")
			
			if not PlagueHitRemote then
				OrionLib:MakeNotification({
					Name = "Error",
					Content = "PlagueHit remote not found!",
					Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
					Time = 3
				})
				return
			end
			
			-- Fire PlagueHit on all players except local
			local playerCount = 0
			for _, player in ipairs(allPlayers) do
				-- Skip local player
				if player ~= LocalPlayer then
					local character = player.Character
					if character then
						-- Fire on all body parts
						for _, partName in ipairs(BODY_PARTS) do
							local part = character:FindFirstChild(partName)
							if part then
								PlagueHitRemote:FireServer(part)
							end
						end
						playerCount = playerCount + 1
					end
				end
			end
			
			OrionLib:MakeNotification({
				Name = "Success",
				Content = "Plague effect applied to " .. playerCount .. " players!",
				Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
				Time = 3
			})
			
		else
			OrionLib:MakeNotification({
				Name = "Error",
				Content = "Equip Plague Glove",
				Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
				Time = 3
			})
		end
	end
})

end

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport to Gardens And Ghouls Place (NOT AUTO GET GLOVE)",
    Callback = function()
        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local rep = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

        if player.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Alchemist" then
            rep.GeneralAbility:FireServer()

            local function mixItem(itemName, times)
                times = times or 1
                rep.Firework:InvokeServer()
                rep.AlchemistEvent:FireServer("AddItem", itemName)
                rep.AlchemistEvent:FireServer("EquipItem", itemName)
                for _ = 1, times do
                    rep.AlchemistEvent:FireServer("MixItem", itemName)
                end
            end

            -- Items to mix
            mixItem("Wild Vine", 3)
            mixItem("Blood Rose", 1)
            mixItem("Dark Root", 1)
            mixItem("Elder Wood", 1)
            mixItem("Jade Stone", 1)

            -- Final potion brew
            rep.AlchemistEvent:FireServer("BrewPotion")
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Equip Alchemist Glove",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Jester",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Random Player",
    Callback = function()
        local players = game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()
        local localPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
        
        -- Remove local player from the list
        local otherPlayers = {}
        for _, player in pairs(players) do
            if player ~= localPlayer and player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                table.insert(otherPlayers, player)
            end
        end
        
        if #otherPlayers > 0 then
            -- Select a random player
            local randomPlayer = otherPlayers[math.random(1, #otherPlayers)]
            
            if randomPlayer.Character and randomPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                local targetPosition = randomPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(targetPosition)
                print("Teleported to random player: " .. randomPlayer.Name)
            else
                print("Selected player doesn't have valid character")
            end
        else
            print("No other players found to teleport to")
        end
    end
})

end

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Jerry Boss Fight Place + Auto Get Santa",
    Callback = function()
local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
if currentPlaceId == 6403373529 then
    -- First place (6403373529) - Snowpeeps and Teleport only
    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
    
    -- Click all Snowpeeps first (using correct path: workspace.Arena.XmasSnowPeeps)
    wait(0.2)
    local arena = workspace:FindFirstChild("Arena")
    if arena then
        local xmasSnowPeeps = arena:FindFirstChild("XmasSnowPeeps")
        if xmasSnowPeeps then
            for _, peep in ipairs(xmasSnowPeeps:GetChildren()) do
                if peep:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector") then
                    fireclickdetector(peep.ClickDetector)
                    wait(0.1) -- Small delay between clicks
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    -- Teleport to position
    wait(0.2)
    if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(2, -5, 353)
    end
    
elseif currentPlaceId == 95706409702231 then
    -- Second place (95706409702231) - Teleport and Anti-AFK
    -- This will auto-execute when arriving at the second place
    local function executeSecondPlaceScript()
        task.wait(20) -- Wait 20 seconds after arriving
        
        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            -- Teleport to position
            player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-6, 21, -542)
            
            -- Enable Anti AFK
            _G.AntiAfk = true
            local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
            
            game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                if _G.AntiAfk then
                    VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                    VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
                end
            end)
            
            print("Auto-executed: Teleported to position and enabled Anti-AFK")
        end
    end
    
    -- Auto-execute the function
    executeSecondPlaceScript()
end

-- Auto-execution for when teleporting from first place to second place
-- This sets up the script to run automatically after teleport
game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
    if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
        local targetPlaceId = 95706409702231 -- Second place ID
        local teleportScript = [[
            -- Wait for game to load
            wait(5)
            
            -- Check if we're in the target place
            if game.PlaceId == ]] .. targetPlaceId .. [[ then
                -- Wait 20 seconds, then execute
                task.wait(20)
                
                local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    -- Teleport to position
                    player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-6, 21, -542)
                    
                    -- Enable Anti AFK
                    _G.AntiAfk = true
                    local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
                    
                    game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                        if _G.AntiAfk then
                            VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                            VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end
        ]]
        
        -- Queue the script to run after teleport
        if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
            syn.queue_on_teleport(teleportScript)
        elseif queue_on_teleport then
            queue_on_teleport(teleportScript)
        end
    end
end)
end
})

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Bring Bus",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value) 
        Giftfarm = Value
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while Giftfarm do
                local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                if not player then 
                    task.wait(0.1) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local character = player.Character
                if not character or not character.Parent then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if not hrp then 
                    task.wait(0.01) 
                    continue 
                end
                
                -- Find BusModel (MeshPart) in workspace
                for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v.Name == "BusModel" and v:IsA("MeshPart") then
                        pcall(function()
                            -- Store original properties
                            local originalCFrame = v.CFrame
                            local originalAnchored = v.Anchored
                            
                            -- Remove TouchInterest if it exists
                            for _, child in pairs(v:GetChildren()) do
                                if child:IsA("TouchInterest") then
                                    child:Destroy()
                                end
                            end
                            
                            -- Bring bus to player
                            v.Anchored = false
                            v.CFrame = hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 0, 5) -- Slightly in front of player
                            task.wait(0.05)
                            
                            -- Restore original position (optional - comment out if you want bus to stay)
                            -- v.CFrame = originalCFrame
                            -- v.Anchored = originalAnchored
                        end)
                    end
                end
                
                task.wait(0.05) -- Fast loop for better collection
            end
        end)
    end
})

-- Services
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

-- Badge IDs (as strings for comparison)
local ROB_BADGE_ID = "2127429609" -- Emissary Of Light / rob Glove
local BOB_BADGE_ID = "2125950512" -- bob Glove

-- Function to check if a badge is owned using PlayerData path
local function checkBadgeOwned(badgeId)
    local playerData = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if not playerData then
        return false
    end
    
    local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(LocalPlayer.Name)
    if not playerFolder then
        return false
    end
    
    local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
    if not unlockedBadges then
        return false
    end
    
    if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
        local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
        
        if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
            local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
            
            for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                if cleanId == badgeId then
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    return false
end

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "The Null Zone (2)",
    Callback = function()
        -- Check if player has Rob and Bob badges
        local hasRobBadge = checkBadgeOwned(ROB_BADGE_ID)
        local hasBobBadge = checkBadgeOwned(BOB_BADGE_ID)
        
        if hasRobBadge and hasBobBadge then
            -- Both badges owned, execute the sequence
            local player = LocalPlayer
            local character = player.Character
            
            if not character or not character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Character not found!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 3
                })
                return
            end
            
            local hrp = character.HumanoidRootPart
            
            -- Execute the sequence
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new()
            task.wait(0.5)
            
            -- Rob ClickDetector
            local robClick = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Lobby") and Workspace.Lobby:FindFirstChild("rob") and Workspace.Lobby.rob:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector")
            if robClick then
                fireclickdetector(robClick)
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Rob Remote
            local robRemote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("rob")
            if robRemote then
                robRemote:FireServer()
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Bob ClickDetector
            local bobClick = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Lobby") and Workspace.Lobby:FindFirstChild("bob") and Workspace.Lobby.bob:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector")
            if bobClick then
                fireclickdetector(bobClick)
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Bob Remote
            local bobRemote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("bob")
            if bobRemote then
                bobRemote:FireServer()
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Default ClickDetector
            local defaultClick = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Lobby") and Workspace.Lobby:FindFirstChild("Default") and Workspace.Lobby.Default:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector")
            if defaultClick then
                fireclickdetector(defaultClick)
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            
            -- Teleport to position
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new(-909, 328, 2)
            task.wait(0.5)
            
            -- Teleport back
            hrp.CFrame = CFrame.new()
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Null Zone sequence completed!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            -- Missing one or both badges
            local missing = {}
            if not hasRobBadge then
                table.insert(missing, "Rob (Emissary Of Light)")
            end
            if not hasBobBadge then
                table.insert(missing, "Bob")
            end
            
            local message = "Need: " .. table.concat(missing, " & ")
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = message,
                Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                Time = 4
            })
        end
    end
})

-- Second Button: Teleport to position and get Alchemist Hood
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To ? Place + Collect Alchemist Hood",
    Callback = function()
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        if currentPlaceId == 6403373529 then
            -- Teleport to ? place
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Teleporting...",
                Content = "Going to ? place for Alchemist Hood",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                Time = 3
            })
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(11828384869)
            end)
            
            if success then
                -- Queue script to get Alchemist Hood after teleport
                game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                    if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                        local hoodScript = [[
                            wait(3)
                            local lp = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                            local hrp = lp.Character and lp.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            local target = workspace:FindFirstChild("_ugcQuestObjectEludeHat")
                            if target and target:FindFirstChild("Handle") and hrp then
                                if hrp.Anchored then 
                                    hrp.Anchored = false
                                    task.wait(0.5) 
                                end
                                hrp.CFrame = target.Handle.CFrame
                            end
                        ]]
                        
                        if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                            syn.queue_on_teleport(hoodScript)
                        else
                            queue_on_teleport(hoodScript)
                        end
                    end
                end)
            else
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Teleport Failed",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                    Time = 5
                })
            end
            
        elseif currentPlaceId == 11828384869 then
            -- Already in ? place, get Alchemist Hood
            local lp = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local hrp = lp.Character and lp.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            local target = workspace:FindFirstChild("_ugcQuestObjectEludeHat")
            if target and target:FindFirstChild("Handle") and hrp then
                if hrp.Anchored then 
                    hrp.Anchored = false
                    task.wait(0.5) 
                end
                hrp.CFrame = target.Handle.CFrame
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Success!",
                    Content = "Got Alchemist Hood!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                    Time = 5
                })
            else
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Alchemist Hood not found!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                    Time = 5
                })
            end
            
        else
            -- Not in either required place, teleport to ? place
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Teleporting...",
                Content = "Going to ? place for Alchemist Hood",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                Time = 3
            })
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(11828384869)
            end)
            
            if success then
                -- Queue script to get Alchemist Hood after teleport
                game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                    if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                        local hoodScript = [[
                            wait(3)
                            local lp = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                            local hrp = lp.Character and lp.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            local target = workspace:FindFirstChild("_ugcQuestObjectEludeHat")
                            if target and target:FindFirstChild("Handle") and hrp then
                                if hrp.Anchored then 
                                    hrp.Anchored = false
                                    task.wait(0.5) 
                                end
                                hrp.CFrame = target.Handle.CFrame
                            end
                        ]]
                        
                        if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                            syn.queue_on_teleport(hoodScript)
                        else
                            queue_on_teleport(hoodScript)
                        end
                    end
                end)
            else
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Teleport Failed",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7733919105",
                    Time = 5
                })
            end
        end
    end
})

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Admin",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To The Staff Application Place (NOT AUTO GET GLOVE)",
    Callback = function()
        local firstPlaceId = 6403373529
        local secondPlaceId = 16034567693
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        -- Function to execute Admin script
        local function executeAdminScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                game.Loaded:Wait()
            end

            if getgenv().AutoGetAdminExecuted == true then return end
            getgenv().AutoGetAdminExecuted = true

            if game.PlaceId == secondPlaceId then
                -- Second place: Staff Application
                task.wait()
                
                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(502, 76, 59)
                end
                
                task.wait(0.1)
                
                -- Anti-afk
                if getconnections then
                    for i,v in next, getconnections(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Idled) do
                        v:Disable() 
                    end
                else
                    while task.wait(10) do
                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Jump = true
                        end
                    end
                end
                
            elseif game.PlaceId == firstPlaceId then
                -- First place: Slap Battles
                if game.ReplicatedStorage.Assets:FindFirstChild("Retro") then
                    game.ReplicatedStorage.Assets.Retro.Parent = workspace
                end
                
                repeat task.wait(0.1) until workspace:FindFirstChild("Retro")
                
                task.wait(0.1)
                
                for i,v in pairs(workspace.Retro.Map.RetroObbyMap:GetChildren()) do
                    if v.Name == "Model" and v:FindFirstChild("StaffApp") and v.StaffApp:FindFirstChild("Button") and v.StaffApp.Button:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector") then
                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v.StaffApp.Button.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,50,0)
                            task.wait(0.5)
                            fireclickdetector(v.StaffApp.Button.ClickDetector)
                        end
                        break
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        -- Function to set up teleport monitoring
        local function setupTeleportMonitor()
            local connection
            connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    -- Save the Admin script to re-execute after teleport
                    local adminScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then
                            game.Loaded:Wait()
                        end
                        task.wait(10)
                        
                        local secondPlaceId = 16034567693
                        
                        if game.PlaceId == secondPlaceId then
                            -- Auto-execute in second place
                            task.wait(0.1)
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(502, 76, 59)
                            end
                            task.wait(0.1)
                            if getconnections then
                                for i,v in next, getconnections(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Idled) do
                                    v:Disable() 
                                end
                            else
                                while task.wait(10) do
                                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Jump = true
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    ]]
                    
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(adminScript)
                    else
                        queue_on_teleport(adminScript)
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            return connection
        end

        -- Main execution logic
        if currentPlaceId == firstPlaceId or currentPlaceId == secondPlaceId then
            executeAdminScript()
        else
            local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(firstPlaceId)
            end)
            
            if not success then
                if connection then
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Joust",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

    Name = "Equip Parry (30k+ Slaps Need)",
    Callback = function()
fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["Parry"].ClickDetector)
    end

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Someone Using Joust?",
    Callback = function()
        local found = false

        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            if leaderstats then
                local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                if glove and glove.Value == "Joust" then
                    found = true
                    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                        Name = "Detected!",
                        Content = player.Name .. " has equipped the Joust glove.",
                        Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        end

        if not found then
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "No one has equipped the Joust glove",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Joust Player",
    Callback = function()
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local foundPlayer = nil

        for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= localPlayer then
                local stats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                if stats and stats:FindFirstChild("Glove") and stats.Glove.Value == "Joust" then
                    foundPlayer = player
                    break
                end
            end
        end

        if foundPlayer and foundPlayer.Character and foundPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local hrp = foundPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
            localPlayer.Character:PivotTo(hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)) -- Teleport above

            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Teleported To: " .. foundPlayer.Name,
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Joust Player Not Found",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Parry (Ability)",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        getgenv().AutoGeneralAbility2s = Value
        
        if Value then
            print("Auto General Ability started - firing every 2 seconds")
            
            task.spawn(function()
                while getgenv().AutoGeneralAbility2s and task.wait(2) do
                    local success, error = pcall(function()
                        game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").GeneralAbility:FireServer()
                    end)
                    
                    if success then
                        print("Fired GeneralAbility remote")
                    else
                        warn("Failed to fire GeneralAbility:", error)
                    end
                end
            end)
        else

        end
    end
})

end

Tab:AddToggle({
	Name = "Auto Touch Labyrinth Doors",
	Default = false,
	Callback = function(Value)
		_G.AutoLabyrinth = Value
		
		task.spawn(function()
			while _G.AutoLabyrinth do
				local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
				if not player then 
					task.wait(0.1) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local char = player.Character
				if not char or not char.Parent then 
					-- Wait for character to load
					char = player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
					task.wait(0.5)
					continue 
				end
				
				local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
				if not hrp then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local doorsFound = 0
				
				for _, labyrinth in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
					if string.find(labyrinth.Name, "Labyrinth") and labyrinth:FindFirstChild("Doors") then
						for _, door in ipairs(labyrinth.Doors:GetChildren()) do
							local hitbox = door:FindFirstChild("Hitbox")
							if hitbox and hitbox:IsA("BasePart") then
								doorsFound = doorsFound + 1
								pcall(function()
									-- Method 1: Teleport player directly into the hitbox multiple times
									for i = 1, 8 do
										hrp.CFrame = hitbox.CFrame
										task.wait(0.02)
									end
									
									-- Move slightly forward into the door
									hrp.CFrame = hitbox.CFrame + hitbox.CFrame.LookVector * 2
									task.wait(0.1)
									
									-- Shake/teleport inside hitbox to ensure trigger
									for i = 1, 5 do
										hrp.CFrame = hitbox.CFrame
										task.wait(0.01)
									end
									
									task.wait(0.3)
								end)
							end
						end
					end
				end
				
				-- Adjust wait time based on whether doors were found
				if doorsFound == 0 then
					task.wait(0.5) -- No doors, wait longer
				else
					task.wait(0.2) -- Doors found, fast loop
				end
			end
		end)
	end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Glovel",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Collect Treasure",
    Callback = function()
        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        
        -- Check if player has entered and has the quest active
        local hasEntered = player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("entered")
        local hasQuest = player.Quests and player.Quests.QuestsActive and player.Quests.QuestsActive["_questChainHitmansHandkerchief"] and player.Quests.QuestsActive["_questChainHitmansHandkerchief"].Value == true
        
        if hasEntered and hasQuest then
            -- Teleport to position
            player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(289, 13, 261)
            task.wait(0.1)
            
            -- Fire DigEvent
            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").DigEvent:FireServer({
                ["index"] = 2,
                ["cf"] = CFrame.new(42.7222366, -6.17449856, 91.5175781, -0.414533257, 1.72594355e-05, -0.91003418, -5.57037238e-05, 1, 4.4339522e-05, 0.91003418, 6.90724992e-05, -0.414533257)
            })
            
            -- Wait for TreasureChest to appear
            local attempts = 0
            local chestFound = false
            while attempts < 50 do
                if workspace:FindFirstChild("TreasureChestFolder") and workspace.TreasureChestFolder:FindFirstChild("TreasureChest") then
                    chestFound = true
                    break
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
                attempts = attempts + 1
            end
            
            if chestFound then
                -- Open the chest
                workspace.TreasureChestFolder.TreasureChest.OpenRemote:FireServer()
                task.wait(0.2)
                
                -- Reset player
                game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Reset:FireServer()
                task.wait(3.75)
                
                -- Teleport to BountyHunterRoom
                local bountyBooth = workspace:FindFirstChild("BountyHunterRoom")
                if bountyBooth then
                    local booth = bountyBooth:FindFirstChild("BountyHunterBooth")
                    if booth then
                        local configPart = booth:FindFirstChild("_configPart")
                        if configPart then
                            player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = configPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(-5, 0, 0)
                        end
                    end
                end
                
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Success!",
                    Content = "Treasure collected!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                    Time = 3
                })
            else
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "TreasureChest not found!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 3
                })
            end
        else
            local errorMsg = ""
            if not hasEntered then
                errorMsg = "Enter Arena First"
            elseif not hasQuest then
                errorMsg = "Accept Hitman's Handkerchief Quest First"
            end
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = errorMsg,
                Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

end

Tab:AddButton({

        local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

        local player = Players.LocalPlayer
        local hasRob = game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "rob"
        local hasBob = game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "bob"

        if hasRob and hasBob then
            player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new()

            fireclickdetector(Workspace.Lobby.rob.ClickDetector)
            wait(0.5)
            ReplicatedStorage.rob:FireServer()
            wait(0.5)
            fireclickdetector(Workspace.Lobby.bob.ClickDetector)
            wait(0.5)
            ReplicatedStorage.bob:FireServer()
        else

                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Need Bob/Rob Badges To Own",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Get Knockoff Glove",
    Callback = function()

    local buttonsToPress = {4, 5, 5, 3, 2, 9, 3}
    local foundRoom = false

    for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
        local character = player.Character
        if character and character:FindFirstChild("entered") then
            local roomName = player.Name .. "'s Room"
            local room = workspace.RoomsFolder:FindFirstChild(roomName)

            if room and room:FindFirstChild("PocketKeypad") then
                local keypad = room.PocketKeypad
                local buttons = keypad:FindFirstChild("Buttons")

                if buttons then
                    foundRoom = true

                    -- Press each number in the sequence
                    for _, num in ipairs(buttonsToPress) do
                        local button = buttons:FindFirstChild(tostring(num))
                        if button then
                            local cd = button:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                            if cd then
                                fireclickdetector(cd)
                                wait(0.15)
                            end
                        end
                    end

                    -- Press Enter
                    local enterButton = buttons:FindFirstChild("Enter")
                    if enterButton then
                        local cd = enterButton:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                        if cd then
                            fireclickdetector(cd)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    if not foundRoom then
        OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "No one is in the arena!",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
    end
end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Frostbite",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Ice Trials Place + Get Ice Essence",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 17290438723
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        -- Function to execute the item script
        local function executeItemScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                game.Loaded:Wait()
            end

            -- Credits, message is not squished up cuz it looks bad
            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Credits to Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Made by @nexer1234 ( youtube & discord )",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 36000,
                Button1 = "Thanks!"
            })

            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Please re-execute script after teleporting",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 36000,
                Button1 = "Oh..."
            })

            if game.PlaceId == 17290438723 then
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-555, 180, 55)
                wait(1)
                for i,v in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v.ClassName == "ProximityPrompt" then
                        if v.HoldDuration ~= 0 then
                            v.HoldDuration = 0
                        end
                        if v.RequiresLineOfSight ~= false then
                            v.RequiresLineOfSight = false
                        end
                        if v.MaxActivationDistance ~= 9e9 then
                            v.MaxActivationDistance = 9e9
                        end
                        v.Enabled = true
                        fireproximityprompt(v)
                    end
                end
                
            elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(17290438723) end
            else
                game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                    Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                    Text = "Wrong game buddy",
                    Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                    Duration = 36000,
                    Button1 = "Oh..."
                })
            end
        end

        -- Function to set up teleport monitoring
        local function setupTeleportMonitor()
            local connection
            connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    -- Save the script to re-execute after teleport
                    local itemScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then
                            game.Loaded:Wait()
                        end
                        task.wait(3)
                        
                        if game.PlaceId == 17290438723 then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-555, 180, 55)
                            wait(1)
                            for i,v in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v.ClassName == "ProximityPrompt" then
                                    if v.HoldDuration ~= 0 then
                                        v.HoldDuration = 0
                                    end
                                    if v.RequiresLineOfSight ~= false then
                                        v.RequiresLineOfSight = false
                                    end
                                    if v.MaxActivationDistance ~= 9e9 then
                                        v.MaxActivationDistance = 9e9
                                    end
                                    v.Enabled = true
                                    fireproximityprompt(v)
                                end
                            end
                        elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                            while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(17290438723) end
                        end
                    ]]
                    
                    -- Use syn.queue_on_teleport or queue_on_teleport depending on executor
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(itemScript)
                    else
                        queue_on_teleport(itemScript)
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            return connection
        end

        -- Main execution logic
        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            -- We're already in the target place, execute item script
            print("Already in target place - executing item script")
            executeItemScript()
        else
            -- We're not in the target place, teleport to the game
            print("Teleporting to target game...")
            local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId)
            end)
            
            if not success then
                print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
                if connection then
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

end

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Spoonful",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- ===== VARIABLES =====
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")

-- Variables
local isAutoClicking = false
local pointsWaiting = false
local pointsStarted = false
local pointsStopped = false
local pointsFinished = false
local selfDestructClicks = 0
local requiredSelfDestructClicks = 100
local requiredPoints = 5000
local isAntiAfkEnabled = false
local ownSlapBattlesSweepBadge = false
local autoClickLoop = nil

-- Badge display variables
local badgeStatusText = "Loading..."

-- SLAP BATTLES SWEEP Badge ID (as string for comparison)
local SLAP_BATTLES_SWEEP_BADGE_ID = "2236076719770808"

-- Function to check if player is in arena
local function isInArena()
    local char = player.Character
    if char then
        local entered = char:FindFirstChild("entered")
        if entered then
            return entered.Value == true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- Get player's tycoon model name (supports both encodings)
local function getTycoonModelNames()
    local username = player.Name
    return {"\195\133Tycoon" .. username, "\195\129Tycoon" .. username}
end

-- Function to find tycoon (checks both name variations)
local function findTycoon()
    local names = getTycoonModelNames()
    for _, name in ipairs(names) do
        local tycoon = workspace:FindFirstChild(name)
        if tycoon then
            return tycoon, name
        end
    end
    return nil, nil
end

-- Function to get current points from Counter
local function getCurrentPoints()
    local tycoon = findTycoon()
    if tycoon then
        local counter = tycoon:FindFirstChild("Counter")
        if counter then
            local part = counter:FindFirstChild("Part")
            if part then
                local surfaceGui = part:FindFirstChild("SurfaceGui")
                if surfaceGui then
                    local textLabel = surfaceGui:FindFirstChild("TextLabel")
                    if textLabel and textLabel:IsA("TextLabel") then
                        local text = textLabel.Text
                        local number = tonumber(text:match("%d+")) or 0
                        return number
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return 0
end

-- Function to get self destruct clicks from SDCounter
local function getSelfDestructClicks()
    local tycoon = findTycoon()
    if tycoon then
        local sdCounter = tycoon:FindFirstChild("SDCounter")
        if sdCounter then
            local counter = sdCounter:FindFirstChild("Counter")
            if counter then
                local part = counter:FindFirstChild("Part")
                if part then
                    local surfaceGui = part:FindFirstChild("SurfaceGui")
                    if surfaceGui then
                        local textLabel = surfaceGui:FindFirstChild("TextLabel")
                        if textLabel and textLabel:IsA("TextLabel") then
                            local text = textLabel.Text
                            local number = tonumber(text:match("%d+")) or 0
                            return number
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

-- Function to check if SLAP BATTLES SWEEP badge is owned using PlayerData path
local function checkSlapBattlesSweepBadge()
    local playerData = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if not playerData then
        ownSlapBattlesSweepBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(player.Name)
    if not playerFolder then
        ownSlapBattlesSweepBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
    if not unlockedBadges then
        ownSlapBattlesSweepBadge = false
        return false
    end
    
    if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
        local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
        
        if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
            local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
            
            for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                if cleanId == SLAP_BATTLES_SWEEP_BADGE_ID then
                    ownSlapBattlesSweepBadge = true
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    ownSlapBattlesSweepBadge = false
    return false
end

-- Function to update badge status text
local function updateBadgeStatusText()
    local badgeStatus = ownSlapBattlesSweepBadge and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    
    badgeStatusText = string.format([[
Owns SLAP BATTLES SWEEP Badge: %s
SLAP BATTLES SWEEP Badge Awards Glove: Spoonful Glove
Entered Arena: %s
]],
    badgeStatus,
    inArenaStatus
)
    return badgeStatusText
end

-- Function to get error message based on conditions
local function getErrorMessage()
    local inArena = isInArena()
    local tycoon = findTycoon()
    
    if inArena and tycoon then
        return nil -- No error
    elseif not inArena and not tycoon then
        return "⚠️ Error - Enter Arena First / Tycoon Not Found"
    elseif inArena and not tycoon then
        return "⚠️ Error - Tycoon Not Found"
    elseif not inArena and tycoon then
        return "⚠️ Error - Enter Arena First"
    end
    
    return "⚠️ Unknown Error"
end

-- Function to update points status display
local function updatePointsDisplay()
    local currentPoints = getCurrentPoints()
    local autoClickStatus = isAutoClicking and "Yes" or "No"
    local antiAfkStatus = isAntiAfkEnabled and "Yes" or "No"
    local inArenaStatus = isInArena() and "✅ Yes" or "❌ No"
    local selfDestructDisplay = "Not Found"
    
    local sdValue = getSelfDestructClicks()
    if sdValue ~= nil then
        selfDestructDisplay = sdValue .. "/" .. requiredSelfDestructClicks
    end
    
    -- Points Show status logic
    local waitingStatus = "Waiting to start..."
    local startedStatus = "Not Started"
    local stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
    local finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    
    if pointsFinished then
        waitingStatus = "Finished!"
        startedStatus = requiredPoints .. "/" .. requiredPoints
        stoppedStatus = "N/A"
        finishedStatus = requiredPoints .. "/" .. requiredPoints
    elseif pointsStopped then
        waitingStatus = "Stopped"
        startedStatus = currentPoints .. "/" .. requiredPoints
        stoppedStatus = currentPoints .. "/" .. requiredPoints
        finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    elseif pointsStarted then
        waitingStatus = "Running..."
        startedStatus = currentPoints .. "/" .. requiredPoints
        stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
        finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    elseif not isAutoClicking then
        waitingStatus = "Ready to start"
        startedStatus = "Not Started"
        stoppedStatus = "Not Stopped"
        finishedStatus = "Not Finished"
    end
    
    local statusText = string.format([[
Points Show Waiting: %s
Points Show Started: %s
Points Show Stopped: %s
Points Show Finished: %s
AutoClick: %s
Self Destruct Button Clicked Times: %s
Entered Arena: %s
Anti AFK: %s
]],
    waitingStatus,
    startedStatus,
    stoppedStatus,
    finishedStatus,
    autoClickStatus,
    selfDestructDisplay,
    inArenaStatus,
    antiAfkStatus
    )
    
    return statusText
end

-- Create the TWO paragraphs
local TycoonStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Tycoon Status:", "Loading...")
local BadgeStatusParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Badge Status:", "Loading badge info...")

-- ===== LOOP: TYCOON STATUS UPDATE =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        local statusText = updatePointsDisplay()
        pcall(function()
            TycoonStatusParagraph:Set(statusText)
        end)
        task.wait(0.5)
    end
end)

-- ===== LOOP: BADGE STATUS UPDATE (5 SECONDS) =====
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        checkSlapBattlesSweepBadge()
        local badgeText = updateBadgeStatusText()
        pcall(function()
            BadgeStatusParagraph:Set(badgeText)
        end)
        task.wait(5)
    end
end)

-- ===== AUTO CLICK TYCOON TOGGLE =====
_G.AutoTycoon = false

AutoClickTycoon = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Auto Click Tycoon",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        _G.AutoTycoon = Value
        isAutoClicking = Value
        
        if Value then
            -- Check conditions
            local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
            if errorMsg then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = errorMsg,
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 4
                })
                AutoClickTycoon:Set(false)
                _G.AutoTycoon = false
                isAutoClicking = false
                return
            end
            
            pointsStarted = true
            pointsStopped = false
            pointsFinished = false
            pointsWaiting = false
            
            if autoClickLoop then
                task.cancel(autoClickLoop)
                autoClickLoop = nil
            end
            
            autoClickLoop = task.spawn(function()
                while _G.AutoTycoon do
                    -- Check conditions
                    local errorMsg = getErrorMessage()
                    if errorMsg then
                        OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                            Name = "Auto Click Tycoon",
                            Content = errorMsg,
                            Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                            Time = 3
                        })
                        _G.AutoTycoon = false
                        AutoClickTycoon:Set(false)
                        isAutoClicking = false
                        pointsStopped = true
                        pointsStarted = false
                        break
                    end
                    
                    -- Check if points reached required amount
                    local currentPoints = getCurrentPoints()
                    if currentPoints >= requiredPoints then
                        pointsFinished = true
                        pointsStarted = false
                        _G.AutoTycoon = false
                        AutoClickTycoon:Set(false)
                        isAutoClicking = false
                        
                        OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                            Name = "Tycoon",
                            Content = "Goal reached! " .. currentPoints .. "/" .. requiredPoints .. " points!",
                            Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                            Time = 5
                        })
                        break
                    end
                    
                    pcall(function()
                        local tycoon = findTycoon()
                        if tycoon then
                            local clickPart = tycoon:FindFirstChild("Click")
                            if clickPart and clickPart:IsA("BasePart") then
                                local detector = clickPart:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
                                if detector then
                                    fireclickdetector(detector)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait()
                end
            end)
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Auto Click Tycoon",
                Content = "Started! Need " .. requiredPoints .. " points",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            if autoClickLoop then
                task.cancel(autoClickLoop)
                autoClickLoop = nil
            end
            pointsStopped = true
            pointsStarted = false
            isAutoClicking = false
            
            local currentPoints = getCurrentPoints()
        end
    end
})

-- ===== ANTI AFK TOGGLE =====
AntiAfk = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Anti Afk",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        isAntiAfkEnabled = Value
        
        if Value then
            local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
            game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
            end)
        end
    end    
})

-- Initial updates
checkSlapBattlesSweepBadge()
BadgeStatusParagraph:Set(updateBadgeStatusText())
TycoonStatusParagraph:Set(updatePointsDisplay())

Tab:AddButton({

    Callback = function()
fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["Tycoon"].ClickDetector)
    end
})

if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Tycoon" and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("entered") then
task.wait(0.1)
local button = script.Parent
local teleportPosition = Vector3.new(17884, -24, -3539)

        player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(teleportPosition)

task.wait(0.1)
local args = {
    [1] = CFrame.new(17893.552734375, -26.257728576660156, -3535.35888671875, 0.00862560048699379, 3.3499091500743816e-08, -0.9999628067016602, 8.43312697451637e-10, 1, 3.350761090814558e-08, 0.9999628067016602, -1.1323045834288337e-09, 0.00862560048699379)
}

else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Tycoon/Enter Arena",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
