do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Siphon",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

local G_ = {}
G_.SiphonAuto = false

Tab:AddToggle({
	Name = "Auto Bring Siphon Orb",
	Default = false,
	Callback = function(Value)
		G_.SiphonAuto = Value
		
		task.spawn(function()
			while G_.SiphonAuto do
				local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
				if not player then 
					task.wait(0.1) 
					continue 
				end
				
				-- Check slaps requirement
				if player.leaderstats and player.leaderstats.Slaps and player.leaderstats.Slaps.Value < 0 then
					G_.SiphonAuto = false
					OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error", Content = "0+ Slaps Required", Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857", Time = 3})
					break
				end
				
				local character = player.Character
				if not character or not character.Parent then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local head = character:FindFirstChild("Head")
				if not head then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local orbsFound = 0
				
				-- Find all Siphon Orbs
				for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
					if v.Name == "SiphonOrb" then
						orbsFound = orbsFound + 1
						pcall(function()
							-- Teleport Siphon Orb directly to player's head
							if v:IsA("BasePart") then
								-- Orb is a single part
								v.CFrame = head.CFrame
							elseif v:IsA("Model") then
								-- Orb is a model
								local orbPart = v:FindFirstChild("Handle") or v:FindFirstChild("OrbPart") or v:FindFirstChild("PrimaryPart")
								
								if orbPart then
									orbPart.CFrame = head.CFrame
								else
									-- Move all parts to player's head
									for _, part in pairs(v:GetDescendants()) do
										if part:IsA("BasePart") then
											part.CFrame = head.CFrame
										end
									end
								end
							end
						end)
					end
				end
				
				-- Adjust wait time based on whether orbs were found
				if orbsFound == 0 then
					task.wait(0.3) -- No orbs, wait a bit
				else
					task.wait(0.05) -- Orbs found, fast loop
				end
			end
		end)
	end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Wrench",

    Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Equip Engineer (9k+ Slaps Need)",

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Someone Using Thor?",
    Callback = function()
        local found = false

        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            if leaderstats then
                local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                if glove and glove.Value == "Thor" then
                    found = true
                    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                        Name = "Detected!",
                        Content = player.Name .. " has equipped the Thor glove.",
                        Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        end

        if not found then
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "No one has equipped the Thor glove",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Thor Player",
    Callback = function()
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local foundPlayer = nil

        for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= localPlayer then
                local stats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                if stats and stats:FindFirstChild("Glove") and stats.Glove.Value == "Thor" then
                    foundPlayer = player
                    break
                end
            end
        end

        if foundPlayer and foundPlayer.Character and foundPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local hrp = foundPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
            localPlayer.Character:PivotTo(hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)) -- Teleport above

            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Teleported To: " .. foundPlayer.Name,
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Thor Player Not Found",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Spawn Sentry",
    Callback = function()
        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Engineer" then
            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Sentry:FireServer()
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({ Name = "Error", Content = "Equip Engineer Glove", Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857", Time = 3 })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Turret",
    Callback = function()
            local turret = game.workspace:FindFirstChild("Turret")
            if turret and turret:FindFirstChild("HingePart") and turret.HingePart:FindFirstChild("Glove") then
            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = turret.HingePart.Glove.CFrame
        end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Hunter",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- First Button
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Guide Place + Get Hunter Glove",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 18550498098
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        -- Function to execute the item script
        local function executeItemScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                game.Loaded:Wait()
            end

            function Checkamogus()
                DontGetAvatar = true
                repeat task.wait() until DontGetAvatar ~= nil

                if DontGetAvatar == true then
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -65, 824)
                    if not game:IsLoaded() then
                        game.Loaded:Wait()
                    end
                    wait(5)
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace["the cube of life"].Part.CFrame
                    if not game:IsLoaded() then
                        game.Loaded:Wait()
                    end
                    wait(5)
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace["Big Heart"].CFrame
                    if not game:IsLoaded() then
                        game.Loaded:Wait()
                    end
                    wait(5)
                end
            end

            -- Credits, message is not squished up cuz it looks bad
            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Credits to Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Made by @nexer1234 ( youtube & discord )",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 36000,
                Button1 = "Thanks!"
            })

            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Please re-execute script after teleporting",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 36000,
                Button1 = "Oh..."
            })

            if game.PlaceId == 18550498098 then
                Checkamogus()
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -62, 824)
                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                end
                wait(5)
                for i,v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v.Name == "ShackLever" and v:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector") then
                        fireclickdetector(v:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector"))
                    end
                end
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -62, 824)
                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                end
                repeat task.wait(.1) until workspace.Map.Components:FindFirstChild("GuideNPC")
                task.wait(.8)
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(599, 250, -322)
                task.wait(.8)
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true

                while task.wait(.1) do
                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Lantern") then
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack.Lantern.Parent = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                    end
                    --game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Remotes.Data.AnswerInCutscene:FireServer("Spare")

                    for i,v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                        if v.Name == "PusherWall" then
                            v.CanCollide = false
                        end

                        if v.Name == "DungeonGolem" and v:FindFirstChild("Cube.001") then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v["Cube.001"])
                            end
                        end

                        if v.Name == "golem" and v:FindFirstChild("Hitbox") then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.Hitbox)
                            end
                        end

                        if v.Name == "ReplicaNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                            end
                        end

                        if v.Name == "GuideNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                            end
                        end

                        if v.Name == "TrackGloveMissile" then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                
            elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                Instance.new("Message",game.CoreGui).Text = "You're being teleported, please wait, it may take up to a minute..."

                for i,v in pairs(workspace.BountyHunterRoom:GetChildren()) do
                    if v and v:IsA('Model') and v:FindFirstChild('Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005') then
                        if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].PlayerCounter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "0/4 Hunters" then
                            if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text ~= "1" then
                                repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "1"
                            end
                            while task.wait() do game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Hitbox.CFrame end
                        else
                            repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].PlayerCounter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "0/4 Hunters"
                            if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text ~= "1" then
                                repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "1"
                            end
                            while task.wait() do game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Hitbox.CFrame end
                        end
                    end
                end
            else
                game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                    Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                    Text = "Wrong game buddy",
                    Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                    Duration = 36000,
                    Button1 = "Oh..."
                })
            end
        end

        -- Function to set up teleport monitoring
        local function setupTeleportMonitor()
            local connection
            connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    -- Save the script to re-execute after teleport
                    local itemScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then
                            game.Loaded:Wait()
                        end
                        task.wait(3)
                        
                        function Checkamogus()
                            DontGetAvatar = true
                            repeat task.wait() until DontGetAvatar ~= nil

                            if DontGetAvatar == true then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -65, 824)
                                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                                end
                                wait(5)
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace["the cube of life"].Part.CFrame
                                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                                end
                                wait(5)
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace["Big Heart"].CFrame
                                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                                end
                                wait(5)
                            end
                        end

                        if game.PlaceId == 18550498098 then
                            Checkamogus()
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -62, 824)
                            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                game.Loaded:Wait()
                            end
                            wait(5)
                            for i,v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v.Name == "ShackLever" and v:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector") then
                                    fireclickdetector(v:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector"))
                                end
                            end
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -62, 824)
                            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                game.Loaded:Wait()
                            end
                            repeat task.wait(.1) until workspace.Map.Components:FindFirstChild("GuideNPC")
                            task.wait(.8)
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(599, 250, -322)
                            task.wait(.8)
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true

                            while task.wait(.1) do
                                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Lantern") then
                                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack.Lantern.Parent = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                                end
                                --game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Remotes.Data.AnswerInCutscene:FireServer("Spare")

                                for i,v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                                    if v.Name == "PusherWall" then
                                        v.CanCollide = false
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "DungeonGolem" and v:FindFirstChild("Cube.001") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v["Cube.001"])
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "golem" and v:FindFirstChild("Hitbox") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.Hitbox)
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "ReplicaNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "GuideNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "TrackGloveMissile" then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v)
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                            Instance.new("Message",game.CoreGui).Text = "You're being teleported, please wait, it may take up to a minute..."

                            for i,v in pairs(workspace.BountyHunterRoom:GetChildren()) do
                                if v and v:IsA('Model') and v:FindFirstChild('Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005') then
                                    if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].PlayerCounter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "0/4 Hunters" then
                                        if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text ~= "1" then
                                            repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "1"
                                        end
                                        while task.wait() do game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Hitbox.CFrame end
                                    else
                                        repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].PlayerCounter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "0/4 Hunters"
                                        if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text ~= "1" then
                                            repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "1"
                                        end
                                        while task.wait() do game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Hitbox.CFrame end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    ]]
                    
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(itemScript)
                    else
                        queue_on_teleport(itemScript)
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            return connection
        end

        -- Main execution logic
        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            -- We're already in the target place, execute item script
            print("Already in target place - executing item script")
            executeItemScript()
        else
            -- We're not in the target place, teleport to the game
            print("Teleporting to target game...")
            local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId)
            end)
            
            if not success then
                print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
                if connection then
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

end

                            end
                        end

                        if v.Name == "ReplicaNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)

                            end

                end

                Instance.new("Message",game.CoreGui).Text = "You're being teleported, please wait, it may take up to a minute..."

                            if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text ~= "1" then

                                    if v.Name == "golem" and v:FindFirstChild("Hitbox") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.Hitbox)
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "ReplicaNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "GuideNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "TrackGloveMissile" then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v)
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                            Instance.new("Message",game.CoreGui).Text = "You're being teleported, please wait, it may take up to a minute..."

                            for i,v in pairs(workspace.BountyHunterRoom:GetChildren()) do
                                if v and v:IsA('Model') and v:FindFirstChild('Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005') then
                                    if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].PlayerCounter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "0/4 Hunters" then
                                        if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text ~= "1" then
                                            repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "1"
                                        end
                                        while task.wait() do game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Hitbox.CFrame end
                                    else
                                        repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].PlayerCounter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "0/4 Hunters"
                                        if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text ~= "1" then
                                            repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "1"
                                        end
                                        while task.wait() do game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Hitbox.CFrame end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    ]]
                    
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(itemScript)
                    else
                        queue_on_teleport(itemScript)
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            return connection
        end

        -- Main execution logic
        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            -- We're already in the target place, execute item script
            print("Already in target place - executing item script")
            executeItemScript()
        else
            -- We're not in the target place, teleport to the game
            print("Teleporting to target game...")
            local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId)
            end)
            
            if not success then
                print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
                if connection then
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

end
do
    Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Avatar",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- Third Button (Version 3 with DontGetAvatar = false)
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Guide Place + Get Avatar Glove",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 18550498098
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        -- Function to execute the item script
        local function executeItemScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                game.Loaded:Wait()
            end

            function Checkamogus()
                DontGetAvatar = false
                repeat task.wait() until DontGetAvatar ~= nil

                if DontGetAvatar == true then
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -65, 824)
                    if not game:IsLoaded() then
                        game.Loaded:Wait()
                    end
                    wait(5)
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace["the cube of life"].Part.CFrame
                    if not game:IsLoaded() then
                        game.Loaded:Wait()
                    end
                    wait(5)
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace["Big Heart"].CFrame
                    if not game:IsLoaded() then
                        game.Loaded:Wait()
                    end
                    wait(5)
                end
            end

            -- Credits, message is not squished up cuz it looks bad
            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Credits to Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Made by @nexer1234 ( youtube & discord )",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 36000,
                Button1 = "Thanks!"
            })

            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Please re-execute script after teleporting",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 36000,
                Button1 = "Oh..."
            })

            if game.PlaceId == 18550498098 then
                Checkamogus()
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -62, 824)
                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                end
                wait(5)
                for i,v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v.Name == "ShackLever" and v:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector") then
                        fireclickdetector(v:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector"))
                    end
                end
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -62, 824)
                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                end
                repeat task.wait(.1) until workspace.Map.Components:FindFirstChild("GuideNPC")
                task.wait(.8)
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(599, 250, -322)
                task.wait(.8)
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true

                while task.wait(.1) do
                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Lantern") then
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack.Lantern.Parent = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                    end
                    game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Remotes.Data.AnswerInCutscene:FireServer("Spare")

                    for i,v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                        if v.Name == "PusherWall" then
                            v.CanCollide = false
                        end

                        if v.Name == "DungeonGolem" and v:FindFirstChild("Cube.001") then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v["Cube.001"])
                            end
                        end

                        if v.Name == "golem" and v:FindFirstChild("Hitbox") then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.Hitbox)
                            end
                        end

                        if v.Name == "ReplicaNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                            end
                        end

                        if v.Name == "GuideNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                            end
                        end

                        if v.Name == "TrackGloveMissile" then
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                
            elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                Instance.new("Message",game.CoreGui).Text = "You're being teleported, please wait, it may take up to a minute..."

                for i,v in pairs(workspace.BountyHunterRoom:GetChildren()) do
                    if v and v:IsA('Model') and v:FindFirstChild('Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005') then
                        if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].PlayerCounter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "0/4 Hunters" then
                            if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text ~= "1" then
                                repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "1"
                            end
                            while task.wait() do game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Hitbox.CFrame end
                        else
                            repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].PlayerCounter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "0/4 Hunters"
                            if v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text ~= "1" then
                                repeat task.wait(.1) until v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Counter.SurfaceGui.TextLabel.Text == "1"
                            end
                            while task.wait() do game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v["Meshes/boxshadow_Cube.005"].Hitbox.CFrame end
                        end
                    end
                end
            else
                game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                    Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                    Text = "Wrong game buddy",
                    Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                    Duration = 36000,
                    Button1 = "Oh..."
                })
            end
        end

        -- Function to set up teleport monitoring
        local function setupTeleportMonitor()
            local connection
            connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    -- Save the script to re-execute after teleport
                    local itemScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then
                            game.Loaded:Wait()
                        end
                        task.wait(3)
                        
                        function Checkamogus()
                            DontGetAvatar = false
                            repeat task.wait() until DontGetAvatar ~= nil

                            if DontGetAvatar == true then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -65, 824)
                                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                                end
                                wait(5)
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace["the cube of life"].Part.CFrame
                                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                                end
                                wait(5)
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace["Big Heart"].CFrame
                                if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                    game.Loaded:Wait()
                                end
                                wait(5)
                            end
                        end

                        if game.PlaceId == 18550498098 then
                            Checkamogus()
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -62, 824)
                            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                game.Loaded:Wait()
                            end
                            wait(5)

                                if v.Name == "ShackLever" and v:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector") then
                                    fireclickdetector(v:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector"))
                                end
                            end
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(3258, -62, 824)
                            if not game:IsLoaded() then
                                game.Loaded:Wait()
                            end
                            repeat task.wait(.1) until workspace.Map.Components:FindFirstChild("GuideNPC")
                            task.wait(.8)
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(599, 250, -322)
                            task.wait(.8)
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true

                            while task.wait(.1) do
                                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Lantern") then
                                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack.Lantern.Parent = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                                end
                                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Remotes.Data.AnswerInCutscene:FireServer("Spare")

                                for i,v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                                    if v.Name == "PusherWall" then
                                        v.CanCollide = false
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "DungeonGolem" and v:FindFirstChild("Cube.001") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v["Cube.001"])
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "golem" and v:FindFirstChild("Hitbox") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.Hitbox)
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "ReplicaNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "GuideNPC" and v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v.HumanoidRootPart)
                                        end
                                    end

                                    if v.Name == "TrackGloveMissile" then
                                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Lantern") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:FindFirstChild("Network") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern:Activate()
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Lantern.Network:FireServer("Hit", v)
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                            Instance.new("Message",game.CoreGui).Text = "You're being teleported, please wait, it may take up to a minute..."

                                        end

                        syn.queue_on_teleport(itemScript)

        end

        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then

            print("Already in target place - executing item script")
            executeItemScript()
        else

	Name = "Craft All Potions",
	Callback = function()   
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Alchemist" then
if not game.Workspace:FindFirstChild(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name.."'s Cauldron") then
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").GeneralAbility:FireServer()
end

    [1] = "BrewPotion"
}

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Fan",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})
    
-- Fan Button
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To barzil Place + Get Fan",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 7234087065
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        local function executeFanScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end

            game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                Title = "Credits to Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                Text = "Made by @nexer1234 ( youtube & discord )",
                Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                Duration = 36000,
                Button1 = "Thanks!"
            })

            if game.PlaceId == 7234087065 then
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.QuestStuff.Key.CFrame
                task.wait(1.5)
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.SuitUpClown:FireServer()
                task.wait(.25)
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.KeyQuest:FireServer()
                task.wait(.25)
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.KeyAcquired:FireServer()
                task.wait(.25)
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.GOHOME:FireServer()
                task.wait(.25)
                game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.KeyBadgeReward:FireServer()
                task.wait(1.5)
            elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(7234087065) end
            else
                game:GetService("StarterGui"):SetCore("SendNotification",{
                    Title = "Message from Nexer1234_AnotherAlt",
                    Text = "Wrong game buddy",
                    Icon = "rbxassetid://125704683916878",
                    Duration = 36000,
                    Button1 = "Oh..."
                })
            end
        end

        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            executeFanScript()
        else
            local connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    local fanScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
                        task.wait(3)
                        if game.PlaceId == 7234087065 then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.QuestStuff.Key.CFrame
                            task.wait(1.5)
                            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.SuitUpClown:FireServer()
                            task.wait(.25)
                            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.KeyQuest:FireServer()
                            task.wait(.25)
                            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.KeyAcquired:FireServer()
                            task.wait(.25)
                            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.GOHOME:FireServer()
                            task.wait(.25)
                            game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").RemoteEvents.KeyBadgeReward:FireServer()
                        end
                    ]]
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then syn.queue_on_teleport(fanScript) else queue_on_teleport(fanScript) end
                end
            end)
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success = pcall(function() TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId) end)
            if not success and connection then connection:Disconnect() end
        end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Boxer",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- Boxer Button
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To barzil Place + Get Boxer",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 7234087065
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        local function executeBoxerScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end

            if game.PlaceId == 7234087065 then
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(4231.26123046875, 3510.86376953125, 270.4519958496094)
                repeat task.wait(.1) until workspace:FindFirstChild("BoxingGloves")
                task.wait(1)
                fireclickdetector(workspace.BoxingGloves.ClickDetector)
            elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(7234087065) end
            end
        end

        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            executeBoxerScript()
        else
            local connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    local boxerScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
                        task.wait(3)
                        if game.PlaceId == 7234087065 then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(4231.26123046875, 3510.86376953125, 270.4519958496094)
                            repeat task.wait(.1) until workspace:FindFirstChild("BoxingGloves")
                            task.wait(1)
                            fireclickdetector(workspace.BoxingGloves.ClickDetector)
                        end
                    ]]
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then syn.queue_on_teleport(boxerScript) else queue_on_teleport(boxerScript) end
                end
            end)
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success = pcall(function() TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId) end)
            if not success and connection then connection:Disconnect() end
        end
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "MATERIALIZE",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddToggle({
	Name = "Auto Bring MATERIALIZE Orb",
	Default = false,
	Callback = function(Value)
		_G.Materializefarm = Value
		
		task.spawn(function()
			while _G.Materializefarm do
				local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
				if not player then 
					task.wait(0.1) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local character = player.Character
				if not character or not character.Parent then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local head = character:FindFirstChild("Head")
				if not head then 
					task.wait(0.01) 
					continue 
				end
				
				local orbsFound = 0
				
				-- Find all MATERIALIZE Orbs
				for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
					if v.Name == "MATERIALIZEOrb" then
						orbsFound = orbsFound + 1
						pcall(function()
							-- Teleport MATERIALIZE Orb directly to player's head
							if v:IsA("BasePart") then
								-- Orb is a single part
								v.CFrame = head.CFrame
							elseif v:IsA("Model") then
								-- Orb is a model
								local orbPart = v:FindFirstChild("Handle") or v:FindFirstChild("OrbPart") or v:FindFirstChild("PrimaryPart")
								
								if orbPart then
									orbPart.CFrame = head.CFrame
								else
									-- Move all parts to player's head
									for _, part in pairs(v:GetDescendants()) do
										if part:IsA("BasePart") then
											part.CFrame = head.CFrame
										end
									end
								end
							end
						end)
					end
				end
				
				-- Adjust wait time based on whether orbs were found
				if orbsFound == 0 then
					task.wait(0.5) -- No orbs, wait longer
				else
					task.wait(0.05) -- Orbs found, fast loop
				end
			end
		end)
	end    
})

end
do
    Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Bind",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- Bind Button
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Binded Maze Place + Get Bind",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 74169485398268
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        local function executeBindScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end

            if game.PlaceId == 74169485398268 then
                local time = tick()
                while tick() - time < 10 do task.wait() fireclickdetector(workspace.Orb:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector")) end
                while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(6403373529) end
            elseif game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 6403373529 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(74169485398268) end
            end
        end

        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            executeBindScript()
        else
            local connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    local bindScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
                        task.wait(3)
                        if game.PlaceId == 74169485398268 then
                            local time = tick()
                            while tick() - time < 10 do task.wait() fireclickdetector(workspace.Orb:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector")) end
                            while task.wait() do game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(6403373529) end
                        end
                    ]]
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then syn.queue_on_teleport(bindScript) else queue_on_teleport(bindScript) end
                end
            end)
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success = pcall(function() TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId) end)
            if not success and connection then connection:Disconnect() end
        end
    end
})

end
do
    Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Poltergeist",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- Poltergeist Button with Auto-Execute
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To Zombies Place + Get Poltergeist",
    Callback = function()
        local targetPlaceId = 103505724406848
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        local function executePoltergeistScript()
            loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaaZiusz/sb/refs/heads/main/Poltergeist"))()
        end

        if currentPlaceId == targetPlaceId then
            executePoltergeistScript()
        else
            local connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    local poltergeistScript = [[
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
                        task.wait(3)
                        loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaaZiusz/sb/refs/heads/main/Poltergeist"))()
                    ]]
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then 
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(poltergeistScript)
                    else
                        queue_on_teleport(poltergeistScript)
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function()
                TeleportService:Teleport(targetPlaceId)
            end)
            
            if not success then
                print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
                if connection then
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

end
do
    Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Clock",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- Clock Button
Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Auto Teleport To FNAO Place (NOT AUTO GETS GLOVE)",
    Callback = function()
        local firstPlaceId = 6403373529
        local secondPlaceId = 7234087065
        local thirdPlaceId = 102908326578005
        local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
        local function executeClockScript()
            if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
            if getgenv().AutoGetClockExecuted then return end
            getgenv().AutoGetClockExecuted = true

            if game.PlaceId == thirdPlaceId then
                -- Third place: FNAO - Get Clock
                print("In third place - getting Clock")
                for i,v in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v.ClassName == "ClickDetector" then fireclickdetector(v) end
                end
                task.wait(2)
                for i,v in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if v.ClassName == "ClickDetector" then fireclickdetector(v) end
                end
                task.wait(2)
                while task.wait() do 
                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(26.34327507019043, 4.055271148681641, -1.8455318212509155) 
                    end
                end
                
            elseif game.PlaceId == secondPlaceId then
                -- Second place: Barzil - Teleport to wizard tower
                print("In second place - going to wizard tower")
                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(249.473419, 157.87326, -458.792145, 0.707134247, -0, -0.707079291, 0, 1, -0, 0.707079291, 0, 0.707134247)
                end
                task.wait(3)
                while task.wait() do
                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        for i,v in pairs(workspace.Buildings:GetChildren()) do
                            if v.Name == "wizard twoer" and v:FindFirstChild("Cone") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v.Cone.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,15,0)
                                break
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                
            elseif game.PlaceId == firstPlaceId or game.PlaceId == 11520107397 or game.PlaceId == 9015014224 or game.PlaceId == 124596094333302 then
                -- First place or other Slap Battles places - Teleport to second place
                print("In first place - teleporting to second place")
                while task.wait() do 
                    game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(secondPlaceId) 
                end
            end
        end

        -- Function to set up teleport monitoring for ALL places
        local function setupTeleportMonitor()
            local connection
            connection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
                if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
                    local clockScript = [[
                        getgenv().AutoGetClockExecuted = false
                        
                        if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end
                        task.wait(3)
                        
                        local secondPlaceId = 7234087065
                        local thirdPlaceId = 102908326578005
                        
                        if game.PlaceId == thirdPlaceId then
                            -- Auto-execute in third place
                            print("Auto-executing in third place")
                            for i,v in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v.ClassName == "ClickDetector" then fireclickdetector(v) end
                            end
                            task.wait(2)
                            for i,v in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v.ClassName == "ClickDetector" then fireclickdetector(v) end
                            end
                            task.wait(2)
                            while task.wait() do 
                                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(26.34327507019043, 4.055271148681641, -1.8455318212509155) 
                                end
                            end
                            
                        elseif game.PlaceId == secondPlaceId then
                            -- Auto-execute in second place
                            print("Auto-executing in second place")
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(249.473419, 157.87326, -458.792145, 0.707134247, -0, -0.707079291, 0, 1, -0, 0.707079291, 0, 0.707134247)
                            end
                            task.wait(3)
                            while task.wait() do
                                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                    for i,v in pairs(workspace.Buildings:GetChildren()) do
                                        if v.Name == "wizard twoer" and v:FindFirstChild("Cone") then
                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v.Cone.CFrame * CFrame.new(0,15,0)
                                            break
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    ]]
                    
                    if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then 
                        syn.queue_on_teleport(clockScript) 
                    else 
                        queue_on_teleport(clockScript) 
                    end
                end
            end)
            return connection
        end

        -- Main execution logic
        if currentPlaceId == firstPlaceId or currentPlaceId == secondPlaceId or currentPlaceId == thirdPlaceId then
            print("Already in target place - executing script")
            executeClockScript()
        else
            print("Not in target place - setting up teleport monitor")
            local connection = setupTeleportMonitor()
            
            local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
            local success, errorMsg = pcall(function() 
                TeleportService:Teleport(firstPlaceId) 
            end)
            
            if not success then
                print("Teleport failed:", errorMsg)
                if connection then connection:Disconnect() end
            end
        end
    end
})

end

	PremiumOnly = false

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Equip ZZZZZZZ (25+ Slaps Need)",
    Callback = function()
fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["ZZZZZZZ"].ClickDetector)
    end

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Someone Using ZZZZZZZ?",
    Callback = function()
        local found = false

        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            local leaderstats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
            if leaderstats then
                local glove = leaderstats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                if glove and glove.Value == "ZZZZZZZ" then
                    found = true
                    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                        Name = "Detected!",
                        Content = player.Name .. " has equipped the ZZZZZZZ glove.",
                        Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        end

        if not found then
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "No one has equipped the ZZZZZZZ glove",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To ZZZZZZZ Player",
    Callback = function()
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local foundPlayer = nil

        for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= localPlayer then
                local stats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                if stats and stats:FindFirstChild("Glove") and stats.Glove.Value == "ZZZZZZZ" then
                    foundPlayer = player
                    break
                end
            end
        end

        if foundPlayer and foundPlayer.Character and foundPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local hrp = foundPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
            localPlayer.Character:PivotTo(hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)) -- Teleport above

            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Teleported To: " .. foundPlayer.Name,
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "ZZZZZZZ Player Not Found",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

    Name = "Teleport To Rainbow Cloud",
    Callback = function()
            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-124, -5, 121)
        end
})

    Tab = Window:MakeTab({

	PremiumOnly = false

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Equip Lure (Catch Emm All Badge Need)",
    Callback = function()
fireclickdetector(workspace.Lobby["Lure"].ClickDetector)
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Auto Slap Aura Players",
	Callback = function()   
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Lure" then
-- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

-- Start the infinite loop to fire for all players
while true do
    -- Loop through each player in the game
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        -- Ensure the player has a character and it contains the "Left Leg"
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Left Leg") then
            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
            local args = {
                [1] = player.Character["Left Leg"],
                [2] = false  -- The second argument, set to false as in your original script
            }

            -- Fire the server with the "Left Leg" part as an argument
            ReplicatedStorage.GeneralHit:FireServer(unpack(args))
        end
    end

    -- Wait 1 second before running the loop again (adjust the wait time as needed)
    wait(0.5)
end
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Lure",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Jerry",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Jerry Boss Fight Place + Auto Get Jerry",
    Callback = function()
local currentPlaceId = game.PlaceId
        
if currentPlaceId == 6403373529 then
    -- First place (6403373529) - Snowpeeps and Teleport only
    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
    
    -- Click all Snowpeeps first (using correct path: workspace.Arena.XmasSnowPeeps)
    wait(0.2)
    local arena = workspace:FindFirstChild("Arena")
    if arena then
        local xmasSnowPeeps = arena:FindFirstChild("XmasSnowPeeps")
        if xmasSnowPeeps then
            for _, peep in ipairs(xmasSnowPeeps:GetChildren()) do
                if peep:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector") then
                    fireclickdetector(peep.ClickDetector)
                    wait(0.1) -- Small delay between clicks
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    -- Teleport to position
    wait(0.2)
    if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(2, -5, 353)
    end
    
elseif currentPlaceId == 95706409702231 then
    -- Second place (95706409702231) - Teleport, Anti-AFK, and Boss manipulation
    -- This will auto-execute when arriving at the second place
    local function executeSecondPlaceScript()
        task.wait(20) -- Wait 20 seconds after arriving
        
        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            -- Teleport to position
            player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-6, 21, -542)
            
            -- Enable Anti AFK
            _G.AntiAfk = true
            local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
            
            game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                if _G.AntiAfk then
                    VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                    VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
                end
            end)
            
            -- Start boss health manipulation
            local bossManipulationThread = task.spawn(function()
                while task.wait(0.01) do
                    local boss = workspace:FindFirstChild("Boss")
                    if boss and boss:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                        boss.Humanoid.Health = 1
                        task.wait(0.02)
                        boss.Humanoid.Health = 0
                    else
                        -- Wait a bit if boss isn't found yet
                        task.wait(1)
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            -- Store the thread reference so it can be stopped if needed
            _G.BossManipulationThread = bossManipulationThread
            
            print("Auto-executed: Teleported to position, enabled Anti-AFK, and started boss manipulation")
        end
    end
    
    -- Auto-execute the function
    executeSecondPlaceScript()
end

-- Auto-execution for when teleporting from first place to second place
-- This sets up the script to run automatically after teleport
game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(state)
    if state == Enum.TeleportState.InProgress then
        local targetPlaceId = 95706409702231 -- Second place ID
        local teleportScript = [[
            -- Wait for game to load
            wait(5)
            
            -- Check if we're in the target place
            if game.PlaceId == ]] .. targetPlaceId .. [[ then
                -- Wait 20 seconds, then execute
                task.wait(20)
                
                local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    -- Teleport to position
                    player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-6, 21, -542)
                    
                    -- Enable Anti AFK
                    _G.AntiAfk = true
                    local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
                    
                    game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
                        if _G.AntiAfk then
                            VirtualUser:CaptureController()
                            VirtualUser:ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
                        end
                    end)
                    
                    -- Start boss health manipulation
                    local bossManipulationThread = task.spawn(function()
                        while task.wait(0.01) do
                            local boss = workspace:FindFirstChild("Boss")
                            if boss and boss:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                                boss.Humanoid.Health = 1
                                task.wait(0.02)
                                boss.Humanoid.Health = 0
                            else
                                -- Wait a bit if boss isn't found yet
                                task.wait(1)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    
                    -- Store the thread reference so it can be stopped if needed
                    _G.BossManipulationThread = bossManipulationThread
                end
            end
        ]]
        
        -- Queue the script to run after teleport
        if syn and syn.queue_on_teleport then
            syn.queue_on_teleport(teleportScript)
        elseif queue_on_teleport then
            queue_on_teleport(teleportScript)
        end
    end
end)
end
})

end
