Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Tableflip Player",
    Callback = function()
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local foundPlayer = nil

        for _, player in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= localPlayer then
                local stats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
                if stats and stats:FindFirstChild("Glove") and stats.Glove.Value == "Tableflip" then
                    foundPlayer = player
                    break
                end
            end
        end

        if foundPlayer and foundPlayer.Character and foundPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local hrp = foundPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
            localPlayer.Character:PivotTo(hrp.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)) -- Teleport above

            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success!",
                Content = "Teleported To: " .. foundPlayer.Name,
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",
                Time = 3
            })
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Tableflip Player Not Found",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Anti Ragdoll",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        _G.AntiRagdoll = Value

        while _G.AntiRagdoll do
            local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
            if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                if char:FindFirstChild("Ragdolled") and char.Ragdolled.Value == true then
                    local torso = char:FindFirstChild("Torso")
                    if torso then
                        torso.Anchored = true
                        repeat task.wait() until char.Ragdolled.Value == false
                        torso.Anchored = false
                    end
                end
            end
            task.wait()
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Anti Void",
	Callback = function()
--ANTI VOID--
if workspace:FindFirstChild("AntiVoid") == nil then
--ANTI VOID--
local Safespot = Instance.new("Part",workspace)
Safespot.Name = "AntiVoid"
Safespot.Position = Vector3.new(-51, -12, 108)
Safespot.Size = Vector3.new(1000000, 1, 1000000)
Safespot.Anchored = true
Safespot.CanCollide = true
Safespot.Transparency = .5
--ANTI VOID--
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Success",Content = "Created Successfully!",Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",Time = 3})
else
game.workspace.AntiVoid:Destroy()
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Success",Content = "Removed Successfully!",Image = "rbxassetid://7733715400",Time = 3})
end
end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Oven",
    Callback = function()
        -- Get the local player
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local playerName = localPlayer.Name
        
        -- Try to find oven with player's name pattern
        local ovenModel = workspace:FindFirstChild(playerName .. "'s Oven")
        
        -- If not found with exact name, try to find any oven that contains the player's name
        if not ovenModel then
            for _, obj in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                if obj:IsA("Model") and obj.Name:find(playerName) and obj.Name:find("Oven") then
                    ovenModel = obj
                    break
                end
            end
        end
        
        -- If still not found, try to find any oven model
        if not ovenModel then
            for _, obj in pairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
                if obj:IsA("Model") and obj.Name:find("Oven") then
                    ovenModel = obj
                    break
                end
            end
        end
        
        -- If oven found, find hitbox and teleport
        if ovenModel then
            local hitbox = ovenModel:FindFirstChild("Hitbox")
            
            -- If Hitbox not found directly, search deeper
            if not hitbox then
                hitbox = ovenModel:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
            end
            
            if hitbox then
                local character = localPlayer.Character
                if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    -- Teleport to hitbox position
                    character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = hitbox.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0) -- Slightly above the hitbox
                  end
	    end
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Teleport To Slapple Island",
    Callback = function()
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-391, 51, 1)
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Place Birthday Cake",
    Callback = function()
        -- Get the local player
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        
        -- Look for Birthday Cake in backpack
        local cakeTool = nil
        for _, item in pairs(localPlayer.Backpack:GetChildren()) do
            if item:IsA("Tool") and item.Name == "Birthday Cake" then
                cakeTool = item
                break
            end
        end
        
        if cakeTool then
            -- Equip the cake tool
            localPlayer.Character.Humanoid:EquipTool(cakeTool)
            
            -- Small delay to ensure tool is equipped
            task.wait(0.3)
            
            -- Find the CakePromptPlacement and its proximity prompt
            local success = false
            local island5 = workspace:FindFirstChild("Arena") and workspace.Arena:FindFirstChild("island5")
            
            if island5 then
                -- Search for any BasePart named Union.CakePromptPlacement
                for _, part in pairs(island5:GetDescendants()) do
                    if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name == "Union.CakePromptPlacement" then
                        -- Look for CakeProximityPrompt inside
                        local prompt = part:FindFirstChild("CakeProximityPrompt")
                        if prompt and prompt:IsA("ProximityPrompt") then
                            -- Fire the proximity prompt
                            prompt:InputHoldBegin()
                            task.wait(0.1)
                            prompt:InputHoldEnd()
                            
                            success = true

                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

    Name = "Teleport To Piñata",
    Callback = function()
game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = workspace.Pinata.CFrame
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Quake Slap Aura",
    Callback = function()
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Quake" then
-- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

-- Start the infinite loop to fire for all players
while true do
    -- Loop through each player in the game
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        -- Ensure the player has a character and it contains the "Right Arm"
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") then
            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
            local args = {
                [1] = player.Character["Right Arm"]
            }

            -- Fire the server with the "Right Arm" part as an argument
            ReplicatedStorage.GeneralHit:FireServer(unpack(args))
        end
    end

    -- Wait 1 second before running the loop again (adjust the wait time as needed)
    wait(0.5)
end
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Quake",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Shellbert",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Collect All 10 Eggs",
    Callback = function()
        task.spawn(function()
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            if not player then return end
            
            -- Check if quest is active
            local questActive = false
            pcall(function()
                if player.Quests and player.Quests.QuestsActive and player.Quests.QuestsActive["_questChainEasterHunter"] then
                    questActive = player.Quests.QuestsActive["_questChainEasterHunter"].Value == true
                end
            end)
            
            if not questActive then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "Please Accept 'Easter Egg Hunter' Quest First",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 4
                })
                return
            end
            
            local character = player.Character
            if not character or not character.Parent then
                character = player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
            end
            
            local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if not hrp then
                hrp = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            end
            
            local EasterEggsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("EasterHuntEggs")
            if not EasterEggsFolder then
                OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                    Name = "Error",
                    Content = "EasterHuntEggs folder not found!",
                    Image = "rbxassetid://4483345998",
                    Time = 3
                })
                return
            end
            
            -- Create table of all eggs
            local eggs = {
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("Black"),
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("Blossom"),
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("Blue"),
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("Brown"),
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("DarkGrey"),
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("Green"),
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("LightGrey"),
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("Orange"),
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("Red"),
                EasterEggsFolder:FindFirstChild("White")
            }
            
            -- Collect each egg
            for _, egg in pairs(eggs) do
                if egg then
                    pcall(function()
                        local clickDetector = egg:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ClickDetector")
                        
                        if clickDetector then
                            local eggPart = egg:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart") or egg
                            
                            if eggPart then
                                hrp.CFrame = eggPart.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
                                task.wait(0.05)
                                
                                clickDetector:Click()
                                task.wait(0.03)
                                
                                hrp.CFrame = eggPart.CFrame
                                task.wait(0.03)
                                
                                clickDetector:Click()
                            end
                        else
                            local eggPart = egg:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart") or egg
                            if eggPart then
                                for i = 1, 5 do
                                    hrp.CFrame = eggPart.CFrame
                                    task.wait(0.01)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
                
                task.wait(0.03)
            end
            
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Success",
                Content = "All eggs collected!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 2
            })
        end)
    end
})

    Name = "Click On Egg To Teleport Egg Place",
    Callback = function()
        if workspace.EggTeleport and workspace.EggTeleport:FindFirstChild("ClickDetector") then
        fireclickdetector(workspace.EggTeleport.ClickDetector)
    end
end
})

Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Elastic",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Equip Gummy (7750+ Slaps Need)",
    Callback = function()

    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Slap Player",
    Callback = function()
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Gummy" then
-- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

    -- Loop through each player in the game
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        -- Ensure the player has a character and it contains the "Right Arm"
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm") then
            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
            local args = {
                [1] = player.Character["Right Arm"]
            }

            -- Fire the server with the "Right Arm" part as an argument
            ReplicatedStorage.GeneralHit:FireServer(unpack(args))
        end
    end
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Gummy",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

local WalkFlingActive = false
local WalkFlingConnection = nil
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

-- Get HumanoidRootPart
local function getRoot(char)
    return char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
end

-- Enable/Disable noclip
local function setNoclip(enabled)
    local character = player.Character
    if character then
        for _, part in pairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                part.CanCollide = not enabled
            end
        end
    end
end

-- WalkFling loop (FIXED)
local function startWalkFling()
    if WalkFlingConnection then return end
    
    WalkFlingConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
        if not WalkFlingActive then return end
        
        local character = player.Character
        if not character or not character.Parent then return end
        
        local root = getRoot(character)
        if not root then return end
        
        -- Enable noclip
        setNoclip(true)
        
        -- Apply fling force
        local vel = root.Velocity
        root.Velocity = vel * 100 + Vector3.new(0, 500, 0)
        
        -- Small delay to let the fling apply
        task.wait(0.01)
        
        -- Restore velocity (keeps momentum)
        if root and root.Parent then
            root.Velocity = vel * 50 + Vector3.new(0, 250, 0)
        end
    end)
end

local function stopWalkFling()
    WalkFlingActive = false
    if WalkFlingConnection then
        WalkFlingConnection:Disconnect()
        WalkFlingConnection = nil
    end
    setNoclip(false)
end

-- Auto-disable on death
player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    task.wait(0.1)
    if WalkFlingActive then
        stopWalkFling()
        task.wait(0.1)
        WalkFlingActive = true
        startWalkFling()
    end
end)

-- Orion Hub Toggle
Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "WalkFling",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value then
            WalkFlingActive = true
            startWalkFling()
        else
            stopWalkFling()
        end
    end
})

end

do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Camera",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

Tab:AddParagraph("Credits:", "Credits To: St1mlx for helping making this script for Camera Glove")

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Get Camera Glove",
    Callback = function()
if not game:IsLoaded() then game.Loaded:Wait() end

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local VirtualInputManager = game:GetService("VirtualInputManager")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local StarterGui = game:GetService("StarterGui")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera

local zoom = 30
local minZoom = 2
local maxZoom = 70
local zoomSpeed = 2
local photoDistance = 11
local driftRadius = 0.0061
local focusedPart

local oldCameraType = camera.CameraType
local oldCameraSubject = camera.CameraSubject
local oldMinZoom = player.CameraMinZoomDistance
local oldMaxZoom = player.CameraMaxZoomDistance
local oldCameraMode = player.CameraMode

local function notify(title, text, duration)
    pcall(function()
        StarterGui:SetCore("SendNotification", {
            Title = title,
            Text = text,
            Duration = duration or 3,
        })
    end)
end

local function character()
    return player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
end

local function rootPart()
    return character():WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart", 5)
end

local function humanoid()
    return character():FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
end

local function hasGhost()
    local stats = player:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
    local glove = stats and stats:FindFirstChild("Glove")
    return glove and glove.Value == "Ghost"
end

local function hasEntered()
    local entered = character():FindFirstChild("entered")
    if not entered then return false end
    if entered:IsA("BoolValue") then return entered.Value == true end
    return true
end

local function setNormalZoom()
    player.CameraMode = Enum.CameraMode.Classic
    player.CameraMinZoomDistance = math.clamp(zoom, minZoom, maxZoom)
    player.CameraMaxZoomDistance = math.clamp(zoom, minZoom, maxZoom)
end

local function setCameraToPart(part)
    local root = rootPart()
    if not root or not part then return end

    focusedPart = part
    player.CameraMode = Enum.CameraMode.Classic
    player.CameraMinZoomDistance = minZoom
    player.CameraMaxZoomDistance = maxZoom

    local target = part.Position
    local dir = (target - root.Position)
    if dir.Magnitude < 1 then dir = part.CFrame.LookVector end
    dir = dir.Unit

    local height = Vector3.new(0, math.max(1.5, part.Size.Y * 0.2), 0)
    local camPos = root.Position - dir * zoom + height

    camera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable
    camera.CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(camPos, target)
end

local function pressOFor(seconds)
    zoom = math.clamp(math.max(zoom, 30), minZoom, maxZoom)
    pcall(function()
        VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(true, Enum.KeyCode.O, false, game)
        task.wait(seconds or 3.5)
        VirtualInputManager:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode.O, false, game)
    end)
end

UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
    if gameProcessed then return end
    if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseWheel then return end

    zoom = math.clamp(zoom - input.Position.Z * zoomSpeed, minZoom, maxZoom)

    if focusedPart and focusedPart.Parent then
        setCameraToPart(focusedPart)
    else
        setNormalZoom()
    end
end)

local function restoreCamera()
    focusedPart = nil
    camera.CameraType = oldCameraType
    camera.CameraSubject = oldCameraSubject
    player.CameraMinZoomDistance = oldMinZoom
    player.CameraMaxZoomDistance = oldMaxZoom
    player.CameraMode = oldCameraMode
end

local function equipCamera()
    local char = character()
    local tool = char:FindFirstChild("Camera")

    if tool then return tool end

    local backpack = player:FindFirstChild("Backpack")
    tool = backpack and backpack:FindFirstChild("Camera")
    if tool then
        local hum = humanoid()
        if hum then
            hum:EquipTool(tool)
        else
            tool.Parent = char
        end
    end

    return char:FindFirstChild("Camera")
end

local function activateGhost()
    local remote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Ghostinvisibilityactivated")
    if remote then
        remote:FireServer()
    end
end

local function clearGhostSky()
    local sky = Lighting:FindFirstChild("Creepysky")
    if sky then sky:Destroy() end

    local color = Lighting:FindFirstChild("dimensioncolor")
    if color then color:Destroy() end
end

local function pickupCamera()
    local model = workspace:FindFirstChild("CameraModel")
    local handle = model and model:FindFirstChild("Handle")
    local prompt = handle and handle:FindFirstChildOfClass("ProximityPrompt")

    if prompt then
        fireproximityprompt(prompt)
    end

    local untilAt = os.clock() + 3
    repeat
        local tool = equipCamera()
        if tool then return tool end
        task.wait(0.1)
    until os.clock() > untilAt
end

local function anchorHead(value)
    local head = character():FindFirstChild("Head")
    if head then
        head.Anchored = value
    end
end

local function setLevitation(value)
    local root = rootPart()
    if not root then return end

    root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
    root.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero
    root.Anchored = false
end

local function cameraRemote()
    return ReplicatedStorage
        :WaitForChild("Assets")
        :WaitForChild("Obtainments")
        :WaitForChild("Camera")
        :WaitForChild("Remotes")
        :WaitForChild("IsPhotoValid")
end

local teleportForPhoto

local function takePhoto(part)
    local tool = equipCamera()
    if not tool then
        warn("Camera tool not found")
        return false
    end

    task.spawn(function()
        pressOFor(3.5)
    end)
    local untilAt = os.clock() + 3.7
    while os.clock() < untilAt do
        teleportForPhoto(part)
        RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
    end

    local viewport = camera.ViewportSize
    local x = math.floor(viewport.X * 0.5)
    local y = math.floor(viewport.Y * 0.5)

    pcall(function()
        VirtualInputManager:SendMouseButtonEvent(x, y, 0, true, game, 0)
        task.wait(0.08)
        VirtualInputManager:SendMouseButtonEvent(x, y, 0, false, game, 0)
    end)

    pcall(function()
        tool:Activate()
    end)

    local ok, valid = pcall(function()
        return cameraRemote():InvokeServer(part)
    end)

    if not ok then
        warn("PNG " .. tostring(part.Name) .. " IsPhotoValid error:", valid)
    end
    print("PNG " .. tostring(part.Name) .. " photo valid =", ok and valid == true)
    return ok and valid == true
end

function teleportForPhoto(part)
    local root = rootPart()
    if not root or not part then return false end

    local target = part.Position
    local frontDir = part.CFrame.LookVector
    local drift = os.clock() * 12
    local offset = Vector3.new(math.cos(drift) * driftRadius, 0, math.sin(drift) * driftRadius)
    local place = target + frontDir * photoDistance
    place = Vector3.new(place.X, target.Y, place.Z) + offset

    root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
    root.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero
    root.Anchored = false
    root.CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(place, target)
    setCameraToPart(part)

    return true
end

local function findPNG(name)
    local folder = workspace:FindFirstChild("Camera_Obtainment_PNGS")
    local part = folder and folder:FindFirstChild(name)
    if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then return part end

    part = workspace:FindFirstChild(name)
    if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then return part end

    for _, obj in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if obj:IsA("BasePart") and obj.Name == name then
            return obj
        end
    end
end

if not (hasGhost() and hasEntered()) then
    notify("Camera Obtainment", "Equip Ghost and enter arena first", 4)
    return
end

notify("Camera Obtainment", "Starting", 3)

rootPart().CFrame = CFrame.new(-17921, 60, 3584)
task.wait(0.8)

activateGhost()
task.wait(0.8)
clearGhostSky()

rootPart().CFrame = CFrame.new(-388, 52, 0)
task.wait(0.8)

pickupCamera()
task.wait(0.5)
anchorHead(false)

local pngNames = { "7", "6", "5", "4", "3", "2", "1" }

for _, name in ipairs(pngNames) do
    local part = findPNG(name)
    if part and teleportForPhoto(part) then
        task.wait(0.45)
        takePhoto(part)
        task.wait(0.35)
    else
        warn("PNG not found:", name)
    end
end

local root = rootPart()
if root then
    root.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
    root.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero
    root.CFrame = CFrame.new(0, 0, 0)
end

setLevitation(false)
anchorHead(false)
restoreCamera()
notify("Camera Obtainment", "Finished", 4)
    end
})

end
do
Tab = Window:MakeTab({
	Name = "Grillmaster",
	Icon = "rbxassetid://7733673987",
	PremiumOnly = false
	})

-- ============================================================
-- HOT DOGS QUESTS INFO
-- ============================================================

-- Create the paragraph for Hot Dogs Quests
local HotDogParagraph = Tab:AddParagraph("Hot Dogs Quests Info:", "Loading...")

-- Get local player username
local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer

-- Function to check if HotdogUI exists
local function hasHotdogUI()
    local playerGui = localPlayer:FindFirstChild("PlayerGui")
    if playerGui then
        return playerGui:FindFirstChild("HotdogUI") ~= nil
    end
    return false
end

-- Function to get quest description text
local function getQuestDescription(questFrame)
    local description = questFrame:FindFirstChild("Description")
    if description and description:IsA("TextLabel") then
        return description.Text
    end
    return ""
end

-- Function to parse quest text into description and progress
local function parseQuestText(text)
    -- Look for pattern: "Description (progress)" e.g., "Slap 3 different players in your ice aura with the Chillydog (2/3)"
    local description = text
    local progress = ""
    
    -- Find the last occurrence of "(" and ")"
    local startParen = text:find("%(")
    local endParen = text:find("%)")
    
    if startParen and endParen and startParen < endParen then
        description = text:sub(1, startParen - 1):gsub("%s+$", "") -- Remove trailing spaces
        progress = text:sub(startParen, endParen)
    end
    
    return description, progress
end

-- Function to get reward text
local function getRewardText(questFrame)
    -- Look for a TextLabel named "Reward" or similar
    local reward = questFrame:FindFirstChild("Reward")
    if reward and reward:IsA("TextLabel") then
        return reward.Text
    end
    return "N/A"
end

-- Function to update Hot Dogs Quests Info
local function updateHotDogQuestsInfo()
    if not hasHotdogUI() then
        HotDogParagraph:Set("❌ Equip 'Ketchup Default' Glove First Before Loading Quests Info")
        return
    end
    
    -- Path: PlayerGui.HotdogUI.Frame.OrdersFrame.OrderContainer
    local playerGui = localPlayer:FindFirstChild("PlayerGui")
    if not playerGui then return end
    
    local hotdogUI = playerGui:FindFirstChild("HotdogUI")
    if not hotdogUI then return end
    
    local frame = hotdogUI:FindFirstChild("Frame")
    if not frame then return end
    
    local ordersFrame = frame:FindFirstChild("OrdersFrame")
    if not ordersFrame then return end
    
    local orderContainer = ordersFrame:FindFirstChild("OrderContainer")
    if not orderContainer then return end
    
    -- Build the quest info
    local lines = {}
    table.insert(lines, "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    table.insert(lines, "                🌭 HOT DOGS QUESTS 🌭")
    table.insert(lines, "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    table.insert(lines, "")
    
    -- Check each ImageLabel (1-6)
    local hasQuests = false
    for i = 1, 6 do
        local questImage = orderContainer:FindFirstChild(tostring(i))
        if questImage and questImage:IsA("ImageLabel") then
            local descriptionText = getQuestDescription(questImage)
            
            if descriptionText ~= "" then
                hasQuests = true
                local questName = questImage.Name
                local desc, progress = parseQuestText(descriptionText)
                local reward = getRewardText(questImage)
                
                table.insert(lines, "━━━ Quest " .. i .. " ━━━")
                table.insert(lines, "Name: " .. questName)
                table.insert(lines, "Description: " .. desc)
                if progress ~= "" then
                    table.insert(lines, "Progress: " .. progress)
                end
                if reward ~= "N/A" then
                    table.insert(lines, "Reward: " .. reward)
                end
                table.insert(lines, "")
            end
        end
    end
    
    if not hasQuests then
        table.insert(lines, "No quests found or all quests completed!")
    end
    
    -- Add a footer
    table.insert(lines, "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    table.insert(lines, "                🎯 QUESTS PROGRESS 🎯")
    table.insert(lines, "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━")
    
    -- Count completed quests
    local completed = 0
    local total = 0
    for i = 1, 6 do
        local questImage = orderContainer:FindFirstChild(tostring(i))
        if questImage and questImage:IsA("ImageLabel") then
            total = total + 1
            local desc = getQuestDescription(questImage)
            if desc == "" then
                completed = completed + 1
            end
        end
    end
    
    local progressPercent = total > 0 and math.floor((completed / total) * 100) or 0
    table.insert(lines, "✅ Completed: " .. completed .. "/" .. total)
    table.insert(lines, "📈 Progress: " .. progressPercent .. "%")
    
    -- Update the paragraph
    HotDogParagraph:Set(table.concat(lines, "\n"))
end

-- ============================================================
-- HOT DOGS BUY SYSTEM
-- ============================================================

-- Multi Dropdown for Hot Dogs
local HotDogMultiDropdown = Tab:AddMultiDropdown({
    Name = "Select Hot Dog(s) To Buy",
    Options = {"Chillydog", "Rockdog", "Dynamitedog", "Spicydog", "Jetpackdog", "Ghostdog"},
    Default = {},
    Callback = function(Values)
        -- Just store the selection, the button will handle the purchase
    end,
    Flag = "hotdogSelection",
    Save = true
})

-- Button to buy selected hot dogs
local BuyHotDogButton = Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Buy Selected Hot Dog(s)",
    Callback = function()
        local selected = HotDogMultiDropdown.Values or {}
        
        if #selected == 0 then
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Hot Dogs",
                Content = "Please select at least one hot dog to buy!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
                Time = 3
            })
            return
        end
        
        -- Show notification
        OrionLib:MakeNotification({
            Name = "Hot Dogs",
            Content = "Attempting to buy: " .. table.concat(selected, ", "),
            Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
            Time = 3
        })
        
        -- Fire remote for each selected hot dog
        for _, hotdogName in ipairs(selected) do
            local success, err = pcall(function()
                local remote = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Assets"):WaitForChild("Obtainments"):WaitForChild("Grillmaster"):WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild("BuyHotdog")
                
                local args = {
                    hotdogName
                }
                
                remote:FireServer(unpack(args))
                
                -- Small delay between purchases to avoid rate limiting
                task.wait(0.3)
            end)
            
            if not success then
                warn("Failed to buy " .. hotdogName .. ": " .. tostring(err))
            end
        end
        
        -- Refresh quest info after purchase
        task.wait(1)
        updateHotDogQuestsInfo()
        
        OrionLib:MakeNotification({
            Name = "Hot Dogs",
            Content = "Purchase attempt completed for: " .. table.concat(selected, ", "),
            Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",
            Time = 3
        })
    end
})

-- ============================================================
-- AUTO UPDATE FOR HOT DOGS QUESTS
-- ============================================================

-- Initial load
task.spawn(function()
    task.wait(0.01)
    updateHotDogQuestsInfo()
end)

-- Auto-update every 2 seconds
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        task.wait(0.01)
        pcall(updateHotDogQuestsInfo)
    end
end)

Tab:AddButton({
	Name = "Auto Slap Aura Players",
	Callback = function()   
if game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Glove.Value == "Rage" then
-- Get the ReplicatedStorage and Players service
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

-- Start the infinite loop to fire for all players
while true do
    -- Loop through each player in the game
    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        -- Ensure the player has a character and it contains the "Left Leg"
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Left Leg") then
            -- Create the arguments table for the FireServer function
            local args = {
                [1] = player.Character["Left Leg"],
                [2] = false  -- The second argument, set to false as in your original script
            }

            -- Fire the server with the "Left Leg" part as an argument
            ReplicatedStorage.GRRRR:FireServer(unpack(args))
        end
    end

    -- Wait 1 second before running the loop again (adjust the wait time as needed)
    wait(0.5)
end
else
OrionLib:MakeNotification({Name = "Error",Content = "Equip Rage",Image = "rbxassetid://7743878857",Time = 3})
end
end
})

end

-- Store owned badges
local ownedBadges = {}

-- Fetch owned badges from ReplicatedStorage
local function fetchOwnedBadges()
    ownedBadges = {}
    
    local playerData = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if not playerData then
        return false
    end
    
    local playerFolder = playerData:FindFirstChild(username)
    if not playerFolder then
        return false
    end
    
    local unlockedBadges = playerFolder:FindFirstChild("UnlockedBadges")
    if not unlockedBadges then
        return false
    end
    
    if unlockedBadges:IsA("StringValue") then
        local badgeIdsString = unlockedBadges.Value
        
        if badgeIdsString and badgeIdsString ~= "" then
            local trimmed = badgeIdsString:sub(2, -2)
            
            for id in string.gmatch(trimmed, "[^,]+") do
                local cleanId = id:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
                ownedBadges[cleanId] = true
            end
        end
        return true
    end
    return false
end

local WebhookSettings = {
    WebhookURL = "",
    SendInterval = "No time",
    LoggedObjects = {},
    SlapsThreshold = 0,
    NullShardsThreshold = 0,
    Enabled = false,
    PingType = "No Pings",
    UserID = "",
    RoleID = "",
    
    -- Tracking variables
    LastSlapsValue = 0,
    LastNullShardsValue = 0,
    TrackedSlaps = false,
    TrackedNullShards = false,
    SlapsStartValue = 0,
    NullShardsStartValue = 0,
    IsSlapsTracking = false,
    IsNullShardsTracking = false,
    ObjectLogged = {},
    SlapsLogged = false,
    NullShardsLogged = false,
    SlappleLogged = {},
    GoldenSlappleLogged = false,
    LastBadgeCheck = {},
    BadgeLogSent = false,
}

-- ============================================================
-- HELPER FUNCTIONS
-- ============================================================

-- Helper function to get Null Shards
function WebhookSettings:GetNullShards()
    local playerData = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("PlayerData")
    if playerData then
        local userData = playerData:FindFirstChild(username)
        if userData then
            local nullShards = userData:FindFirstChild("NullShards")
            if nullShards then
                return nullShards.Value
            end
        end
    end
    return 0
end

-- Get ping prefix based on settings
local function getPingPrefix()
    if WebhookSettings.PingType == "No Pings" then
        return ""
    elseif WebhookSettings.PingType == "@User Ping" and WebhookSettings.UserID ~= "" then
        return "<@" .. WebhookSettings.UserID .. "> "
    elseif WebhookSettings.PingType == "@Role Ping" and WebhookSettings.RoleID ~= "" then
        return "<@&" .. WebhookSettings.RoleID .. "> "
    elseif WebhookSettings.PingType == "@Everyone Ping" then
        return "@everyone "
    elseif WebhookSettings.PingType == "@Here Ping" then
        return "@here "
    end
    return ""
end

-- Webhook send function
local function sendWebhookMessage(content)
    if not WebhookSettings.Enabled or WebhookSettings.WebhookURL == "" then return end
    
    local ping = getPingPrefix()
    local fullContent = ping .. content
    
    local payload = {
        content = fullContent or "No message provided"
    }
    
    local jsonData = HttpService:JSONEncode(payload)
    
    local success, response = pcall(function()
        if syn and syn.request then
            return syn.request({
                Url = WebhookSettings.WebhookURL,
                Method = "POST",
                Headers = {
                    ["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
                },
                Body = jsonData
            })
        elseif http_request then
            return http_request({
                Url = WebhookSettings.WebhookURL,
                Method = "POST",
                Headers = {
                    ["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
                },
                Body = jsonData
            })
        elseif request then
            return request({
                Url = WebhookSettings.WebhookURL,
                Method = "POST",
                Headers = {
                    ["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
                },
                Body = jsonData
            })
        else
            warn("No request method available for webhook!")
            return nil, "No request method available"
        end
    end)
    
    if not success then
        warn("Failed to send webhook: " .. tostring(response))
    end
end

-- Get badge name from ID
local function getBadgeName(badgeId)
    for _, badge in pairs(allBadges) do
        if badge.id == badgeId then
            return badge.name
        end
    end
    return "Unknown Badge"
end

    Name = "Webhook URL",
    Default = "",
    TextDisappear = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        WebhookSettings.WebhookURL = Value
    end
})

-- 2. Send Interval Dropdown

    Name = "Send Interval",
    Options = {"No time", "30 Seconds", "1 Minute", "10 Minutes", "30 Minutes", "1 Hour", "5 Hours", "10 Hours", "1 Day"},
    Default = "No time",
    Callback = function(Value)
        WebhookSettings.SendInterval = Value
    end,
    Flag = "webhookInterval",
    Save = true
})

-- 3. Multi Dropdown for Objects
local ObjectsMultiDropdown = Tab:AddMultiDropdown({
    Name = "Choose Objects Spawns To Log",
    Options = {"Jet Orb", "Phase Orb", "Glitch Orb", "Siphon Orb", "MATERIALIZE Orb", "Slapple", "Golden Slapple", "Toolbox"},
    Default = {},
    Callback = function(Values)
        WebhookSettings.LoggedObjects = Values
        WebhookSettings.ObjectLogged = {}
        WebhookSettings.SlappleLogged = {}
        WebhookSettings.GoldenSlappleLogged = false
        for _, obj in pairs(Values) do
            if obj == "Slapple" then
                WebhookSettings.SlappleLogged[obj] = {}
            elseif obj == "Golden Slapple" then
                WebhookSettings.GoldenSlappleLogged = false
            else
                WebhookSettings.ObjectLogged[obj] = false
            end
        end
    end,
    Flag = "loggedObjects",
    Save = true
})

-- 4. Slaps Threshold Dropdown
local SlapsDropdown = Tab:AddDropdown({
    Name = "Slaps Threshold",
    Options = {"100+ Slaps", "1000+ Slaps", "10000+ Slaps", "100000+ Slaps", "1000000+ Slaps", "Custom Slaps Amount"},
    Default = "1000+ Slaps",
    Callback = function(Value)
        if Value == "Custom Slaps Amount" then
            WebhookSettings.SlapsThreshold = 0
        else
            local num = tonumber(Value:match("(%d+)")) or 0
            WebhookSettings.SlapsThreshold = num
            WebhookSettings.TrackedSlaps = false
            WebhookSettings.SlapsLogged = false
        end
    end,
    Flag = "slapsThreshold",
    Save = true
})

            WebhookSettings.NullShardsThreshold = 0

-- 7. Enable/Disable Toggle
local EnableToggle = Tab:AddToggle({
    Name = "Enable Webhook Logging",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(value)
        if value then
            WebhookSettings.Enabled = true
            
            -- Initialize tracking
            WebhookSettings.LastSlapsValue = LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Slaps.Value
            WebhookSettings.LastNullShardsValue = WebhookSettings:GetNullShards()
            WebhookSettings.SlapsStartValue = WebhookSettings.LastSlapsValue
            WebhookSettings.NullShardsStartValue = WebhookSettings.LastNullShardsValue
            WebhookSettings.IsSlapsTracking = true
            WebhookSettings.IsNullShardsTracking = true
            WebhookSettings.SlapsLogged = false
            WebhookSettings.NullShardsLogged = false
            WebhookSettings.BadgeLogSent = false
            WebhookSettings.ObjectLogged = {}
            WebhookSettings.SlappleLogged = {}
            WebhookSettings.GoldenSlappleLogged = false
            WebhookSettings.LastBadgeCheck = {}
            
            -- Fetch initial badges
            pcall(fetchOwnedBadges)
            for badgeId, _ in pairs(ownedBadges) do
                WebhookSettings.LastBadgeCheck[badgeId] = true
            end
            
            for _, obj in pairs(WebhookSettings.LoggedObjects) do
                if obj == "Slapple" then
                    WebhookSettings.SlappleLogged[obj] = {}
                elseif obj == "Golden Slapple" then
                    WebhookSettings.GoldenSlappleLogged = false
                else
                    WebhookSettings.ObjectLogged[obj] = false
                end
            end
            sendWebhookMessage("✅ Webhook logging **STARTED**!")
        else
            -- Send stop message before disabling
            sendWebhookMessage("🛑 Webhook logging **STOPPED**!")
            WebhookSettings.Enabled = false
        end
    end
})

-- ============================================================
-- TRACKING FUNCTIONS
-- ============================================================

-- Object detection function
local function checkObjectSpawns()
    if not WebhookSettings.Enabled then return end
    
    -- Regular objects (not Slapples)
    local objectsToCheck = {
        ["Jet Orb"] = workspace:FindFirstChild("JetOrb"),
        ["Phase Orb"] = workspace:FindFirstChild("PhaseOrb"),
        ["Glitch Orb"] = workspace:FindFirstChild("GlitchOrb"),
        ["Siphon Orb"] = workspace:FindFirstChild("SiphonOrb"),
        ["MATERIALIZE Orb"] = workspace:FindFirstChild("MATERIALIZEOrb"),
        ["Toolbox"] = workspace:FindFirstChild("Toolbox"),
    }
    
    for name, object in pairs(objectsToCheck) do
        if table.find(WebhookSettings.LoggedObjects, name) then
            if object and not WebhookSettings.ObjectLogged[name] then
                WebhookSettings.ObjectLogged[name] = true
                
                local placeName = "Unknown"
                pcall(function()
                    local info = MarketplaceService:GetProductInfo(game.PlaceId)
                    if info and info.Name then
                        placeName = info.Name
                    end
                end)
                
                local message = string.format(
                    "**From Webhook Log:**\n\n**Detected | Spawned:** %s\n\n**Name:** %s\n**Real Name:** %s\n**Place Name:** %s\n**Place ID:** %s\n**JobID:** %s",
                    name, name, object.Name, placeName, game.PlaceId, game.JobId
                )
                
                sendWebhookMessage(message)
            elseif not object then
                WebhookSettings.ObjectLogged[name] = false
            end
        end
    end
    
    -- SLAPPLE CHECK (workspace.Arena.island5.Slapples)
    if table.find(WebhookSettings.LoggedObjects, "Slapple") then
        local slapplesFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("Arena")
        if slapplesFolder then
            local island5 = slapplesFolder:FindFirstChild("island5")
            if island5 then
                local slapples = island5:FindFirstChild("Slapples")
                if slapples then
                    for _, model in ipairs(slapples:GetChildren()) do
                        if model:IsA("Model") then
                            local gloveMesh = model:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                            if gloveMesh and gloveMesh:IsA("MeshPart") then
                                local transparency = gloveMesh.Transparency
                                local modelName = model.Name
                                
                                if not WebhookSettings.SlappleLogged[modelName] then
                                    if transparency == 0 then
                                        WebhookSettings.SlappleLogged[modelName] = true
                                        
                                        local placeName = "Unknown"
                                        pcall(function()
                                            local info = MarketplaceService:GetProductInfo(game.PlaceId)
                                            if info and info.Name then
                                                placeName = info.Name
                                            end
                                        end)
                                        
                                        local message = string.format(
                                            "**From Webhook Log:**\n\n**Detected | Spawned:** Slapple\n\n**Name:** Slapple\n**Real Name:** %s\n**Place Name:** %s\n**Place ID:** %s\n**JobID:** %s",
                                            modelName, placeName, game.PlaceId, game.JobId
                                        )
                                        
                                        sendWebhookMessage(message)
                                    end
                                elseif transparency == 1 then
                                    WebhookSettings.SlappleLogged[modelName] = nil
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    -- GOLDEN SLAPPLE CHECK
    if table.find(WebhookSettings.LoggedObjects, "Golden Slapple") then
        local slapplesFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("Arena")
        if slapplesFolder then
            local island5 = slapplesFolder:FindFirstChild("island5")
            if island5 then
                local slapples = island5:FindFirstChild("Slapples")
                if slapples then
                    local goldenSlapple = slapples:FindFirstChild("GoldenSlapple")
                    if goldenSlapple and goldenSlapple:IsA("Model") then
                        local gloveMesh = goldenSlapple:FindFirstChild("Glove")
                        if gloveMesh and gloveMesh:IsA("MeshPart") then
                            local transparency = gloveMesh.Transparency
                            
                            if transparency == 0 and not WebhookSettings.GoldenSlappleLogged then
                                WebhookSettings.GoldenSlappleLogged = true
                                
                                local placeName = "Unknown"
                                pcall(function()
                                    local info = MarketplaceService:GetProductInfo(game.PlaceId)
                                    if info and info.Name then
                                        placeName = info.Name
                                    end
                                end)
                                
                                local message = string.format(
                                    "**From Webhook Log:**\n\n**Detected | Spawned:** Golden Slapple\n\n**Name:** Golden Slapple\n**Real Name:** GoldenSlapple\n**Place Name:** %s\n**Place ID:** %s\n**JobID:** %s",
                                    placeName, game.PlaceId, game.JobId
                                )
                                
                                sendWebhookMessage(message)
                            elseif transparency == 1 then
                                WebhookSettings.GoldenSlappleLogged = false
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Slaps tracking function
local function checkSlaps()
    if not WebhookSettings.Enabled or WebhookSettings.SlapsThreshold == 0 or not WebhookSettings.IsSlapsTracking then return end
    
    local currentSlaps = LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Slaps.Value
    local previousSlaps = WebhookSettings.LastSlapsValue
    
    if currentSlaps >= WebhookSettings.SlapsThreshold and currentSlaps > previousSlaps then
        WebhookSettings.LastSlapsValue = currentSlaps
        
        local earnedSlaps = currentSlaps - WebhookSettings.SlapsStartValue
        
        local placeName = "Unknown"
        pcall(function()
            local info = MarketplaceService:GetProductInfo(game.PlaceId)
            if info and info.Name then
                placeName = info.Name
            end
        end)
        
        local message = string.format(
            "**Slaps Counter Log**\n\n**Name:** Slaps\n**Before Amount:** %s\n**After Amount:** %s\n**Earned Total Slaps:** +%s\n**Place Name:** %s\n**Place ID:** %s\n**JobID:** %s",
            WebhookSettings.SlapsStartValue, currentSlaps, earnedSlaps, placeName, game.PlaceId, game.JobId
        )
        
        sendWebhookMessage(message)
        
        WebhookSettings.SlapsStartValue = currentSlaps
    end
end

-- Null Shards tracking function
local function checkNullShards()
    if not WebhookSettings.Enabled or WebhookSettings.NullShardsThreshold == 0 or not WebhookSettings.IsNullShardsTracking then return end
    
    local currentNullShards = WebhookSettings:GetNullShards()
    local previousNullShards = WebhookSettings.LastNullShardsValue
    
    if currentNullShards >= WebhookSettings.NullShardsThreshold and currentNullShards > previousNullShards then
        WebhookSettings.LastNullShardsValue = currentNullShards
        
        local earnedNullShards = currentNullShards - WebhookSettings.NullShardsStartValue
        
        local placeName = "Unknown"
        pcall(function()
            local info = MarketplaceService:GetProductInfo(game.PlaceId)
            if info and info.Name then
                placeName = info.Name
            end
        end)
        
        local message = string.format(
            "**Null Shards Counter Log**\n\n**Name:** Null Shards\n**Before Amount:** %s\n**After Amount:** %s\n**Earned Total Null Shards:** +%s\n**Place Name:** %s\n**Place ID:** %s\n**JobID:** %s",
            WebhookSettings.NullShardsStartValue, currentNullShards, earnedNullShards, placeName, game.PlaceId, game.JobId
        )
        
        sendWebhookMessage(message)
        
        WebhookSettings.NullShardsStartValue = currentNullShards
    end
end

-- Badge tracking function
local function checkBadges()
    if not WebhookSettings.Enabled then return end
    
    -- Fetch latest badges
    local success = pcall(fetchOwnedBadges)
    if not success then return end
    
    local newBadges = {}
    
    -- Check for new badges
    for badgeId, _ in pairs(ownedBadges) do
        if not WebhookSettings.LastBadgeCheck[badgeId] then
            table.insert(newBadges, badgeId)
            WebhookSettings.LastBadgeCheck[badgeId] = true
        end
    end
    
    -- If there are new badges, send a log
    if #newBadges > 0 then
        local placeName = "Unknown"
        pcall(function()
            local info = MarketplaceService:GetProductInfo(game.PlaceId)
            if info and info.Name then
                placeName = info.Name
            end
        end)
        
        -- Find badge names
        local newBadgeNames = {}
        for _, id in pairs(newBadges) do
            for _, badge in pairs(allBadges) do
                if badge.id == id then
                    table.insert(newBadgeNames, badge.name .. " (`" .. id .. "`)")
                    break
                end
            end
        end
        
        -- Build owned list (all badges)
        local ownedList = {}
        for id, _ in pairs(WebhookSettings.LastBadgeCheck) do
            table.insert(ownedList, id)
        end
        
        -- Build missing list (all glove-rewarding badges not owned)
        local missingList = {}
        for _, badge in pairs(allBadges) do
            if badge.category == "GloveRewarding" and not ownedBadges[badge.id] then
                table.insert(missingList, badge.id)
            end
        end
        
        local message = string.format(
            "**🎉 NEW BADGE(S) UNLOCKED!**\n\n" ..
            "**Badge(s):**\n%s\n\n" ..
            "**Place Name:** %s\n" ..
            "**Place ID:** %s\n" ..
            "**JobID:** %s\n\n" ..
            "**Total Badges Unlocked:** %s\n" ..
            "**Missing Glove Badges:** %s",
            table.concat(newBadgeNames, "\n"),
            placeName,
            game.PlaceId,
            game.JobId,
            #ownedList > 0 and #ownedList .. " badges" or "None",
            #missingList > 0 and #missingList .. " badges" or "None"
        )
        
        sendWebhookMessage(message)
    end
end

-- Main loop
local function startWebhookLoop()
    while true do
        if WebhookSettings.Enabled then
            pcall(checkObjectSpawns)
            pcall(checkSlaps)
            pcall(checkNullShards)
            pcall(checkBadges)
        end
        
        local waitTime = 1
        if WebhookSettings.SendInterval == "30 Seconds" then 
            waitTime = 30
        elseif WebhookSettings.SendInterval == "1 Minute" then 
            waitTime = 60
        elseif WebhookSettings.SendInterval == "10 Minutes" then 
            waitTime = 600
        elseif WebhookSettings.SendInterval == "30 Minutes" then 
            waitTime = 1800
        elseif WebhookSettings.SendInterval == "1 Hour" then 
            waitTime = 3600
        elseif WebhookSettings.SendInterval == "5 Hours" then 
            waitTime = 18000
        elseif WebhookSettings.SendInterval == "10 Hours" then 
            waitTime = 36000
        elseif WebhookSettings.SendInterval == "1 Day" then 
            waitTime = 86400
        end
        
        task.wait(waitTime)
    end
end

-- Start the loop
task.spawn(startWebhookLoop)

end
do
-- CREDITS
local Tab = Window:MakeTab({
    Name = "Credits",
    Icon = "rbxassetid://7743875759",
    PremiumOnly = false
})

-- Credits Users
Section = Tab:AddSection({

})

Tab:AddTextbox({
    Name = "How Many Slaps? (Visual)",
    Default = "",
    TextDisappear = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        local slapNumber = tonumber(Value)
        if slapNumber and slapNumber > 0 then
            SlapChanger = slapNumber
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Type a correct number (greater than 0)!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733975185",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Set Slaps (Visual)",
    Callback = function()
        if SlapChanger then
            game.Players.LocalPlayer.leaderstats.Slaps.Value = SlapChanger
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Please enter a valid number of slaps!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733975185",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddTextbox({
    Name = "How Many Null Shards? (Visual)",
    Default = "",
    TextDisappear = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        local nullshardNumber = tonumber(Value)
        if nullshardNumber and nullshardNumber >= 0 then
            getgenv().nullshardChanger = tostring(nullshardNumber)  -- Convert to string since it's a StringValue

        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Type a correct number (0 or greater)!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733975185",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

Tab:AddButton({
    Name = "Set Null Shards (Visual)",
    Callback = function()
        if getgenv().nullshardChanger then
            local playerName = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name
            
            -- Wait for ReplicatedStorage to load
            local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
            
            -- Check if PlayerData folder exists
            local playerData = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("PlayerData", 5)
            if not playerData then

                return
            end
            
            -- Check if player folder exists
            local playerFolder = playerData:WaitForChild(playerName, 5)
            if not playerFolder then

                return
            end
            
            -- Check if NullShards StringValue exists
            local nullShardsValue = playerFolder:WaitForChild("NullShards", 5)
            if not nullShardsValue then

                return
            end
            
            -- Verify it's a StringValue
            if nullShardsValue.ClassName ~= "StringValue" then

                return
            end
            
            -- Set the value
            local oldValue = nullShardsValue.Value
            nullShardsValue.Value = getgenv().nullshardChanger
            
            
            print("[Null Shards] Changed from " .. oldValue .. " to " .. getgenv().nullshardChanger)
            
        else
            OrionLib:MakeNotification({
                Name = "Error",
                Content = "Please enter a valid number first!",
                Image = "rbxassetid://7733975185",
                Time = 3
            })
        end
    end
})
